cz: Dekuji.\e\e\rPoslete ho dal.\f

en: Hey, Nell!\e\rHow're things looking?\f
cz: Cau, Nell!\e\rJak to vypada?\f

en: That's what concerns me...\e\rDo you see that giant cannon?\f
cz: To je to, co me znepokojuje...\e\rVidis ten obri kanon?\f

en: Wow! \eIt's huge!\e\rI've never seen anything like it!\f
cz: Pane! \eJe obrovsky!\e\rNic takoveho jsem nevidel!\f

en: A cannon that size is a first\rfor me, too.\fThe Black Hole Army seems to be\rmuch more of a threat than last time.\f
cz: Kanon teto velikosti vidim\ru take poprve.\fArmada Black Hole se zda byt\rmnohem vetsi hrozbou nez minule.\f

en: You got that right!\e\e\rNell, \elet me take care of this.\f
cz: Naprosto presne!\e\e\rNell, \enech to na me.\f

en: Max?\e\rWhat are you doing here?\f
cz: Max?\e\rCo tady delas?\f

en: C'mon, Nell. \eThis job's too much\rfor Andy.\fYou need someone with my strength\rto take out that cannon.\f
cz: No tak, Nell. \eTahle prace je na\rAndyho moc.\fNa zniceni toho kanonu potrebujes\rnekoho s mou silou.\f

en: Hey! \eI can do this!\f
cz: Hej! \eJa to zvladnu!\f

en: Knock it off, Andy.\e\e\rWar isn't a game.\fYou'll just get hurt.\f
cz: Nech toho, Andy.\e\e\rValka neni hra.\fJen se zranis.\f

en: Max,\e\rI have faith in Andy.\fEven if he's not as powerful as you\rare,\e he can do things no one else can.\fI think this will be a good experience\rfor him, so let's let him handle this.\f
cz: Maxi,\e\rverim Andymu.\fI kdyz neni tak silny jako ty,\r\eumi veci, co nikdo jiny nedokaze.\fMyslim, ze to pro nej bude dobra\rzkusenost, tak ho to nech zvladnout.\f

en: Hmph! \eDon't come cryin' to me if he\rgets hurt!\fYo, Andy!\e\rYou sure you're up for this?\f
cz: Hm! \eNechod za mnou brecet, kdyz\rse zrani!\fHej, Andy!\e\rUrcite na to mas?\f

en: You know it!\e\e\rSit back and watch, Max!\f
cz: Jasna vec!\e\e\rJen se posad a koukej, Maxi!\f

en: Flak!\e Flakalakalakalaaaaaaak!!!\e\rThe Black Cannon's ready to go!\f
cz: Flak!\e Flakalakalakalaaaaaaak!!!\e\rCerny kanon je pripraven!\f

en: Got it. \eThanks, Lash.\e\e\rNow I'll smash 'em good!\f
cz: Jasne. \eDiky, Lash.\e\e\rTed je poradne rozmacknu!\f

en: Don't forget, you promised to be a\rguinea pig in my next experiment!\f
cz: Nezapomen, slibil jsi, ze budes\rpokusny kralik v mem dalsim pokusu!\f

en: Hmmm...\e\rYeah, I remember.\f
cz: Hmmm...\e\rJo, pamatuju si.\f

en: Well, I'm off! \eToodles!\e\e\rHave fun!\fOh, yeah! \eAlmost forgot, \e\eHawke said\rto hurry and conquer Orange Star!\f
cz: Tak ja jdu! \eAhoj!\e\e\rUzij si to!\fAha, jo! \eSkoro zapomnela, \e\eHawke rikal,\rat si pospisis a dobudes Orange Star!\f

en: Hawke said...\fCrush. \eI gotta crush 'em here.\e\e\rI have to...\ecrush 'em all...\f
cz: Hawke rikal...\fRozdrtit. \eMusim je tady rozdrtit.\e\e\rMusim...\eje vsechny rozdrtit...\f

en: Hey!\e What's up with this?\e\rThere are hardly any units deployed!\f
cz: Hej!\e Co to ma byt?\e\rSkoro zadne rozmistene jednotky!\f

en: It's up to you to decide which units\ryou need and where to deploy them.\f
cz: Je na tobe rozhodnout, ktere jednotky\rpotrebujes a kam je rozmistit.\f

en: Deploy them? \eYou mean I have to\rform units as I go along?\f
cz: Rozmistit je? \eChces rict, ze mam\rtvorit jednotky za pochodu?\f

en: That's exactly what I mean.\e See\rthose 2 properties next to your HQ?\f
cz: Presne to mam na mysli.\e Vidis\rty 2 objekty vedle sveho HQ?\f

en: Those are deployment properties\rcalled bases.\fYou can deploy ground\runits from them.\fTo deploy units, select a base\e\rand press the A Button.\f
cz: To jsou vysilaci objekty\rzvane zakladny.\fMuzes z nich vysilat\rpozemni jednotky.\fK vysilani jednotek zvol zakladnu\r\ea stiskni tlacitko A.\f

en: Now, there's a window at the top of\rthe screen, right?\f
cz: Vidis to okno nahore na\robrazovce, ze?\f

en: The 6,000 you see here is the\ramount of funding you have.\f
cz: Tech 6 000, co tu vidis, je\rmnozstvi tvych financi.\f

en: Funds increase depending on the\rnumber of properties you control.\fYou receive 1,000 per property each\rday.\fYou currently have your HQ,\r2 bases, and 3 cities.\fThat amounts to 6,000 in funds.\f
cz: Finance rostou podle poctu\robjektu, ktere ovladas.\fDostavas 1 000 za kazdy objekt\rkazdy den.\fMomentalne mas sve HQ,\r2 zakladny a 3 mesta.\fTo dela dohromady 6 000 financi.\f

en: I get it! \eFunds increase on the day\rafter I capture a new property!\f
cz: Uz to chapu! \eFinance vzrostou den\rpote, co obsadim novy objekt!\f

en: That's exactly right, Andy.\e Then you\ruse that money to deploy more troops.\fSelect a base and press the A\rButton to select the type of unit\fyou want to deploy.\e The number next\rto the unit is its deployment cost.\fRemember, \eunits cannot move on the\rday that they are deployed.\fIn this case...\e Yes, that should work.\fFirst, you need to increase your\rfunds, \eso deploy some infantry or\fmech units and capture some neutral\rproperties.\e Don't forget to use your\fAPCs and T copters to transport\runits to properties farther out, too.\fAs for combat, \eyou've got some room\rto maneuver, \eso I'd advise advancing\fwith tanks and artillery.\fWhen you can afford it, \edeploy some\rmore powerful units, like Md tanks.\fOnce you capture neutral bases,\e\ryou can deploy troops from them.\fOf course,\e the enemy can do the\rsame, so don't dillydally!\fI'll contact you as soon as I have\rany intel on that giant cannon.\fThis may be rough going,\e\rbut do your best!\f
cz: Presne tak, Andy.\e Pak ty penize\rpouzijes k vysilani dalsich jednotek.\fZvol zakladnu a stiskni tlacitko A\rk vyberu typu jednotky, kterou\fchces vyslat.\e Cislo vedle jednotky\rje jeji cena za vyslani.\fPamatuj, \ejednotky se nemohou hybat\rv den, kdy jsou vyslany.\fV tomto pripade...\e Ano, to by melo jit.\fNejdriv musis zvysit sve finance,\r\etak vysli nejakou pechotu nebo\fmechy a obsad nejake neutralni\robjekty.\e Nezapomen pouzit\fsva APC a transportni vrtulniky k\rprevozu jednotek i ke vzdalenejsim objektum.\fCo se boje tyce, \emas trochu prostoru\rk manevrovani, \etak radim postupovat\fs tanky a delostrelectvem.\fAz na to budes mit, \evysli nejake\rsilnejsi jednotky, treba stredni tanky.\fAz obsadis neutralni zakladny,\e\rbudes z nich moci vysilat jednotky.\fSamozrejme,\e nepritel muze udelat\rtotez, tak nezahalej!\fOzvu se ti, jakmile budu mit\rnejake info o tom obrim kanonu.\fMuze to byt drsne,\e\rale dej do toho vsechno!\f

en: Here I go!\e Keep watching, Max!\e\rI'm gonna show you something!\f
cz: Jdu na to!\e Koukej dal, Maxi!\e\rNeco ti predvedu!\f

en: Contact at last.\e\e\rAndy, \eare you OK?\f
cz: Konecne spojeni.\e\e\rAndy, \ejsi v poradku?\f

en: Yeah,...I think so.\f
cz: Jo,...myslim, ze jo.\f

en: Well don't overdo it, all right?\fBy the way, a few of the gray stars\rin the window displaying your funds\fhave changed color, right?\fThat's your CO Power Meter.\e Power\rbuilds up slowly during combat.\fWhen the stars are flashing, \eyour CO\rPower is ready for use.\fTo see intel on CO Powers, \eselect\rCO from the Map menu.\f
cz: Tak to neprehanej, jo?\fMimochodem, par sedych hvezd\rv okne s tvymi financemi\fzmenilo barvu, ze?\fTo je tvuj ukazatel CO sily.\e Sila\rse behem boje pomalu plni.\fKdyz hvezdy blikaji, \eje tva CO\rsila pripravena k pouziti.\fInfo o CO silach zjistis volbou\rCO v menu Mapa.\f

en: I see you've deployed a recon unit.\f
cz: Vidim, ze jsi vyslal pruzkumnika.\f

en: You won't notice here, \ebut recon\runits have large vision ranges.\fThey're invaluable in Fog of War.\fThey also have extended movement\rranges and can take on infantry\fand mech units with decent success.\e\rThey're handy units to have around.\f
cz: Tady si toho nevsimnes, \eale\rpruzkumnici maji velky dohled.\fV Mlze valky jsou nedocenitelni.\fMaji take rozsireny dosah pohybu\ra dokazi si s celkem uspechem\fporadit s pechotou a mechy.\e\rJsou to sikovne jednotky.\f

en: Now you've deployed an A-air unit.\fThey're strong not just against air\runits, \ebut against infantry, too.\f
cz: Ted jsi vyslal protiletadlo.\fJe silne nejen proti letadlum,\r\eale i proti pechote.\f

en: What you've chosen to deploy now\ris a rocket unit.\fIt's an indirect-combat unit with a\rfiring range of 3-5 spaces.\fThat's pretty impressive.\f
cz: To, co jsi se ted rozhodl vyslat,\rjsou rakety.\fJe to jednotka neprimeho boje se\rstreleckym dosahem 3-5 poli.\fTo je docela pusobive.\f

en: So it's like an artillery unit,\e\ronly stronger.\f
cz: Takze je to jako delostrelectvo,\e\rjen silnejsi.\f

en: That's a good way of thinking of it.\fRockets run out of ammo quickly, \eso\rit's a good idea to deploy them on\fsecure properties or near APCs.\f
cz: To je dobry zpusob, jak to brat.\fRaketam rychle dojde munice, \etakze\rje dobre je rozmistovat na\fbezpecne objekty nebo blizko APC.\f

en: OK, \ethat's a missile unit.\e\e\rIt's another indirect-combat unit.\fIt can only attack air units, \e\rbut it has devastating power!\f
cz: Dobre, \eto jsou strely.\e\e\rDalsi jednotka neprimeho boje.\fMuze utocit jen na letadla, \e\rale ma nicivou silu!\f

en: You've deployed a neotank!\fYou know, we only just developed\rthe tech to deploy that unit!\f
cz: Vyslal jsi neotank!\fVis, technologii k vyslani teto\rjednotky jsme vyvinuli teprve ted!\f

en: A neotank?\e\rIt looks tough!\f
cz: Neotank?\e\rVypada drsne!\f

en: Oh, yes.\fYou'll see for yourself, \ebut they're\reven more powerful than Md tanks!\fI'm sure you'll come to depend on them.\fThey're direct-combat units, so just\rdeploy them as you would any tank.\f
cz: Ale ano.\fSam uvidis, \eale jsou jeste\rsilnejsi nez stredni tanky!\fUrcite se na ne budes spolehat.\fJsou to jednotky primeho boje, tak je\rjen vysilej jako kazdy jiny tank.\f

en: All right!\e I'm gonna use 'em\rto break stuff!\f
cz: Bezva!\e Pouziju je k\rniceni veci!\f

en: So? \eIs it ready?\f
cz: Tak co? \eJe to pripravene?\f

en: Hmmm... \eThe cannon?\e\rNope, not yet.\fIt's going to take the rest of the day\rjust getting ready to fire.\f
cz: Hmmm... \eTen kanon?\e\rNe, jeste ne.\fJen priprava na vystrel zabere\rzbytek dne.\f

en: Grrr...\e Is that so? \eGuess I'll\rgo take charge of the battle then.\f
cz: Grr...\e Vazne? \eTak to si asi\rvezmu velet bitve sam.\f

en: OK! \eToodles!\e\rTomorrow's the day! \eTee hee!\f
cz: OK! \eAhoj!\e\rZitra je ten den! \eHi hi!\f

en: Andy!\fI've got some intel on that\rmonstrosity!\fIt's called a Black Cannon.\fIt's supposed to have a huge range of\rfire. \eUse the B Button to check it out.\fThat's just a prototype, though, \eso it\rcan only fire once every 2 days.\fIt's designed to fire on the strongest\runit within range.\fI'll get back to you once I get\rsome intel on its weak points.\f
cz: Andy!\fMam info o te\rzrudnosti!\fJmenuje se Cerny kanon.\fMa mit obrovsky strelecky dosah.\r\ePodivej se na nej tlacitkem B.\fJe to ale jen prototyp, \etakze\rmuze vystrelit jen jednou za 2 dny.\fJe navrzeny strilet na nejsilnejsi\rjednotku v dosahu.\fOzvu se ti, az ziskam info\ro jeho slabinach.\f

en: Understood!\f
cz: Rozumim!\f

en: Yippee!\e\rIt's ready to fire!\fBlack Cannon...\eattack!\e\rTee hee!\f
cz: Hura!\e\rJe pripraven k palbe!\fCerny kanon...\eutoc!\e\rHi hi!\f

en: Andy!\e\rYou're CO Power Meter's full!\f
cz: Andy!\e\rTvuj ukazatel CO sily je plny!\f

en: Huh? \eIt doesn't look full to me!\f
cz: He? \eMne se plny nezda!\f

en: Your Power Meter has two levels: a\rnormal CO Power level\e and a Super\fCO Power level.\e You have enough\renergy now for a normal CO Power.\fYou can use it now \eor wait and\rsave up for a Super CO Power.\fHow you use your CO Powers is\rcompletely up to you.\fThe well-timed use of a CO Power\rcan alter the course of a battle.\fTo use a CO Power, select Power\rfrom the Map menu.\f
cz: Tvuj ukazatel sily ma dve urovne:\rnormalni CO silu\e a Super\fCO silu.\e Ted mas dost\renergie na normalni CO silu.\fMuzes ji pouzit hned \enebo pockat a\rnasporit na Super CO silu.\fJak sve CO sily pouzijes, \eje\rcele na tobe.\fDobre nacasovane pouziti CO sily\rmuze zmenit prubeh bitvy.\fK pouziti CO sily zvol Sila\rv menu Mapa.\f

en: OK! \eTime to show what I can do!\f
cz: OK! \eCas ukazat, co umim!\f

en: Grrr!!\e\rWas that a CO Power?!\fCan't believe that runt has a\rCO Power!\fListen up! \eWe're not lettin' that squid\rthump us! \eNo way, \eno how!\f
cz: Grr!!\e\rTo byla CO sila?!\fNemuzu uverit, ze ten skrcek ma\rCO silu!\fPoslouchejte! \eNenechame se od te\rkrevety zmlatit! \eNikdy, \enikdo!\f

en: Graaaaaa! \eHere I come!!!\e\rEat this!!!\f
cz: Graaaaaa! \eUz jdu!!!\e\rTumas!!!\f

en: Andy, \eI've discovered the\renemy's weak point.\f
cz: Andy, \eobjevila jsem\rnepratelskou slabinu.\f

en: All right!\e Way to go, Nell!\f
cz: Bezva!\e Skvela prace, Nell!\f

en: When you attack the Black Cannon,\e\raim here, \efor the door.\f
cz: Az budes utocit na Cerny kanon,\e\rmir sem, \ena ta dvirka.\f

en: Check the cursor window to see the\runit's HP.\fIf you can take out the Black Cannon,\e\rvictory's yours!\fThat thing surprised me at first,\e\rbut it's nothing to fear now.\fGood luck,\e Andy!\f
cz: V okne kurzoru uvidis\rHP jednotky.\fKdyz znicis Cerny kanon,\e\rvitezstvi je tve!\fZprvu me ta vec prekvapila,\e\rale ted neni ceho se bat.\fHodne stesti,\e Andy!\f

en: No problem! \eI'll take care of it!\f
cz: Zadny problem! \ePostaram se o to!\f

en: Wahoo!\e\rI won! I won!\f
cz: Hura!\e\rVyhral jsem! Vyhral!\f

en: Grrr!\e\e\rNow you've done it, runt!\f
cz: Grr!\e\e\rTeds to dokazal, skrcku!\f

en: I'm no runt!\e\rMy name's Andy!\f
cz: Nejsem zadny skrcek!\e\rJmenuju se Andy!\f

en: Name!?\e I didn't ask for your name!\fArgh! \eI can't lose any more units!\e\rI can't!\fSound the retreat! \e\eHead back to\rbase and regroup!\f
cz: Jmeno!?\e Neptal jsem se na jmeno!\fArgh! \eNesmim ztratit dalsi jednotky!\e\rNesmim!\fK ustupu! \e\eZpet na zakladnu\ra preskupit!\f

en: As long as I'm here,\e you'll\rnever take Orange Star!\f
cz: Dokud jsem tady ja,\e nikdy\rOrange Star nedobudes!\f

en: Yo, Andy...\e\rYou OK?\f
cz: Hej, Andy...\e\rV pohode?\f

en: Max! \eHow was I?\e\rDid you watch the whole thing?\f
cz: Max! \eJak jsem byl?\e\rKoukal jsi na to cele?\f

en: Yeah...\eI watched.\e\e\rThat was a little close.\f
cz: Jo...\ekoukal jsem.\e\e\rBylo to o fous.\f

en: Hey! \eThose tanks back there...\e\e\rAre those your troops, Max?\f
cz: Hej! \eTy tanky tamhle vzadu...\e\e\rTo jsou tve jednotky, Maxi?\f

en: Hm? \eOh, um...\ethose are...\f
cz: Hm? \eAch, ehm...\eto jsou...\f

en: Commander Max! \eWe received your\rorders and moved out at once!\f
cz: Velitel Max! \ePrijali jsme vase\rrozkazy a ihned vyrazili!\f

en: Well, no one ordered you to broadcast\rit to the entire world, soldier!\f
cz: No, nikdo ti neporucil to vytrubovat\rdo celeho sveta, vojaku!\f

en: Hmmm...\f
cz: Hmmm...\f

en: What?!?\fIt's a training exercise!\e\e Gotta check\rthose engines every now and then!\fGeez... \eC'mon, boys. \eLet's go home.\f
cz: Coze?!?\fJe to vycvik!\e\e Obcas se ty\rmotory musi prece zkontrolovat!\fAjaj... \ePojdte, hosi. \eJdeme domu.\f

en: You know, Nell, \eI'm really glad to have\rMax on our side!\f
cz: Vis, Nell, \efakt jsem rad, ze mame\rMaxe na nasi strane!\f

en: So am I, Andy. \eSo am I.\f
cz: Ja taky, Andy. \eJa taky.\f

en: It's too bad, Andy,\e but\ryou were beaten this time.\f
cz: Je to smula, Andy,\e ale\rtentokrat jsi byl porazen.\f

en: Ahh... \eI can try again! \eRight now!\f
cz: Ach... \eMuzu to zkusit znovu! \eHned ted!\f

en: Calm down. \e\eI've got some advice for\ryou, \eand I want you to listen.\fThe Black Cannon attack does make\rthings difficult, but...\fFirst, \euse a T copter to transport a\runit out to that base on the isle.\fWe know that base is outside the\rBlack Cannon's range of fire, right?\fSo, let's capture it! \eNow deploy an\rAPC and load up some infantry.\fNext, \etransport those soldiers to\rthe base near the cannon.\fIt's bold, \ebut it just might work!\fGood luck, Andy. \e\eGet out there and\rshow Max what you can do!\f
cz: Uklidni se. \e\eMam pro tebe radu\r\ea chci, abys poslouchal.\fUtok Cerneho kanonu sice komplikuje\rveci, ale...\fNejdriv \epouzij transportni vrtulnik k\rprevozu jednotky na tu zakladnu na ostrove.\fVime, ze ta zakladna je mimo\rstrelecky dosah Cerneho kanonu, ze?\fTak ji obsadme! \eTed vysli\rAPC a nalozi nejakou pechotu.\fPak \eprevez ty vojaky k\rzakladne blizko kanonu.\fJe to smele, \eale mohlo by to vyjit!\fHodne stesti, Andy. \e\eVyraz tam a\rukaz Maxovi, co umis!\f

en: I did it!\rDid you see that!?
cz: Dokazal jsem to!\rVidels to!?

en: Do you see that?\e\rIt's a Black Hole lab.\fIf this goes well, \ewe might be able\rto seize their new weapon designs.\f
cz: Vidis to?\e\rTo je laborator Black Hole.\fKdyz to dobre dopadne, \emozna ziskame\rjejich nove navrhy zbrani.\f

en: Nell! \eWe're ready to advance!\e\e\rBut...\eshouldn't this be Sami's mission?\f
cz: Nell! \eJsme pripraveni postoupit!\e\e\rAle...\enemela by to byt mise Sami?\f

en: No can do, Andy!\e\e\rI'm still gathering my troops.\fMy last battle left me with a shortage\rof combat-ready soldiers.\fBut, to be honest, \eI'd love to try\rand infiltrate their base by myself.\f
cz: Nejde to, Andy!\e\e\rPorad sbiram sve jednotky.\fMa posledni bitva mi nechala nedostatek\rbojeschopnych vojaku.\fAle upimne, \erada bych zkusila\rinfiltrovat jejich zakladnu sama.\f

en: Do you honestly think that I would\rapprove such recklessness?\f
cz: Opravdu si myslis, ze bych\rtakovou lehkovaznost schvalila?\f

en: It's OK, Sami! \e\eHelping each\rother is what we're all about!\fMy troops are fresh and itching\rto go!\f
cz: To je dobry, Sami! \e\ePomahat si\rnavzajem, o to nam jde!\fMe jednotky jsou cerstve a chtive\rdo akce!\f

en: Let's move out, Andy.\fWe're in Fog of War,\e\rso let's exercise caution.\f
cz: Vyrazme, Andy.\fJsme v Mlze valky,\e\rtakze budme opatrni.\f

en: Fog of War...\e That's where you\rcan't see very far, right?\fIt's tough fighting in this gunk!\f
cz: Mlha valky...\e To je, kdyz\rnevidis moc daleko, ze?\fV tomhle marastu se bojuje tezko!\f

en: Everything will be fine.\e\e It just takes\ra little getting used to is all.\fLet's get started.\f
cz: Vsechno bude v poradku.\e\e Jen si na\rto musis trochu zvyknout.\fPojdme na to.\f

en: Lord Flak!\e\e\rThe Orange Star Army!\f
cz: Pane Flaku!\e\e\rArmada Orange Star!\f

en: What?\e\e\rHow did they find us here?!?\f
cz: Coze?\e\e\rJak nas tady nasli?!?\f

en: I...\eI don't know, sir.\e\e\rMaybe a map fell into their hands?\f
cz: Ja...\eJa nevim, pane.\e\e\rMozna jim padla do rukou mapa?\f

en: Grrrr!\fHow long will it take to erase all\rof the weapon data?\f
cz: Grrrr!\fJak dlouho potrva vymazat vsechna\rdata o zbranich?\f

en: 10... \eNo, we should be able to do\rit if we have 7 days.\f
cz: 10... \eNe, melo by to jit,\rkdyz budeme mit 7 dnu.\f

en: Well, get started!\e\e\rDon't let them get that intel!\f
cz: Tak zacni!\e\e\rNenech je ziskat ta data!\f

en: As I mentioned earlier, this terrain\ris hidden by Fog of War.\fIt prevents units from seeing beyond\rtheir individual vision ranges.\fFor example, \ethe vision range of\rinfantry is 2 spaces, \eso they can\fsee 2 spaces from the space where\rthey're deployed.\fYour own properties are lit up, \ebut\renemy and neutral properties aren't.\f
cz: Jak jsem zminila drive, tento teren\rje skryty Mlhou valky.\fBrani jednotkam videt za jejich\rvlastni dohled.\fNapriklad \edohled pechoty\rjsou 2 pole, \etakze vidi\f2 pole od pole, kde\rje rozmistena.\fTve vlastni objekty jsou osvetlene, \eale\rnepratelske a neutralni ne.\f

en: That's a recon unit.\e\rIts vision range is terrific!\f
cz: To je pruzkumnik.\e\rJeho dohled je skvely!\f

en: With a vision range of 5, \erecon units\rare indispensable in Fog of War.\fThey also have extended movement\rranges and can take on infantry\fand mech units with decent success.\e\rThey're handy units to have around.\f
cz: S dohledem 5 jsou pruzkumnici\rv Mlze valky nepostradatelni.\fMaji take rozsireny dosah pohybu\ra dokazi si s celkem uspechem\fporadit s pechotou a mechy.\e\rJsou to sikovne jednotky.\f

en: I can't see into those woods!\e\rWhat's going on?\f
cz: Nevidim do tech lesu!\e\rCo se deje?\f

en: You can't see into woods even if\rthey're within your vision range.\fThe only way to tell if an enemy unit\ris hiding there is to move to the\fspace next to the woods.\e\rThe same goes for the enemy, too.\fIf you conceal a unit in the woods,\e\rit won't be spotted unless the enemy\fgets right next to it.\f
cz: Do lesu nevidis, ani kdyz\rjsou v dosahu tveho dohledu.\fJediny zpusob, jak poznat, zda se tam\rskryva nepratelska jednotka, je presunout\fse na pole vedle lesa.\e\rTotez plati i pro nepritele.\fKdyz schovas jednotku v lese,\e\rnebude videt, dokud se k ni nepritel\fnedostane primo vedle.\f

en: So, battling in Fog of War's like\ra big game of hide-and-seek!\f
cz: Takze boj v Mlze valky je jako\rvelka hra na schovavanou!\f

en: You know, Andy, \eyou're right. \eIt is.\fYou'll also have to watch out for\rambushes in Fog of War.\fThese occur when you try to move to\ror through a space occupied by an\fenemy unit.\e If this happens, you'll\rstop moving,\e and you won't be able\fto move until the next day.\fThere are lots of ambushes in woods,\e\rso be extra careful.\f
cz: Vis, Andy, \emas pravdu. \eJe.\fV Mlze valky si take budes muset\rdat pozor na prepady.\fTy nastanou, kdyz se snazis presunout\rna pole nebo skrz pole obsazene\fnepratelskou jednotkou.\e Kdyz se to stane,\rzastavis se\e a nebudes se moci\fhybat az do dalsiho dne.\fV lesich je prepadu spousta,\e\rtak bud obzvlast opatrny.\f

en: Got it!\f
cz: Jasne!\f

en: You know how to win, right?\fDestroy all the enemy units, \eor\rcapture the enemy HQ.\fThe foe looks like they're preparing\rto flee, \eso you'd better hurry!\f
cz: Vis, jak vyhrat, ze?\fZnic vsechny nepratelske jednotky, \enebo\robsad nepratelske HQ.\fNepritel se zda chystat na utek,\r\etak radsi pospes!\f

en: Infantry and mech units can do more\rthan just capture, you know.\fThey can increase their vision range\rby climbing mountains!\fSince we have some mountains so\rclose by, you should test it out.\f
cz: Pechota a mechy umi vic\rnez jen obsazovat, vis.\fMohou zvysit svuj dohled\rvystupem na hory!\fKdyz mame nejake hory tak\rblizko, mel bys to vyzkouset.\f

en: Hurry up!\e\e\rWe gotta stop their advance here.\f
cz: Pospeste si!\e\e\rMusime tu zastavit jejich postup.\f

en: Yes, sir.\f
cz: Ano, pane.\f

en: Andy, \eI have some soldiers out\rreconnoitering the field.\f
cz: Andy, \emam vojaky, co prozkoumavaji\rpole.\f

en: According to my reports, \ethere's an\rindirect-combat unit hiding in one of\fthe 3 woods at the top of the map.\f
cz: Podle mych hlaseni se v jednom\rze 3 lesu nahore na mape skryva\fjednotka neprimeho boje.\f

en: Really?\e\rOK, I got it!\e I'll advance carefully.\fThanks a bunch, Sami!\f
cz: Vazne?\e\rDobre, chapu!\e Postoupim opatrne.\fDiky moc, Sami!\f

en: How's the Fog of War?\f
cz: Jak je na tom Mlha valky?\f

en: It really slows things down.\fStrong units are useless if they\rcan't see anything.\fIt's tough if you don't use\rrecon units well.\f
cz: Fakt to vsechno zpomaluje.\fSilne jednotky jsou k nicemu,\rkdyz nic nevidi.\fJe to tezke, kdyz dobre nevyuzivas\rpruzkumniky.\f

en: Understanding that's half the battle!\e\rThe rest comes with experience.\fOh yes, \ethere's something I forgot to\rtell you yesterday.\fIn addition to woods, \ethere's\rone other terrain type that\fconceals units until you're next to it.\f
cz: Pochopit to je pul bitvy!\e\rZbytek prijde se zkusenosti.\fAch ano, \ezapomnela jsem ti vcera\rneco rict.\fKrome lesu existuje \ejeste\rjeden typ terenu, ktery\fskryva jednotky, dokud nejsi vedle nej.\f

en: It's reefs. \eLike this one here.\fIf you're looking to take out all\renemy units, \edon't forget to look here!\f
cz: Jsou to utesy. \eJako tenhle tady.\fKdyz chces sundat vsechny\rnepratelske jednotky, \enezapomen sem mrknout!\f

en: I have some new intel, Andy.\fSomewhere in the woods near the lab\ris another indirect-combat unit.\fIf you suddenly come under fire,\e\rcheck the woods first.\f
cz: Mam nove info, Andy.\fNekde v lese blizko laboratore\rje dalsi jednotka neprimeho boje.\fKdyz se najednou ocitnes pod palbou,\r\enejdriv zkontroluj les.\f

en: Understood!\fCouldn't do this without you, Sami!\e\rI'll try and hold up my end!\f
cz: Rozumim!\fBez tebe bych to nezvladl, Sami!\e\rZkusim splnit svuj dil!\f

en: Lord Flak!\e\rThe preparations are complete!\fWe only need to hold off Orange\rStar for the rest of the day.\fIf we can do that, \ewe'll be able to\rdestroy the new weapon plans!\f
cz: Pane Flaku!\e\rPripravy jsou hotovy!\fStaci jen zadrzet Orange\rStar po zbytek dne.\fKdyz to dokazeme, \ebudeme moci\rznicit nove plany zbrani!\f

en: We gotta sacrifice this lab.\fI don't like it,\e but we\rdon't have a choice.\f
cz: Musime obetovat tuhle laborator.\fNelibi se mi to,\e ale\rnemame na vyber.\f

en: Lord Flak... \e\eThe new weapons plans\rhave been stolen...\f
cz: Pane Flaku... \e\eNove plany zbrani\rbyly ukradeny...\f

en: .........\e\e\rAssemble everyone in the factory.\f
cz: .........\e\e\rShromazdete vsechny v tovarne.\f

en: In the factory...\e\rYes, sir!\f
cz: V tovarne...\e\rAno, pane!\f

en: Blast!\f
cz: Hergot!\f

en: All right!\e\rWe've shut down the enemy lab!\f
cz: Bezva!\e\rVyradili jsme nepratelskou laborator!\f

en: Excellent work, in spite of the\rdifficult conditions.\fWith these plans, \ewe should be able to\rdevelop neotanks of our own.\fI think we'll have more intel on\rthem by the time you deploy them.\fAnyway, \econgratulations!\e\rThis was a great victory.\f
cz: Vyborna prace, navzdory\rtezkym podminkam.\fS temito plany bychom meli umet\rvyvinout vlastni neotanky.\fMyslim, ze o nich budeme mit vic\rinfo, az je vyslete do akce.\fEctkoli, \egratuluji!\e\rTo bylo skvele vitezstvi.\f

en: Sami's intel really helped a lot!\f
cz: Info od Sami fakt hodne pomohlo!\f

en: I just wish I could've done more.\f
cz: Jen kez bych mohla udelat vic.\f

en: The two of you really make a\rgreat team.\fLet's head for home and celebrate!\f
cz: Vy dva fakt tvorite\rskvely tym.\fVyrazme domu a oslavme to!\f

en: Wahoo! \eLet's have a BBQ!\f
cz: Hura! \ePojdme grilovat!\f

en: Oh, no...\e\e\rI got beaten...\f
cz: Ach ne...\e\e\rByl jsem porazen...\f

en: Even if we had just let the enemy\rbe, \ethey would've retreated.\fSo it's hard to call this a loss\rfor Orange Star. \eStill...\fWe were so close to getting those\rweapon plans.\fI think we should rethink our strategy\rand try this battle again!\fIn Fog of War, \ethe order of\radvancement is very important.\fIf you don't increase your vision\rrange, \eeven strong units are useless.\fThat's why it's so important to\rconfirm the location of enemy units\fby using recon units and by sending\rinfantry into the mountains.\fThat's what it takes to win in\rFog of War!\fIt's tough, \ebut I'm certain\ryou can do it!\f
cz: I kdybychom nepritele nechali byt,\r\estejne by ustoupil.\fTakze je tezke tohle nazvat\rporazkou Orange Star. \ePresto...\fByli jsme tak blizko ziskani\rtech planu zbrani.\fMyslim, ze bychom meli prehodnotit\rstrategii a zkusit tu bitvu znovu!\fV Mlze valky je poradi\rpostupu velmi dulezite.\fKdyz nezvysis svuj dohled,\r\ejsou i silne jednotky k nicemu.\fProto je tak dulezite potvrdit\rpolohu nepratelskych jednotek\fpomoci pruzkumniku a vyslanim\rpechoty do hor.\fTo je, co je treba k vitezstvi\rv Mlze valky!\fJe to tezke, \eale jsem si jista,\rze to dokazes!\f

en: I can't wait to try\rout a neotank!
cz: Uz se nemuzu dockat, az\rvyzkousim neotank!

en: They've come at last...\e\rI'll win it all with this factory.\f
cz: Konecne prisli...\e\rS touto tovarnou vyhraju vse.\f

en: You look like you're having a rough\rtime, Flak.\f
cz: Vypadas, ze prochazis tezkym\robdobim, Flaku.\f

en: Huh?\e What rock did you crawl out\rfrom under, Adder?\f
cz: He?\e Zpod jakeho kamene jsi\rvylezl, Addere?\f

en: Heh heh heh... \e\eI wanted to see the\rmilitary strength of this world myself.\f
cz: Che che che... \e\eChtel jsem sam videt\rvojenskou silu tohoto sveta.\f

en: Should you be here? \fI thought you were supposed to be\rinvading Yellow Comet?\f
cz: Mas tu byt? \fMyslel jsem, ze mas\rnapadat Yellow Comet?\f

en: Leave off, Flak. \eYou'd do well not\rto waste your energy on my affairs.\fLook! \eThe natives are knocking on\ryour doorstep...\eand they look restless.\f
cz: Nech toho, Flaku. \eBudes delat dobre,\rkdyz nebudes plytvat energii na me veci.\fHled! \eDomorodci klepou na\rtve dvere...\ea vypadaji neklidne.\f

en: Grrr...\e\rI won't lose.\f
cz: Grr...\e\rNeprohraju.\f

en: "Won't"? \eHeh heh heh...\fYou mustn't lose, Flak. \eThat's\rcloser to the truth.\f
cz: "Neprohraju"? \eChe che che...\fNesmis prohrat, Flaku. \eTo je\rblize pravde.\f

en: I'm looking forward to your\rperformance. \eHeh heh heh...\f
cz: Tesim se na tvuj\rvykon. \eChe che che...\f

en: Whoa!\e\e\rWhat in the world is that?!?\f
cz: Pane!\e\e\rCo to proboha je?!?\f

en: It seems to be some sort of an\rinstallation.\fWhat are they planning now?\f
cz: Zda se to byt nejaky druh\rzarizeni.\fCo ted planuji?\f

en: I believe they call it a factory.\fThis is the center of all the damage\rinflicted upon our forces.\f
cz: Myslim, ze tomu rikaji tovarna.\fTohle je stred vsech skod\rzpusobenych nasim silam.\f

en: So there's no doubt that it's the\rkey to the entire Black Hole invasion!\f
cz: Takze neni pochyb, ze je to\rklic k cele invazi Black Hole!\f

en: Yes, but...\e\rThere's still so much we don't know.\fI've got a spy on the inside,\e\rso I'll let you know if I hear anything.\fIn the meanwhile, \elet's launch some\rsorties and see the enemy's response.\f
cz: Ano, ale...\e\rPorad je toho tolik, co nevime.\fMam uvnitr speha,\e\rtak vam dam vedet, kdyz neco zaslechnu.\fMezitim \eprovedme nejake\rvypady a uvidime reakci nepritele.\f

en: Yes, ma'am!\f
cz: Ano, pani!\f

en: That unit's ready, right?\e\rOpen the factory gate!\f
cz: Ta jednotka je pripravena, ze?\e\rOtevrete branu tovarny!\f

en: Yes, sir.\f
cz: Ano, pane.\f

en: That's no base, \eand yet an enemy unit\rjust came out of it. \eWhat's going on?\f
cz: To neni zakladna, \ea presto z toho\rprave vyjela nepratelska jednotka. \eCo se deje?\f

en: So that's it...\e\rI understand!\f
cz: Tak to je ono...\e\rUz to chapu!\f

en: What is it, Nell?\e\rIs everything OK?\f
cz: Co je, Nell?\e\rJe vsechno v poradku?\f

en: No, it isn't, Max. \eOur army's not the\ronly thing being attacked here.\fThe enemy's been stealing weapons,\rmoney, and other materials, too!\fSomehow, they transport everything\rhere to this factory, then it all\fgoes into that pipe and winds\rup...\esomewhere else.\f
cz: Ne, neni, Maxi. \eNase armada neni\rjedina vec, na kterou se tu utoci.\fNepritel kradl zbrane,\rpenize i jine materialy!\fNejak vsechno prevazeji sem\rdo teto tovarny, pak to vsechno\fjde do te trubky a skonci to...\e\rnekde jinde.\f

en: Black Hole goons... \eThey're even more\rdangerous than we originally thought.\f
cz: Banda Black Hole... \eJsou jeste\rnebezpecnejsi, nez jsme puvodne mysleli.\f

en: Don't worry! \e\eAs long as we're in this\rtogether, there's no way we can lose!\f
cz: Neboj! \e\eDokud jsme v tom\rspolu, nemuzeme prohrat!\f

en: You're right, Andy.\fYou've all made it this far.\e\rI know you'll emerge victorious.\f
cz: Mas pravdu, Andy.\fVsichni jste se dostali az sem.\e\rVim, ze vyjdete jako viteze.\f

en: I've got new intel, troops.\fI don't know what that factory's made\rof, \ebut I do know that we can't\fdamage it with the weapons we\e\rhave here.\f
cz: Mam nove info, vojaci.\fNevim, z ceho je ta tovarna\rvyrobena, \eale vim, ze ji nemuzeme\fposkodit zbranemi, ktere\e\rtu mame.\f

en: Are you serious?\e Well then, how\rare we gonna put it out of business?\f
cz: To myslis vazne?\e Tak jak ji\rteda vyradime z provozu?\f

en: That's the problem at hand.\fThat long pipe is also made of the\rsame impervious substance.\fBut\e take a look over there.\f
cz: To je ten problem.\fTa dlouha trubka je take z\rte same neproniknutelne latky.\fAle\e podivej se tamhle.\f

en: It looks like two separate pieces of\rpipe are connected there...\f
cz: Vypada to, ze tam jsou spojene\rdva oddelene kusy trubky...\f

en: Right. \eThe two pieces appear to be\rbolted together.\f
cz: Presne. \eTy dva kusy se zdaji byt\rsesroubovane k sobe.\f

en: Maybe Md tanks or bombers could\rblast that seam apart...\f
cz: Mozna by stredni tanky nebo bombardery\rmohly ten spoj rozmetat...\f

en: Yes, \eand maybe by breaking the pipe,\rwe can halt their troop production.\fFirst, we should gain control of that\rairport in the center of the map.\fThat should give us an advantage.\fNext, we need to make good use of\ryour CO Powers...\fJust so you know, your Power Meter\rfills faster when you're attacked.\fIt does build up for the attacker, too,\e\rso firing first is never a mistake!\f
cz: Ano, \ea mozna rozbitim trubky\rzastavime jejich vyrobu jednotek.\fNejdriv bychom meli ziskat kontrolu\rnad tim letistem uprostred mapy.\fTo by nam melo dat vyhodu.\fDal musime dobre vyuzit\rtve CO sily...\fAby jsi vedel, tvuj ukazatel sily\rse plni rychleji, kdyz na tebe utoci.\fPlni se i utocnikovi,\e\rtakze strilet prvni neni nikdy chyba!\f

en: OK!\e Now that that's clear, I'm using\rmy CO Power as often as I can!\f
cz: OK!\e Kdyz je to jasne, pouziju\rsvou CO silu, jak casto to jen pujde!\f

en: Lord Flak, \e\eit appears that the foe\rhas discovered the pipe's weak point.\f
cz: Pane Flaku, \e\ezda se, ze nepritel\robjevil slabinu trubky.\f

en: Grrr...\e\e That section may be weak,\e\rbut it's still not easy to destroy.\fEven so, \eif they manage to damage\rthe pipe and halt troop production,\fwe're in deep trouble.\fHit 'em now, \ebefore they're ready!\e\rSmash 'em!\f
cz: Grr...\e\e Ta cast je sice slaba,\e\rale stejne ji neni snadne znicit.\fPresto, \ekdyz se jim podari poskodit\rtrubku a zastavit vyrobu jednotek,\fjsme v hluboke kasi.\fUderte na ne ted, \edriv nez se pripravi!\e\rRozmackneme je!\f

en: Yes, sir!\f
cz: Ano, pane!\f

en: We did it!\fThere'll be no more units\rcoming from that factory!\f
cz: Dokazali jsme to!\fZ te tovarny uz nebudou\rprichazet zadne jednotky!\f

en: Aarrrgh!\e\e\rNooooooo!\f
cz: Aarrrgh!\e\e\rNeeeeeee!\f

en: Give it up, Flak!\e\rYou lose!\f
cz: Vzdej to, Flaku!\e\rProhravas!\f

en: My invasion of Orange Star may\rhave failed, but I'm not alone.\fThere are other Black Hole COs,\e\rwith more armies.\f
cz: Ma invaze do Orange Star mozna\rselhala, ale nejsem sam.\fJsou i jini velitele Black Hole,\e\rs dalsimi armadami.\f

en: What are you saying? \eAre Yellow\rComet and Blue Moon under attack?\f
cz: Co to rikas? \eJsou Yellow\rComet a Blue Moon napadeny?\f

en: Hah! \eYou'll find out soon enough.\fThey'll be coming for you next!\e\rI'm gone.\f
cz: Ha! \eBrzy se to dozvis.\fPrijdou si pro vas dalsi!\e\rMizim.\f

en: Hey! \eWe're not done with you!\e\e\r...\eHe got away again!\fWe can't ignore his warning, can we?\e\rWe've gotta contact the other armies.\f
cz: Hej! \eS tebou jsme jeste neskoncili!\e\e\r...\eZase utekl!\fJeho varovani nemuzeme ignorovat, ze?\e\rMusime kontaktovat ostatni armady.\f

en: Yes. \eYou're right.\e\rLet's ready reinforcements.\fIn truth, though, \eour own Orange Star\rArmy is in pretty ragged shape.\fIf that battle had gone on much\rlonger, materials and morale might\fhave dropped to dangerous levels.\fI can't tell you how grateful I am\rfor all of your aid!\e Nice work!\f
cz: Ano. \eMas pravdu.\e\rPripravme posily.\fAle popravde, \enase vlastni armada\rOrange Star je dost potlucena.\fKdyby ta bitva trvala mnohem\rdele, materialy a morale by mohly\fklesnout na nebezpecnou uroven.\fNemuzu ti rict, jak jsem vdecna\rza vsi vasi pomoc!\e Skvela prace!\f

en: It's all due to your instruction, Nell.\f
cz: To vse diky tvemu vedeni, Nell.\f

en: No,\e it was all of you.\e You made the\rdecisions and performed the deeds.\f
cz: Ne,\e byli jste to vy vsichni.\e Vy jste\rrozhodovali a konali ciny.\f

en: C'mon! \eLet's hurry and check on\rthe other countries!\f
cz: No tak! \ePospesme a zkontrolujme\rostatni zeme!\f

en: Yeah! \eLet's get busy and drive those\rBlack Hole thugs off the planet!\f
cz: Jo! \eDejme se do toho a vyzeneme\rty grazly z Black Hole z planety!\f

en: You said it! \fWe'll knock the stuffing out of 'em,\rthen head home for a victory feast!\f
cz: To rikas spravne! \fVyprasime z nich dusi,\rpak vyrazime domu na vitezne hody!\f

en: I knew the enemy wasn't going to roll\rover and let us win, but still...\fListen! \eWe've made it this far,\e\rand I'm confident that you can win!\fMaybe your first target should be the\rairport...\fBombers would make targeting that\rpipe seam much easier.\fTests of power are Max's forte,\e\rwhile Sami's the best at capturing.\fOf course, Andy's strong overall and\rhas those amazing repair skills.\fDon't forget, trying different COs\ris a vital piece of strategy, too.\fGood luck, everyone!\f
cz: Vedela jsem, ze se nepritel neda\rjen tak porazit, ale presto...\fPoslouchejte! \eDostali jsme se az sem,\e\ra verim, ze muzete vyhrat!\fMozna by vasim prvnim cilem melo\rbyt letiste...\fBombardery by zamereni toho\rspoje trubky hodne usnadnily.\fZkousky sily jsou Maxova silna stranka,\e\rzatimco Sami je nejlepsi v obsazovani.\fSamozrejme, Andy je silny celkove a\rma ty uzasne opravarske schopnosti.\fNezapomente, zkouset ruzne velitele\rje take dulezity dil strategie.\fHodne stesti, vsichni!\f

en: Wahoo!\rI beat the bad guys!
cz: Hura!\rPorazil jsem zlouny!

en: Whew... I wonder how\rour allies are doing.\r
cz: Uf... Zajima me, jak\rse vede nasim spojencum.\r

en: Take that!\rOrange Star is free!!!
cz: Tumas!\rOrange Star je svobodny!!!

en: Hey, Sami! \eNell said you\rneeded to see us!\f
cz: Cau, Sami! \eNell rikala, ze\rnas potrebujes videt!\f

en: Ah, Andy! \eMax!\e\e\rThanks for coming so quickly.\fYou're not going to believe this,\e\rbut the Black Hole Army's back!\f
cz: Ach, Andy! \eMax!\e\e\rDiky, ze jste prisli tak rychle.\fNebudete tomu verit,\e\rale armada Black Hole je zpet!\f

en: You've got to be kidding!\fDidn't they learn their lesson\rthe last time?\f
cz: To snad delas srandu!\fNedostali snad ponauceni\rminule?\f

en: I guess not... \eLet's go get 'em!\e\e\rUm...\e Where are they?\f
cz: Asi ne... \eJdeme po nich!\e\e\rEhm...\e Kde jsou?\f

en: Slow down, Andy.\e\rThe enemy's not here in Cosmo Land.\f
cz: Zpomal, Andy.\e\rNepritel neni tady v Cosmo Land.\f

en: Huh?\e\e\rWell, where are they?\f
cz: He?\e\e\rTak kde teda jsou?\f

en: In our world... \eIn Wars World,\e\rthere are several continents, right?\f
cz: V nasem svete... \eVe Wars World,\e\rje nekolik kontinentu, ze?\f

en: Really? \eContinents?\f
cz: Vazne? \eKontinenty?\f

en: You twerp! \eYou don't know\ranything, do you?\f
cz: Ty trumbero! \eTy nevis\rvubec nic, vid?\f

en: Heeeey... \eYou're not...\ecalling me\rdumb, are you?\f
cz: Hejjjj... \eTy mi ted...\enerikas\rpitomec, ze ne?\f

en: I'm just saying that people who don't\rknow anything...\edon't know nothin'!\f
cz: Jen rikam, ze lide, co nevedi\rnic...\enevedi vubec nic!\f

en: Knock it off, you two! \eThis is neither\rthe time nor the place for that!\fAccording to Nell, Macro Land is the\rfocus of the conflict, but\fthey've been spotted in other countries,\rtoo! \eIncluding here in Orange Star!\f
cz: Nechte toho, vy dva! \eTohle neni\rcas ani misto na tohle!\fPodle Nell je Macro Land\rohniskem konfliktu, ale\fbyli spatreni i v jinych zemich!\r\eVcetne tady v Orange Star!\f

en: And Blue Moon \eand Yellow Comet?\f
cz: A Blue Moon \ea Yellow Comet?\f

en: Yep! \eAnd Green Earth, as well.\fI wonder if they're mobilizing to\rpush the Black Hole Army back, too.\f
cz: Jo! \eA Green Earth take.\fZajima me, jestli se take mobilizuji\rk zatlaceni armady Black Hole.\f

en: Woohoo!!!\e\e\rIt'll be like a family reunion!\f
cz: Hurraa!!!\e\e\rBude to jako rodinne setkani!\f

en: Andy! \eThis is war! \e\eDo you think\rthat's anything to be excited about?\f
cz: Andy! \eTohle je valka! \e\eMyslis, ze\rje na tom neco k radosti?\f

en: No, but...\ewe'll get to see everyone\ragain, and that makes me happy!\fC'mon, \elet's go!\f
cz: Ne, ale...\euvidime zase vsechny,\ra to me tesi!\fNo tak, \epojdme!\f

en: Hold on, Andy. \eAndy?\e\e\rHe's gone... \eOh...\f
cz: Pockej, Andy. \eAndy?\e\e\rUz je pryc... \eAch...\f

en: Well, we all gotta go sometime, right?\fAt least he's got the right attitude.\fNo sense getting all bummed out\rbefore the battle even begins.\f
cz: No, jednou musime vsichni jit, ze?\fAspon ma spravny postoj.\fNema smysl byt na dne,\rnez bitva vubec zacne.\f

en: You know...\e It's been so peaceful\raround here lately...\fI just know Nell is going to want\rto give us all a little refresher\fcourse on basic combat ops.\fBut that's fine...\e After all, you\rcan never have too much training!\f
cz: Vis...\e V posledni dobe je tady\rtak klid...\fProste vim, ze nam Nell bude chtit\rdat vsem maly opakovaci\fkurz zakladnich bojovych operaci.\fAle to je v pohode...\e Konec koncu,\rvycviku neni nikdy dost!\f

en: Oh, great.\e\e Just what I wanted...\rAnother boring lecture.\f
cz: No bezva.\e\e Presne, co jsem chtela...\rDalsi nudna prednaska.\f

en: Commander, \eenemy troops have been\rspotted on the far side of the river.\f
cz: Veliteli, \enepratelske jednotky byly\rspatreny na druhem brehu reky.\f

en: Are you sure?!?\e\e\rHere? In this rural area?\f
cz: Jsi si jisty?!?\e\e\rTady? V tehle pustine?\f

en: What are your orders, ma'am?\e\e\rShould we cease ops and attack?\f
cz: Jake jsou vase rozkazy, pani?\e\e\rMame prerusit operace a utocit?\f

en: That's affirmative, soldier.\fWe can't allow the enemy a foothold\rthis deep in Orange Star territory.\f
cz: Potvrzuji, vojaku.\fNemuzeme nepriteli dovolit oporu\rtak hluboko na uzemi Orange Star.\f

en: Good assessment, Sami!\fThat's the tactical sense I expect\rfrom a special-forces commander!\f
cz: Dobre vyhodnoceni, Sami!\fTo je takticky cit, jaky cekam\rod velitele specialnich sil!\f

en: Nell!\e\e\rWhat are you doing here?\f
cz: Nell!\e\e\rCo tady delas?\f

en: Tracking down the CO who's\rinvading Orange Star, of course!\fSami, \ecan I trust you to take\rcare of this situation?\f
cz: Stopuji velitele, ktery\rnapada Orange Star, samozrejme!\fSami, \emuzu ti verit, ze se\rpostaras o tuhle situaci?\f

en: Yes, ma'am!\e\e\rI won't let you down!\f
cz: Ano, pani!\e\e\rNezklamu vas!\f

en: Lord Flak! \e\eOrange Star forces\rsighted on the opposite shore...\f
cz: Pane Flaku! \e\eSily Orange Star\rspatreny na protejsim brehu...\f

en: What?!?\e\e\rIs that all they got!? \eHah!\fSend out the tanks!\e\e\rWe'll crush 'em!\f
cz: Coze?!?\e\e\rTo je vsechno, co maji!? \eHa!\fVyslete tanky!\e\e\rRozdrtime je!\f

en: Grrr...\e\e\rNot bad...\efor a girl.\f
cz: Grr...\e\e\rNeni to spatne...\ena holku.\f

en: You're the Black Hole CO, right?\fWho do you think you are?\e\e\rWhat're you doing in--?\f
cz: Ty jsi velitel Black Hole, ze?\fKdo si myslis, ze jsi?\e\e\rCo to tady--?\f

en: Yap, yap, yap! \eShut your trap!\fI'm leaving \efor now...\e\e\rNext time, \eI'll put you in your place.\f
cz: Zveh, zveh, zveh! \eDrz hubu!\fProzatim mizim \e...\e\e\rPriste \ete srovnam do laty.\f

en: Hey!\f
cz: Hej!\f

en: He's escaped...\e\e\rAnd he was so rude, too!\f
cz: Utekl...\e\e\rA byl tak drzy!\f

en: Oooh!!\e\e\rThat makes me so angry!\fIf I get the chance, I'm gonna\rrun him down!\f
cz: Och!!\e\e\rTo me tak rozciluje!\fKdyz dostanu sanci,\rdohonim ho!\f

en: I'm glad we can count on you, Sami.\f
cz: Jsem rada, ze se na tebe muzeme spolehnout, Sami.\f

en: That big thug! He won't\rget away next time!
cz: Ten velky grazl! Priste\rmi neunikne!

en: How disappointing.\e\rYou were defeated.\fLet me give you some advice.\e\rUse the cities on the left to ambush\fyour foes and halt their advance.\fIt's vital to have your indirect attack\runits lay down cover fire and\fto use the cities below to rest\ryour troops and let them recover.\fThis Fog of War limits your visual\rrange, so exercise caution when\fdeploying.\fDon't forget, your infantry can\rcross rivers! That's important.\f
cz: Jak zklamani.\e\rByla jsi porazena.\fDovol mi dat ti radu.\e\rPouzij mesta vlevo k prepadeni\fsvych neprtel a zastaveni jejich postupu.\fJe zasadni nechat sve jednotky\rneprimeho utoku poskytovat krytou palbu a\fpouzivat mesta dole k odpocinku\rsvych jednotek a jejich zotaveni.\fTato Mlha valky omezuje tvuj\rdohled, tak bud opatrna pri\frozmistovani.\fNezapomen, tva pechota umi\rprekracovat reky! To je dulezite.\f

en: Understood... \eMy apologies, ma'am.\f
cz: Rozumim... \eOmlouvam se, pani.\f

en: Sami, \eI know you won't make the same\rmistake twice. \eYou'll win next time!\f
cz: Sami, \evim, ze stejnou chybu\rdvakrat neudelas. \ePriste vyhrajes!\f

en: Hey!\eOrange Star dogs!\e\e\rCan you hear me?\f
cz: Hej!\ePsi z Orange Star!\e\e\rSlysite me?\f

en: Um... Lord Flak...\e\rThe microphone?\f
cz: Ehm... Pane Flaku...\e\rTen mikrofon?\f

en: Shut up!\e\e\rToo complicated.\fAnyone there?\e\e\rOr are you too scared to face me?!?\f
cz: Drz hubu!\e\e\rPrilis slozite.\fJe tam nekdo?\e\e\rNebo se me bojite postavit?!?\f

en: What's with the racket?\e\e\rYou lonely or something?\f
cz: Co je to za randal?\e\e\rJsi osamely nebo co?\f

en: Hah! \eLook! A gorilla!\f
cz: Ha! \eHele! Gorila!\f

en: What did you say?!?\fIf anyone here's a gorilla,\e\rit's you, ape-man!\f
cz: Cos to rekl?!?\fJestli je tady nekdo gorila,\e\rtak ty, opicaku!\f

en: I'm no ape!\e\e\rI'm Flak!!!\f
cz: Nejsem opice!\e\e\rJsem Flak!!!\f

en: Flak? \e\eWhat's that?\e\rSome sort of code name?\fListen up, Flak.\e\rMy name's Max.\fNow tell me what you jerks are doin'\rrampaging through our country?\f
cz: Flak? \e\eCo to je?\e\rNejaky kryci jmeno?\fPoslouchej, Flaku.\e\rJmenuju se Max.\fTak mi rekni, co vy blbci delate,\rkdyz rabujete nasi zemi?\f

en: YOUR country?\fOrange Star belongs to the Black\rHole Army now!\fYou complain, you get hurt!\f
cz: VASI zemi?\fOrange Star ted patri armade\rBlack Hole!\fBudes si stezovat, ublizime ti!\f

en: You think so?!?\e\e\rGive it your best shot!\f
cz: Myslis?!?\e\e\rDej do toho vsechno!\f

en: Max! \eCalm down.\f
cz: Max! \eUklidni se.\f

en: Nell?!?\f
cz: Nell?!?\f

en: To lose your head is to lose the fight.\e\e\rI taught you that, remember?\f
cz: Ztratit hlavu znamena prohrat boj.\e\e\rTo jsem te ucila, pamatujes?\f

en: Yes, \ebut...I...\e\e\rIt's just...\f
cz: Ano, \eale...ja...\e\e\rJen je to...\f

en: I understand your anger, Max.\e No one\rlikes seeing his homeland ravaged.\fAll the more reason to proceed calmly\rand rationally.\fUse your head, \eand drive these\rfiends from our borders! \eOK?\f
cz: Chapu tvuj hnev, Maxi.\e Nikdo\rnerad vidi svou vlast pleneny.\fO duvod vic postupovat klidne\ra rozumne.\fPouzij hlavu, \ea vyzen tyhle\rdablya z nasich hranic! \eDobre?\f

en: You got it! \eLet's roll!\f
cz: Jasna vec! \eJdeme na to!\f

en: How's that, ape-man?!?\e\e\rTold you not to mess with me!\f
cz: Jak je libo, opicaku?!?\e\e\rRikal jsem, at si na me nezacinas!\f

en: ...\eHah!\f
cz: ...\eHa!\f

en: Hah? \eDon't hah me!\e\e\rYou just got beaten!\f
cz: Ha? \eZadne ha!\e\e\rPrave jsi prohral!\f

en: This was just a test.\e\e\rNext time is for real.\f
cz: Tohle byla jen zkouska.\e\e\rPriste to bude doopravdy.\f

en: Like I've never heard that before!\fI'm gonna make you regret ever\rshowing your ugly mug around here!\f
cz: Jako bych to uz nikdy neslysel!\fJeste budes litovat, zes sem\rstrcil tu svou osklivou hubu!\f

en: Max, or whatever you said your\rname was, \eyou're mine!\fBefore this is over, \eI'll crush\ryou like a bug. \e\eSo long.\f
cz: Maxi, nebo jaks rikal, ze se\rjmenujes, \etebe dostanu!\fNez tohle skonci, \erozdrtim te\rjak brouka. \e\eMej se.\f

en: Wait! \eWait, you dirtbag!\e\e\rShoot! \eHe got away!\f
cz: Pockej! \ePockej, ty spinavce!\e\e\rSakra! \eUtekl mi!\f

en: Flak, huh? Dumb\rname, tough CO.
cz: Flak, jo? Blbe\rjmeno, tvrdy CO.

en: NO! \eI lost...\e\e\rI'm sorry, everyone...\f
cz: NE! \eProhral jsem...\e\e\rOmlouvam se vsem...\f

en: Cheer up, Max. \e\eYou'll just have to do\rbetter next time.\fThat laser's the problem, isn't it?\r\eYou have to control the port or\fcity next to it and destroy it ASAP.\fStopping the enemy around the bridge\rabove the laser would probably be\freasonably sound tactics.\fOf course, you could always use a\rlander unit to ferry troops over\fand capture the enemy HQ, too.\r\eIt IS unguarded, after all.\f
cz: Hlavu vzhuru, Maxi. \e\ePriste si\rproste povedes lepe.\fTen laser je problem, vid?\r\eMusis ovladnout pristav nebo\fmesto vedle nej a hned ho znicit.\fZastavit nepritele u mostu nad\rlaserem by asi byla docela\frozumna taktika.\fSamozrejme muzes vzdy pouzit\rvysadkovou lod na prevoz vojsk\fa obsadit i nepratelske HQ.\r\eVzdyt JE bez ochrany.\f

en: What a disgrace...\e\rI won't lose again! \eI promise, Nell!\f
cz: Jaka ostuda...\e\rUz neprohraji! \eSlibuji, Nell!\f

en: That's the spirit, Max!\e\rGood luck!\f
cz: To je ono, Maxi!\e\rHodne stesti!\f

en: Pardon me, ma'am,\e\rCommander Andy's arrived.\f
cz: Prominte, pani,\e\rprisel velitel Andy.\f

en: Thank you.\e\e\rSend him in.\f
cz: Dekuji.\e\e\rPosli ho dovnitr.\f

en: Nell,\e\rhow're things looking?\f
cz: Nell,\e\rjak to vypada?\f

en: That's what concerns me...\e\rDo you see that giant cannon?\f
cz: To me prave znepokojuje...\e\rVidis ten obri kanon?\f

en: Wow! \eIt's huge!\e\rI've never seen anything like it!\f
cz: Pane! \eJe obrovsky!\e\rTakovy jsem jeste nevidel!\f

en: A cannon that size is a first\rfor me, too.\fThe Black Hole Army... \eIt's a bigger\rthreat than it was last time we fought.\f
cz: Kanon tehle velikosti vidim\ttake poprve.\fArmada Black Hole... \eJe to vetsi\rhrozba nez minule, kdyz jsme bojovali.\f

en: You got that right!\e\e\rNell, \elet me take care of this.\f
cz: To je svata pravda!\e\e\rNell, \enech to na mne.\f

en: Max?\e\rWhat are you doing here?\f
cz: Max?\e\rCo tady delas?\f

en: C'mon, Nell. \eThis job's too much\rfor Andy.\fYou need someone with my strength\rto take out that cannon.\f
cz: No tak, Nell. \eTohle je na Andyho\rmoc.\fNa zniceni toho kanonu potrebujes\rnekoho s mou silou.\f

en: Hey! \eI can do this!\f
cz: Hej! \eJa to zvladnu!\f

en: Knock it off, Andy.\e\e\rWar isn't a game.\fYou'll just get hurt.\f
cz: Nech toho, Andy.\e\e\rValka neni hra.\fJen se zranis.\f

en: Max,\e\rI have faith in Andy.\fHe might not be as powerful as you,\e\rbut he can do things no one else can.\fI think this will be a good experience\rfor him, so let's let him handle this.\f
cz: Maxi,\e\rverim Andymu.\fMozna neni tak silny jako ty,\e\rale dokaze veci, co nikdo jiny.\fMyslim, ze to pro nej bude dobra\rzkusenost, tak ho to nechme zvladnout.\f

en: Hmph! \eDon't come cryin' to me if he\rgets hurt!\fYo, Andy!\e\rYou sure you're up for this?\f
cz: Hmf! \eAt mi pak nebrecis, kdyz se\rzrani!\fHej, Andy!\e\rUrcite na to mas?\f

en: You know it!\e\e\rSit back and watch, Max!\f
cz: Jasne, ze jo!\e\e\rSedni si a koukej, Maxi!\f

en: Flak, \ethe Black Cannon's up and\rready to go.\f
cz: Flak, \eBlack Cannon je nabity a\rpripraveny.\f

en: Got it. \eThanks, Lash.\e\e\rNow I'll smash 'em good!\f
cz: Jasne. \eDiky, Lash.\e\e\rTed je poradne rozdrtim!\f

en: Don't forget, you promised to be a\rguinea pig in my next experiment!\f
cz: Nezapomen, slibil jsi, ze budes\rpokusny kralik v mem dalsim pokusu!\f

en: Hmmm...\e\rYeah, I remember.\f
cz: Hmmm...\e\rJo, pamatuju.\f

en: Well, I'm off! \eToodles!\e\e\rHave fun!\fOh, yeah! \eAlmost forgot, \e\eHawke said\rto hurry and conquer Orange Star!\f
cz: Tak ja jdu! \ePapa!\e\e\rUzij si to!\fAha, jo! \eSkoro bych zapomnela, \e\eHawke\rrekl, at honem dobyjes Orange Star!\f

en: Hawke said...\fCrush. \eSo I'm gonna crush 'em here.\e\e\rNo mistakes... \eI'll crush 'em all...\f
cz: Hawke rekl...\fRozdrt. \eTak je tady rozdrtim.\e\e\rZadne chyby... \eVsechny rozdrtim...\f

en: Commander! \eWe discovered this in\ra city we captured.\f
cz: Veliteli! \eToto jsme nasli v\rmeste, ktere jsme obsadili.\f

en: Huh? \eWhat's this?\fIt looks like a map to a lab...\e\e\rIs this lab hidden in some city?\f
cz: Co? \eCo to je?\fVypada to jako mapa k laboratori...\e\e\rJe ta laborator ukryta v nejakem meste?\f

en: I do recall that Commander Sami was\rdiscussing plans to attack a lab.\f
cz: Vzpominam si, ze velitelka Sami\rmluvila o planech zautocit na laborator.\f

en: Oh, \eI did hear something about that!\e\e\rSome new Black Hole weapon thingy...\fAnd that there might be hints to it\rhidden in our neighboring countries.\f
cz: Aha, \eo tom jsem neco slysel!\e\e\rNejaka nova zbran Black Hole...\fA ze by k ni mohly byt stopy\rukryte v sousednich zemich.\f

en: That's correct. \eShall I deploy some\rinfantry to follow up?\f
cz: Spravne. \eMam vyslat nejakou\rpechotu, at to provedeme?\f

en: No... \eJust send her the intel!\e\e\rSami can take things from there.\fIf we don't take care of business\rhere, we'll never live it down!\f
cz: Ne... \eJen ji posli ty informace!\e\e\rSami to odtud prevezme.\fKdyz se nepostarame o veci tady,\rnikdy si to neodpustime!\f

en: Understood!\e\rWe'll proceed as ordered, sir!\f
cz: Rozumim!\e\rBudeme pokracovat dle rozkazu, pane!\f

en: Good! \e\eLet's show those creeps who\rthey're messing with!\f
cz: Dobre! \e\eUkazme tem hajzlum, s kym\rsi to zacali!\f

en: Wahoo!\e\e\rI won! I won!\f
cz: Juchu!\e\e\rVyhral jsem! Vyhral!\f

en: Grrr!\e\e\rNow you've done it, runt!\f
cz: Grrr!\e\e\rTeds to dokazal, trpasliku!\f

en: I'm no runt!\e\rI'm Andy!\f
cz: Nejsem trpaslik!\e\rJsem Andy!\f

en: NAME?\e I didn't ask for your name!\fArgh! \eI can't lose anymore! \eI can't!\fSound the retreat! \e\eHead back to\rbase and regroup!\f
cz: JMENO?\e Na jmeno jsem se neptal!\fArgh! \eUz nesmim prohrat! \eNesmim!\fTrubte na ustup! \e\eZpet na\rzakladnu a preskupit!\f

en: As long as I'm here,\e\ryou'll never get through!\f
cz: Dokud jsem tady,\e\rnikdy se nedostanes dal!\f

en: Yo, Andy...\e\rYou OK?\f
cz: Hej, Andy...\e\rJsi v pohode?\f

en: Max! \eHow was I?\e\rDid you watch the whole thing?\f
cz: Maxi! \eJaky jsem byl?\e\rDival ses na to cele?\f

en: Yeah...\eI watched.\e\e\rThat was a little close.\f
cz: Jo...\eDival jsem se.\e\e\rBylo to o fous.\f

en: Hey! \eThose tanks back there...\e\e\rAre those your troops, Max?\f
cz: Hej! \eTy tanky tamhle vzadu...\e\e\rTo jsou tvoje vojska, Maxi?\f

en: Hm? \eOh, um...\ethose are...\f
cz: Hm? \eAch, no...\eto jsou...\f

en: Commander Max! \eWe received your\rorders and moved out at once!\f
cz: Veliteli Maxi! \eDostali jsme vase\rrozkazy a hned vyrazili!\f

en: Well, no one ordered you to broadcast\rit to the entire world, soldier!\f
cz: No, nikdo ti nerikal, abys to\rhlasil celemu svetu, vojaku!\f

en: Hmmm...\f
cz: Hmmm...\f

en: What?!?\fIt's a training exercise!\e\e Gotta check\rthose engines every now and then!\fGeez... \eC'mon, boys. \eLet's go home.\f
cz: Coze?!?\fTo je vycvik!\e\e Obcas se musi\rprekontrolovat motory!\fJej... \eTak pojdte, hosi. \eJdeme domu.\f

en: You know, Nell, \eI'm really glad to have\rMax on our side!\f
cz: Vis, Nell, \eopravdu jsem rad, ze mame\rMaxe na nasi strane!\f

en: So am I, Andy. \eSo am I.\f
cz: Ja taky, Andy. \eJa taky.\f

en: I did it!!!\rDid you see that?!?
cz: Dokazal jsem to!!!\rVidels to?!?

en: It's too bad, Andy,\e but\ryou were beaten this time.\f
cz: To je smula, Andy,\e ale\rtentokrat jsi prohral.\f

en: Ahh... \eLet me try again! \eRight now!\f
cz: Ach... \eNech me to zkusit znovu! \eHned ted!\f

en: Calm down. \e\eI've got some advice for\ryou, \eand I want you to listen.\fIt's tough facing both the Black\rCannon and the mini-cannons, too.\fHowever, \efocusing only on the\rmini-cannon in front of you\fexposes you to attack.\fOne tactic is to send quick units\rbetween the mini-cannons to\fsuppress and capture the factory.\fBut first, you need to shut down\renemy deployment capabilites.\fGood luck, Andy. \e\eGet out there and\rshow Max what you can do!\f
cz: Uklidni se. \e\eMam pro tebe par\rrad, \ea chci, abys poslouchal.\fJe tezke celit zaroven Black\rCannonu i mini-kanonum.\fJenze \esoustredit se jen na\rmini-kanon pred sebou\rte vystavi utoku.\fJedna taktika je poslat rychle\rjednotky mezi mini-kanony, aby\rpotlacily a obsadily tovarnu.\fNejdriv ale musis vyradit\rnepratelskou schopnost nasazovat.\fHodne stesti, Andy. \e\eBez tam a\rukaz Maxovi, co dokazes!\f

en: Mistress Lash, \ewe have reports that\rOrange Star is closing on our position.\f
cz: Pani Lash, \emame hlaseni, ze\rOrange Star se bliz k nasi pozici.\f

en: Hmmm...\f
cz: Hmmm...\f

en: What would you like us to do?\f
cz: Co mame podle vas delat?\f

en: Just go and \eengage them or something.\f
cz: Proste jdete a \enejak je zamestnejte.\f

en: Engage them...\eor something?\f
cz: Zamestnat je...\enejak?\f

en: Uh, yeah. \e\eI'm a little busy researching\rmy latest invention right now. \eDuh!\fOnce this is finished, \eI'll bathe\rall of Orange Star in a sea of fire...\fOooh! \eI love new toys!\f
cz: No, jo. \e\eTed mam trochu prace s\rbadanim na svem novem vynalezu. \eHele!\fAz to dokoncim, \eutopim cely\rOrange Star v mori ohne...\fJuu! \eMiluju nove hracky!\f

en: Um...\e That is... \e\eI'm not\e\rsure we can do this on our own.\f
cz: Hm...\e Totiz... \e\eNejsem si\e\rjisty, ze to zvladneme sami.\f

en: Ah! \eYou're hopeless! \e\e\rFine! Let's get this over with!\f
cz: Ach! \eJste beznadejni! \e\e\rFajn! Tak to mame za sebou!\f

en: The Black Hole HQ is located in those\rmountains, isn't it?\f
cz: HQ Black Hole je v tech\rhorach, vid?\f

en: That's correct. \e\eIt seems that Lash is\rworking on another destructive device.\f
cz: Spravne. \e\eZda se, ze Lash pracuje\rna dalsim nicivem zarizeni.\f

en: So, \ewe need to launch an assault,\rcapture their HQ, and shut her down.\fIf all goes well, we might get some\rintel on Black Hole's forces, too.\f
cz: Takze \emusime zautocit,\robsadit jejich HQ a zastavit ji.\fKdyz to pujde dobre, mozna ziskame\ri informace o silach Black Hole.\f

en: Being able to move in the mountains\e\ris key to making this work.\f
cz: Schopnost pohybu v horach\e\rje klicem k uspechu.\f

en: Which is why you chose me for this\rmission.\e I understand.\f
cz: Proto jste pro tuto misi vybrala\rprave mne.\e Rozumim.\f

en: We have reports of Black Cannons\rand missile silos in the mountains, too.\fThis isn't going to be a walk\rin the park, Sami. \e\eBe careful!\f
cz: Mame hlaseni o Black Cannonech\ra raketovych silech v horach.\fNebude to zadna prochazka\rruzovym sadem, Sami. \e\eBud opatrna!\f

en: I will. \eYou can count on me!\f
cz: Budu. \eMuzete na me spolehnout!\f

en: Pfeh! \eNo big deal. \e\eIt's not like this\ris our only hidden base!\fToodles! Hee hee hee...\f
cz: Pche! \eO nic nejde. \e\eVzdyt tohle\rneni nase jedina skryta zakladna!\fPapa! Chi chi chi...\f

en: Anything to report, Sami?\f
cz: Mas neco k hlaseni, Sami?\f

en: No sign of any of Lash's files yet.\f
cz: Zatim ani stopa po Lashinych\rdatech.\f

en: Oh...\f
cz: Ach...\f

en: They're thorough, I'll give them that.\fHardly any time to evacuate,\e but they\rstill managed to destroy her notes.\f
cz: Jsou dukladni, to jim musim nechat.\fSotva stihli evakuaci,\e a presto\rstihli znicit jeji poznamky.\f

en: Well, \e\eI'm sure we'll have more chances\rto gather intel in the future.\fWe captured an enemy HQ today,\e\rand that's good work.\f
cz: No, \e\eurcite budeme mit dalsi sance\rziskat informace v budoucnu.\fDnes jsme obsadili nepratelske HQ,\e\ra to je dobra prace.\f

en: You're right. \eThere's still a lot of\rground to cover...\fWe need to move ahead base by base\e\rand ensure that we take 'em all!\f
cz: Mate pravdu. \eJeste je toho hodne\rco pokryt...\fMusime postupovat zakladnu po zakladne\e\ra zajistit, ze je vsechny vezmeme!\f

en: This is just the\rbeginning!
cz: Tohle je teprve\rzacatek!

en: Sami! \eAre you OK?\f
cz: Sami! \eJsi v poradku?\f

en: I'm sorry, Nell.\e\e\rYou believed in me, \eand I let you down.\f
cz: Promin, Nell.\e\e\rVerila jsi mi, \ea ja te zklamala.\f

en: Yes, I believed in you. \e\eAnd I\rstill do. \eYou can do this, Sami.\fUp and at 'em, soldier.\e\e\rWe've got some planning to do!\fFirst and foremost, we need to take\rthose factories at the top of the map.\f
cz: Ano, verila jsem ti. \e\eA stale\rverim. \eTy to zvladnes, Sami.\fVzhuru na ne, vojaku.\e\e\rCeka nas planovani!\fPredevsim musime obsadit ty\rtovarny na vrcholu mapy.\f

en: Yes, I agree.\fDeploying rocket units here would make\rtaking out the Black Cannons easier.\f
cz: Ano, souhlasim.\fNasazeni raketovych jednotek by tady\rusnadnilo zniceni Black Cannonu.\f

en: Missile silos are useless against\rthe Black Cannons, \eso just\fignore them.\fMountains impede vehicle movement,\e\rso utilizing your superior infantry\funits is your best strategy.\fGet your troops over those mountains,\e\e\rand hit 'em hard! \eGood luck, Sami!\f
cz: Raketova sila jsou proti Black\rCannonum k nicemu, \etak je\fproste ignoruj.\fHory brani pohybu vozidel,\e\rtakze nejlepsi strategie je\rvyuzit tvou skvelou pechotu.\fDostan vojska pres ty hory,\e\e\ra uder na ne tvrde! \eHodne stesti, Sami!\f

en: Commander, \ewe've received a letter\rfrom the enemy.\f
cz: Veliteli, \edostali jsme dopis\rod nepritele.\f

en: Addressed to me?\e\e\rI wonder what it says...\f
cz: Adresovany mne?\e\e\rCo v nem asi je...\f

en: Sir?\e\e\rWhat does it say?\f
cz: Pane?\e\e\rCo se v nem pise?\f

en: It's a challenge.\fIt says, "If you're not a coward, you'll\rcome to the coordinates on this map."\f
cz: Je to vyzva.\fStoji v nem: "Pokud nejsi zbabelec,\rprijdes na souradnice na teto mape."\f

en: What are your orders, sir?\f
cz: Jaky je vas rozkaz, pane?\f

en: We're moving out, of course!\fYou think I'm scared of Black Hole?\e\rNot a chance!\f
cz: Vyrazime, samozrejme!\fMyslis, ze se bojim Black Hole?\e\rAni nahodou!\f

en: So, \ethis is the place...\f
cz: Takze \etohle je to misto...\f

en: That it is, \eAndy.\f
cz: Presne tak, \eAndy.\f

en: Hey! \eWho are you supposed to be?\f
cz: Hej! \eKdo jsi vlastne ty?\f

en: I am Hawke.\e\e\rA Black Hole CO.\f
cz: Jsem Hawke.\e\e\rCO Black Hole.\f

en: Why did you send that letter\rto me?\f
cz: Proc jsi mi poslal\rten dopis?\f

en: I wanted to meet you.\e\e\rTo challenge you...man-to-man.\f
cz: Chtel jsem te poznat.\e\e\rVyzvat te...muz proti muzi.\f

en: What, you wanna fight?\f
cz: Coze, ty se chces prat?\f

en: That's right. \e\eI hoped you'd show me\ryour tactical prowess.\fI gather you have immense potential.\e\rUnpolished, but great nonetheless.\fI require a skilled foe. \ePerhaps you\rwould be an appropriate enemy.\fPlus, \eno one else has been able\rto contain your...\eyouthful energy.\f
cz: Presne tak. \e\eDoufal jsem, ze mi ukazes\rsvou takticku zdatnost.\fSoudim, ze mas ohromny potencial.\e\rNeotesany, presto skvely.\fPotrebuji zdatneho soupere. \eMozna\rbys byl vhodny nepritel.\fNavic \enikdo jiny nedokazal\rudrzet na uzde tvou...\emladickou energii.\f

en: What are you talking about?!?\fI have no clue who you are!\f
cz: O cem to mluvis?!?\fNemam tuseni, kdo jsi!\f

en: Meet me in combat, boy,\e and\ryou will learn all you need.\fWell, \ewhat will it be?\e\e\rWill you accept my challenge?\f
cz: Setkej se se mnou v boji, chlapce,\e a\rdozvis se vse, co potrebujes.\fTak, \ejak to bude?\e\e\rPrijmes mou vyzvu?\f

en: If you're selling, \ethen I'm buying!\f
cz: Kdyz nabizis, \etak ja beru!\f

en: Just what I expected to hear.\fHere are the rules: \eWe use only\rair and naval units.\fThe first to lose every unit...\e\rloses the battle.\f
cz: Presne to jsem cekal.\fTady jsou pravidla: \ePouzivame jen\rletecke a namorni jednotky.\fKdo prvni ztrati vsechny jednotky...\e\rprohrava bitvu.\f

en: And if I win?\f
cz: A kdyz vyhraji?\f

en: Then I will return this area to the\rcontrol of Orange Star.\f
cz: Pak vratim tuto oblast pod\rkontrolu Orange Star.\f

en: OK! \e\eThen if I lose, \eI'll let Black Hole\rtake possession of this land.\f
cz: Dobre! \e\eA kdyz prohraji, \enecham Black\rHole prevzit tuto zemi.\f

en: Quite generous...\econsidering that we\ralready have control of this region.\fIt is done! \e\eLet it begin, Andy!\f
cz: Velmi velkoryse...\evzhledem k tomu, ze\rtento region uz ovladame.\fPlati! \e\eAt to zacne, Andy!\f

en: Here I come!\f
cz: Uz jdu!\f

en: How was THAT, Hawke?!?\f
cz: Jak TOHLE, Hawke?!?\f

en: Hm... \eQuite impressive, Andy.\e\e\rVictory is yours.\f
cz: Hm... \eVelmi psobive, Andy.\e\e\rVitezstvi je tve.\f

en: Now, like you promised,\e\rpack up and get out!\f
cz: Ted, jak jsi slibil,\e\rsbal se a vypadni!\f

en: It seems I've no choice.\e\e\rAll units, \ewithdraw!\f
cz: Zda se, ze nemam na vyber.\e\e\rVsechny jednotky, \estahnout se!\f

en: Commander, \ethe Black Hole forces\rare retreating!\f
cz: Veliteli, \esily Black Hole\rse stahuji!\f

en: Yeah! \eWe did it!\fI've gotta tell Nell.\e\e\rPut me in touch with her right away!\f
cz: Jo! \eDokazali jsme to!\fMusim to rict Nell.\e\e\rHned me s ni spoj!\f

en: Yes, sir!\f
cz: Ano, pane!\f

en: Andy?\e\rWhat in the world are you doing?\f
cz: Andy?\e\rCo to proboha delas?\f

en: Nell, \elisten to this.\fI beat this guy named Hawke and\rdrove his troops out of...\f
cz: Nell, \eposlouchej.\fPorazil jsem chlapika jmenem Hawke a\rvyhnal jeho vojska z...\f

en: I don't have time for that!\fOrange Star is under attack!\e\rThe enemy is here in massive numbers!\f
cz: Na to nemam cas!\fOrange Star je pod utokem!\e\rNepritel je tu v ohromnem poctu!\f

en: What?!?\f
cz: Coze?!?\f

en: They've advanced beyond the front\ryou were supposed to be holding!\f
cz: Postoupili za frontu, kterou\rjsi mel drzet!\f

en: Uh, \ethat means...\f
cz: Eh, \eto znamena...\f

en: You fell right into their trap, Andy!\e\e\rGet back here on the double!\f
cz: Spadl jsi presne do jejich pasti, Andy!\e\e\rOkamzite se vrat!\f

en: But...\ebut... \eWhat about...\f
cz: Ale...\eale... \eA co...\f

en: If the continent falls, \ethose islands\rmean nothing!!!\f
cz: Kdyz padne kontinent, \ety ostrovy\rneznamenaji nic!!!\f

en: Hmmm...\f
cz: Hmmm...\f

en: Commander... \eCommander!\e\rAwaiting your orders, sir!\f
cz: Veliteli... \eVeliteli!\e\rCekame na vase rozkazy, pane!\f

en: Back to the mainland! \eNOW!!!\e\e\rDrat! \eDouble drat!!!\f
cz: Zpet na pevninu! \eHNED!!!\e\e\rSakra! \eDvojnasob sakra!!!\f

en: That creep!\e Next time I\rsee him, \ehe's in trouble!\f
cz: Ten hajzl!\e Az ho priste\ruvidim, \ebude v maleru!\f

en: I lost?\f
cz: Prohral jsem?\f

en: Ha ha ha... \eI came looking for an\ropponent, \ebut all I found was a child.\fI'll hold you to your word, boy.\e\rThis land is ours!\f
cz: Ha ha ha... \ePrisel jsem hledat\rsoupere, \eale nasel jsem jen dite.\fDrzim te za slovo, chlapce.\e\rTato zeme je nase!\f

en: Wai...\ewait!\f
cz: Po...\epockej!\f

en: What? \eBegging for mercy?\e Or do\ryou think to challenge me again?\fYou? \eA child who doesn't know how to\rgather intel \eor field an army!\fI beat you once, boy. \eAre you coming\rback for more?\f
cz: Coze? \eProsis o milost?\e Nebo me\rmyslis znovu vyzvat?\fTy? \eDite, ktere neumi sbirat\rinformace \eani postavit armadu!\fJednou jsem te porazil, chlapce. \eVracis\rse pro dalsi?\f

en: Yes... \eYes, I am!\e\rI can't let it end like this!\fHawke! \eThis time, I challenge you!\e\rFight me!\f
cz: Ano... \eAno, vracim!\e\rNemuzu to nechat takhle skoncit!\fHawke! \eTentokrat te vyzyvam ja!\e\rBojuj se mnou!\f

en: Ha ha ha... \eWhy not?\e\e\rI'm ready when you are.\f
cz: Ha ha ha... \eProc ne?\e\e\rJsem pripraven, az budes ty.\f

en: What have you done with the Orange\rStar soldiers we captured?\f
cz: Co jste udelali s vojaky Orange\rStar, ktere jsme zajali?\f

en: They've been taken to HQ, as per\ryour orders, sir.\f
cz: Byli odvedeni na HQ, dle\rvaseho rozkazu, pane.\f

en: And you have permitted that intel\rto be leaked back to Orange Star?\f
cz: A dovolil jsi, aby ta informace\runikla zpet k Orange Star?\f

en: Yes, sir. \e\eReports tell us they began\rgathering forces almost immediately.\f
cz: Ano, pane. \e\eHlaseni rikaji, ze zacali\rshromazdovat sily skoro okamzite.\f

en: Who is in command?\f
cz: Kdo jim veli?\f

en: Our sources report that a\rCommander Max...\f
cz: Nase zdroje hlasi nejakeho\rvelitele Maxe...\f

en: Max? \eIs that so?\e\e\rLike a moth to a flame...\fCapture his comrades, \ehint at doing\rsomething horrible, \eand out he comes.\fMax... \eYou poor, heroic fool.\f
cz: Max? \eOpravdu?\e\e\rJak motyl k plameni...\fZajmi jeho druhy, \enaznac, ze jim\rprovedes neco hrozneho, \ea uz vybiha.\fMaxi... \eTy ubohy, hrdinsky blazne.\f

en: Our troops have been deployed, as\ryou ordered, sir.\f
cz: Nasi vojaci byli nasazeni, dle\rvaseho rozkazu, pane.\f

en: Then let us begin. \eIt's time to teach\rthat human battering ram a lesson.\fWhen we're done with him, \eMax'll have\rnightmares about indirect-combat units.\f
cz: Tak zacneme. \eJe cas dat tomu\rlidskemu beranidlu lekci.\fAz s nim skoncime, \eMax bude mit\rnocni mury z jednotek neprimeho boje.\f

en: What're you saying, Nell?\e\e\rAre you ordering me NOT to attack?\f
cz: Co to rikas, Nell?\e\e\rPrikazujes mi, abych NEUTOCIL?\f

en: Of course not, Max.\fI'm advising that you take time to\rassess the situation. \eThat's all.\f
cz: Samozrejme ze ne, Maxi.\fRadim ti, aby sis dal cas a\rzhodnotil situaci. \eTo je vse.\f

en: It's the same thing!\f
cz: To je to same!\f

en: The enemy has indirect-combat units\rdeployed in the middle of their army.\fAttack with the troops you have now,\e\rand you'll play right into their hands.\f
cz: Nepritel ma jednotky neprimeho boje\rnasazene uprostred sve armady.\fZautoc s vojsky, ktera mas ted,\e\ra zahrajes jim presne do karet.\f

en: So I should do nothing?\e\e\rLet 'em get away with this?\f
cz: Takze mam nic nedelat?\e\e\rNechat jim to projit?\f

en: No, Max. \eJust wait \eand redeploy\ryour forces.\f
cz: Ne, Maxi. \eJen pockej \ea preskup\rsve sily.\f

en: While I'm doing that, \ewho knows what\rthey'll do to the troops they captured!\f
cz: A zatimco to budu delat, \ekdovi co\rprovedou zajatym vojakum!\f

en: C'mon, Nell!\e\rYou've gotta let me go.\fThose soldiers were captured because\rwe messed up.\fI've gotta save 'em!\f
cz: No tak, Nell!\e\rMusis me nechat jit.\fTi vojaci byli zajati, protoze\rjsme to pokazili.\fMusim je zachranit!\f

en: I can hardly say no if you put\rit like that, can I?\fHowever, \eyou must proceed with\rcaution. \e\eUnderstood?\f
cz: Tezko mohu rict ne, kdyz to\rpodavas takhle, vid?\fNicmene \emusis postupovat\ropatrne. \e\eRozumis?\f

en: Thanks, Nell! \e\eI knew you'd\runderstand.\fI'll talk to you later!\f
cz: Diky, Nell! \e\eVedel jsem, ze to\rpochopis.\fPromluvime si pozdeji!\f

en: Wait! \eMax!\e\e\r...\eI hope this works.\f
cz: Pockej! \eMaxi!\e\e\r...\eDoufam, ze to vyjde.\f

en: Hsss... \eMy perfect plan...\rIt's not possible...\f
cz: Hsss... \eMuj dokonaly plan...\rTo neni mozne...\f

en: Is everyone OK?\f
cz: Jsou vsichni v poradku?\f

en: Commander!\e\rAre we ever glad to see you!\f
cz: Veliteli!\e\rTo jsme radi, ze vas vidime!\f

en: You got here in the nick of time, sir!\fA Black Hole CO named Lash was\rgoing to use us in some experiment!\f
cz: Dorazil jste v posledni chvili, pane!\fCO Black Hole jmenem Lash nas\rchtela pouzit v nejakem pokusu!\f

en: What? \eAn experiment? \e\eGood thing\rwe got here when we did!\f
cz: Coze? \ePokus? \e\eJeste dobre, ze\rjsme dorazili vcas!\f

en: Sir! \eYes, sir!\e\e\rThank you, sir!\f
cz: Pane! \eAno, pane!\e\e\rDekuji, pane!\f

en: Max. \e\eDidn't I warn you about rushing\rheadlong into enemy territory?\f
cz: Maxi. \e\eNevarovala jsem te pred\rbezhlavym vpadem na nepratelske uzemi?\f

en: Oh, \eNell.\fMy...\emy apologies.\e\e\rI got a little \eworked up...\f
cz: Ach, \eNell.\fMoje...\emoje omluva.\e\e\rTrochu jsem se \enechal unest...\f

en: You really do have a short fuse,\rdon't you?\fWell, I'll let it slide this time.\f
cz: Ty mas opravdu kratky knot,\rvid?\fNo, tentokrat to nechame byt.\f

en: Let it slide?\f
cz: Nechat to byt?\f

en: Thanks to you, \eall these soldiers\rwill make it home safely.\fIt was your decisive command that\rmade rescuing them possible.\fNicely done,\e\e\rCommander Max.\f
cz: Diky tobe \evsichni tito vojaci\rdorazi bezpecne domu.\fByl to tvuj rozhodny rozkaz, ktery\rumoznil jejich zachranu.\fDobra prace,\e\e\rveliteli Maxi.\f

en: Aw, \ethanks.\e\rHeh heh...\f
cz: Ale, \ediky.\e\rChe che...\f

en: Hah! It'll take more\rthan that to beat me!
cz: Ha! Na me budes\rpotrebovat vic!

en: Heh heh heh... \eJust as I planned.\e My\rtrap was as flawless as my face is.\fA victory worthy of my genius!\e\e\rOr was my foe simply too dull-witted?\f
cz: Che che che... \ePresne jak jsem chtela.\e Ma\rpast byla tak dokonala jak ma tvar.\fVitezstvi hodne meho genia!\e\e\rNebo byl muj soupere proste prilis tupy?\f

en: Commander!\e\rAre you all right?\f
cz: Veliteli!\e\rJste v poradku?\f

en: Yes, I'm fine!\e\rBlast! \eI got ahead of myself!\fCan't see into the woods in this\e\rstupid Fog of War.\fNo matter how worried I am about the\rcaptives, \eI've got to be more careful!\f
cz: Ano, jsem v pohode!\e\rSakra! \eUkvapil jsem se!\fNeni videt do lesa v tehle\e\rblbe Mlze valky.\fAt se o zajatce obavam sebevic,\rmusim byt opatrnejsi!\f

en: Do you see that?\e\rIt's a Black Hole lab.\fIf this goes well, \ewe might be able\rto seize their new weapon designs.\f
cz: Vidis to?\e\rJe to laborator Black Hole.\fKdyz to pujde dobre, \emozna ziskame\rnavrhy jejich novych zbrani.\f

en: Nell! \eWe're ready to advance!\e\e\rBut...\eshouldn't this be Sami's mission?\f
cz: Nell! \eJsme pripraveni postoupit!\e\e\rAle...\enemela by to byt Samina mise?\f

en: No can do, Andy!\e\e\rI'm still gathering my troops.\fMy last battle left me with a shortage\rof combat-ready soldiers.\fTo be honest, \eI'd like to try and\rinfiltrate their base by myself.\f
cz: To nepujde, Andy!\e\e\rPorad shromazduji sva vojska.\fMa posledni bitva mi nechala\rnedostatek bojeschopnych vojaku.\fUprimne, \echtela bych se pokusit\rinfiltrovat jejich zakladnu sama.\f

en: Do you honestly think that I would\rapprove such recklessness?\f
cz: Vazne si myslis, ze bych\rschvalila takovou lehkomyslnost?\f

en: It's OK, Sami! \e\eHelping each\rother is what we're all about!\fMy troops are fresh, and itching\rto go!\f
cz: To je v pohode, Sami! \e\eVzajemna\rpomoc, o to nam jde!\fMa vojska jsou svezi a nemuzou\rse dockat!\f

en: Lord Flak!\e\e\rThe Orange Star Army!\f
cz: Pane Flak!\e\e\rArmada Orange Star!\f

en: What?\e\e\rHow did they find us here?!?\f
cz: Coze?\e\e\rJak nas tady nasli?!?\f

en: I...\eI don't know, sir.\e\e\rMaybe a map fell into their hands?\f
cz: Ja...\eNevim, pane.\e\e\rMozna se jim do rukou dostala mapa?\f

en: Grrrr!\fHow long will it take to erase all\rof the weapon data?\f
cz: Grrrr!\fJak dlouho potrva vymazat vsechna\rdata o zbranich?\f

en: 10... \eNo, we should be able to do\rit if we have 7 days.\f
cz: 10... \eNe, melo by to jit\rzvladnout za 7 dni.\f

en: Well, get started!\e\e\rDon't let them get that intel!\f
cz: Tak zacni!\e\e\rNenech je ziskat ty informace!\f

en: Lord Flak... \e\eThe new weapons plans\rhave been stolen...\f
cz: Pane Flak... \e\ePlany novych zbrani\rbyly ukradeny...\f

en: .........\e\e\rAssemble everyone in the factory.\f
cz: .........\e\e\rShromazdi vsechny v tovarne.\f

en: In the factory...\e\rYes, sir!\f
cz: V tovarne...\e\rAno, pane!\f

en: All right!\e\e\rWe shut down the enemy lab!\f
cz: Vyborne!\e\e\rVyradili jsme nepratelskou laborator!\f

en: Excellent work, in spite of the\rdifficult conditions.\fWith these plans, \ewe should be able to\rdevelop neotanks of our own.\fThis was a great victory.\e\e\rLet's head for home and celebrate!\f
cz: Skvela prace, navzdory tezkym\rpodminkam.\fS temito plany \ebychom meli byt\rschopni vyvinout vlastni neotanky.\fTohle bylo skvele vitezstvi.\e\e\rPojdme domu a oslavme to!\f

en: Wahoo! \eLet's have a BBQ!\f
cz: Juchu! \eUdelame si gril!\f

en: Oh, no...\e\e\rI got beaten...\f
cz: Ach ne...\e\e\rProhral jsem...\f

en: Hey! \eScram!!!\e\e\rThe lab's gonna blow!\f
cz: Hej! \eMazte!!!\e\e\rLaborator vybuchne!\f

en: Yes, sir!\f
cz: Ano, pane!\f

en: Drat!\e\rWe didn't make it in time!\f
cz: Sakra!\e\rNestihli jsme to vcas!\f

en: Nothing we can do now...\fPursuing them will only cause more\rdamage. \e\eLet them go.\f
cz: Ted uz nic nezmuzeme...\fPronasledovani jim jen zpusobi vetsi\rskody. \e\eNechme je jit.\f

en: Nell seemed a bit \edisappointed.\f
cz: Nell vypadala trochu \ezklamane.\f

en: Uh-huh. \e\eThis battle was all about\rgetting those weapon plans...\fBut, \ehey, \eI'm just glad you're OK.\e\e\rC'mon! \eShow me that Andy spirit!\f
cz: No jo. \e\eTahle bitva byla cela o\rziskani tech planu zbrani...\fAle, \ehele, \ejsem rad, ze jsi v pohode.\e\e\rNo tak! \eUkaz mi toho praveho Andyho!\f

en: You're right!\e\rWe'll get 'em next time!\f
cz: Mas pravdu!\e\rDostaneme je priste!\f

en: Yes!\e\rThat's what I wanted to hear!\f
cz: Ano!\e\rPresne to jsem chtela slyset!\f

en: I can't wait to try\rout a neotank!
cz: Nemuzu se dockat, az\rvyzkousim neotank!

en: Oh, no...\e\e\rI got beat...\f
cz: Ach ne...\e\e\rProhral jsem...\f

en: Andy, \ejust because you're in a hurry\rdoesn't mean you can panic!\fYou have to utilize your recon units\e\rand send infantry into the mountains.\fYou need to do everything you can to\rincrease your visual range!\f
cz: Andy, \eto, ze spechas, jeste\rneznamena, ze muzes panikarit!\fMusis vyuzit sve pruzkumniky\e\ra poslat pechotu do hor.\fMusis udelat vse pro to, abys\rzvysil svuj dohled!\f

en: Plus, \eif you advance carelessly, you\rleave your indirect-combat units open.\fHaving easy terrain to cross doesn't\rmean you can let your guard down.\f
cz: Navic \ekdyz postupujes neopatrne,\rvystavis sve jednotky neprimeho boje.\fSnadny teren k prekonani neznamena,\rze muzes polevit v ostrazitosti.\f

en: OK...\fBoy, why do I feel like I just got\rchewed out by my mom?\f
cz: Dobre...\fJej, proc mam pocit, ze me prave\rseprala mamka?\f

en: Andy! \eI'm not like Nell! \eI'm not old\renough to be your mother!\f
cz: Andy! \eNejsem jako Nell! \eNejsem dost\rstara, abych ti byla matkou!\f

en: Not like Nell? \eWould you care to\rexplain that comment, Sami?\f
cz: Ne jako Nell? \eMohla bys ten\rkomentar vysvetlit, Sami?\f

en: Oh,...\eum...\enot really. I...\f
cz: Ach,...\ehm...\evlastne ne. Ja...\f

en: They've come at last...\e\rI'll win it all with this factory.\f
cz: Konecne prisli...\e\rS touto tovarnou vyhraji vse.\f

en: You look like you're having a rough\rtime, Flak.\f
cz: Vypadas, ze mas tezke\robdobi, Flaku.\f

en: Huh?\e What rock did you crawl out\rfrom under, Adder?\f
cz: Co?\e Zpod jakeho kamene jsi\rvylezl, Addere?\f

en: Heh heh heh... \e\eI wanted to see the\rmilitary strength of this nation myself.\f
cz: Che che che... \e\eChtel jsem na vlastni\roci videt vojenskou silu tohoto naroda.\f

en: Should you even be here?\fI thought you were supposed to be\rinvading Yellow Comet?\f
cz: Mel bys vubec byt tady?\fMyslel jsem, ze mas napadat\rYellow Comet?\f

en: Leave off, Flak. \eYou'd do well not\rto waste your energy on my affairs.\fLook! \eThe natives are knocking on\ryour doorstep...\eand they look restless.\f
cz: Nech toho, Flaku. \eUdelas lepe,\rkdyz nebudes plytvat silami na me veci.\fHele! \eDomorodci klepou na\rtve dvere...\ea vypadaji neklidne.\f

en: Grrr...\e\rI won't lose.\f
cz: Grrr...\e\rNeprohraji.\f

en: "Won't"? \eHeh heh heh...\fYou mustn't lose, Flak. \eThat's\rcloser to the truth.\f
cz: "Neprohraji"? \eChe che che...\fNesmis prohrat, Flaku. \eTo je\rblize pravde.\f

en: I'm looking forward to your\rperformance. \eHeh heh heh...\f
cz: Tesim se na tvuj\rvykon. \eChe che che...\f

en: Whoa!\e\e\rWhat in the world is that?!?\f
cz: Pane!\e\e\rCo to proboha je?!?\f

en: It seems to be some sort of an\rinstallation.\fWhat are they planning now?\f
cz: Zda se to byt nejaky druh\rzarizeni.\fCo zase planuji?\f

en: I believe they call it a factory.\fThis is the center of all the damage\rinflicted upon our forces.\f
cz: Myslim, ze tomu rikaji tovarna.\fToto je stred vsech skod\rzpusobenych nasim silam.\f
