cz: Ted poslouchej, Adder.\fMel by ses opravdu hodne snazit\rnerozzlobit me.\f

en: What? \eWhat did you do?\f
cz: Coze? \eCos to udelal?\f

en: I'm an old man.\e\e\rI'm not looking for a fight.\fI want nothing more than to relax and\rbake my bones in the sun.\fSo I'm warning you, \estop now, while you\rstill can.\fIf not, \eI don't think I'll be able to\rrestrain myself...\f
cz: Jsem stary muz.\e\e\rNehledam boj.\fNechci nic vic nez si odpocinout a\rprohrat sve kosti na slunci.\fTak te varuji, \eprestan ted, dokud\rjeste muzes.\fJestli ne, \enemyslim, ze se dokazu\rovladnout...\f

en: Hss...\e\rHssssssss!\f
cz: Hss...\e\rHssssssss!\f

en: Wow! \eHe sure left in a hurry.\f
cz: Pane! \eUrcite odesel ve spechu.\f

en: Vintage Sensei! Well done!\e\rWell done indeed!\f
cz: Sensei v plne forme! Vyborne!\e\rOpravdu vyborne!\f

en: Ah, time for a nap.
cz: Ach, cas na sluka.

en: About time to turn over the reins to\rsomeone younger, don't you think?\f
cz: Je na case predat otez nekomu\rmladsimu, nemyslis?\f

en: Listen to me, Adder! \eThis old man\rstill has some tricks up his sleeve.\fKanbei believes in me, \eand I won't\rlet him down.\f
cz: Poslouchej, Adder! \eTenhle starec\rma jeste par triku v rukave.\fKanbei ve me veri, \ea ja ho\rnezklamu.\f

en: Oh, come now! \eAre you saying you'd\rlike another shot at me, old man?\fEven after I just beat you?\f
cz: Ale no tak! \eChces rict, ze by ses\rrad o me znovu pokusil, starce?\fI potom, co jsem te prave porazil?\f

en: That's right.\e\e\rI've seen how you fight.\fI believe that my battle copters can\rhold off your tanks.\fIf I tighten the defenses on my HQ\e\rand do something about that pipe...\fI might not be a youngster anymore,\e\rbut my CO Power is as hale as ever.\fWatch yourself, sonny. This senior\rcitizen's just warming up!\f
cz: Presne tak.\e\e\rVidel jsem, jak bojujes.\fVerim, ze me bojove vrtulniky\rdokazi zadrzet tve tanky.\fKdyz posilim obranu sveho HQ\e\ra neco udelam s tou rourou...\fUz mozna nejsem mladik,\e\rale ma CO sila je cila jako vzdy.\fDavej si pozor, synacku. Tenhle\rsenior se teprve rozehrival!\f

en: Interesting...\e I believe I'll allow\ryou to show me this...\epower of yours.\f
cz: Zajimave...\e Myslim, ze ti dovolim,\rabys mi ukazal tu svou...\esilu.\f

en: That appears to be the lab on\rthe map.\fIf my intel is accurate, \ethey're working\ron a new type of tank in there.\fCalculating from Adder's skill and\rthe speed of our advance...\fI estimate we have 18 days to\rcapture the lab or rout our foe.\fIf we can do that, \ewe might be able\rto get our hands on the weapon specs.\f
cz: To se zda byt ta laborator na\rmape.\fKdyz jsou me zpravy presne, \epracuji\rtam na novem typu tanku.\fPodle Adderovy dovednosti a\rrychlosti naseho postupu...\fodhaduji, ze mame 18 dni na\robsazeni laboratore nebo rozpraseni neprijatele.\fKdyz to dokazeme, \emozna se nam\rpodari ziskat plany te zbrane.\f

en: I see...\fWe've no time to tarry then.\fHm?\e\e It looks like the battle's\rstarted without us.\f
cz: Chapu...\fNemame tedy cas otalet.\fHm?\e\e Vypada to, ze bitva zacala\rbez nas.\f

en: What?\e\e\rWho in the world could it be?\f
cz: Coze?\e\e\rKdo to proboha muze byt?\f

en: It's Black Hole on one side,\e\rbut who are they fighting?\f
cz: Na jedne strane je Black Hole,\e\rale s kym bojuji?\f

en: My enemy's enemy is my ally...\e\rOr something like that.\f
cz: Neprijatel meho neprijatele je muj\rspojenec...\e\rNebo tak neco.\f

en: Prepare to advance!\e\e\rWe must not be late!\f
cz: Pripravte se k postupu!\e\e\rNesmime prijit pozde!\f

en: There are no holes in my strategy!\f
cz: V me strategii nejsou zadne diry!\f

en: Let my armies take the field again!\f
cz: At me armady opet vyrazi do pole!\f

en: I guess I can take another shot at 'em.\f
cz: Asi to na ne muzu zkusit jeste jednou.\f

en: This is the location of Black Hole's\rsecret lab.\fWe have to get this information\rto Yellow Comet.\f
cz: Tady je tajna laborator\rBlack Hole.\fMusime tuto informaci dostat\rk Yellow Comet.\f

en: That warship...\fEveryone! \eThose are our allies!\e\e\rLet's join forces!\f
cz: Ta valecna lod...\fVsichni! \eTo jsou nasi spojenci!\e\e\rSpojme sily!\f

en: That's...\e\rThey've come to fight with us.\fYes! \eLet us combine our strength\rand strike!\f
cz: To je...\e\rPrisli bojovat po nasem boku.\fAno! \eSpojme sve sily\ra uderme!\f

en: Those troops...\e\rThey don't appear to be the enemy's.\fCombining our resources just may\rgive us a chance.\f
cz: Ty jednotky...\e\rNevypadaji jako nepratelske.\fSpojeni nasich sil nam mozna\rda sanci.\f

en: Tomorrow's attack is key...\e\rIt's our last chance to get that data!\f
cz: Zitrejsi utok je klicovy...\e\rJe to nase posledni sance ziskat ta data!\f

en: Hmph!\e Day 17...\e Today and tomorrow\rare all we have left.\f
cz: Hmf!\e Den 17...\e Dnesek a zitrek\rjsou vse, co nam zbyva.\f

en: Day 17 already?\e We've got to wrap\rthis up by tomorrow, or else.\f
cz: Uz den 17?\e Musime to do zitra\rdotahnout, jinak je zle.\f

en: These are...\e\rthe plans for the new weapon!\fYes! \eWith these, we should be able\rto produce that new tank design!\f
cz: To jsou...\e\rplany nove zbrane!\fAno! \eS nimi bychom meli dokazat\rvyrobit ten novy typ tanku!\f

en: You risked a lot to come to our aid.\e\rYou have our gratitude.\f
cz: Hodne jste riskovali, abyste nam pomohli.\e\rMate nasi vdecnost.\f

en: Don't mention it.\e\rWe gotta help each other out.\fI'm gonna head on back to Blue Moon\rfor the time being.\fI'll be back with the Bearded One\rlater. \eTalk to you then.\f
cz: Nestoji za rec.\e\rMusime si navzajem pomahat.\fProzatim se vratim zpatky\rdo Blue Moon.\fVratim se pozdeji s tim vousacem.\e Tak zatim.\f

en: No, \ethank YOU.\e You helped me out\rof a jam.\fIt's time for me to return to Orange\rStar, \ebut we'll meet again.\f
cz: Ne, \edekuji VAM.\e Dostali jste me\rz prusvihu.\fJe cas, abych se vratil do Orange\rStar, \eale jeste se setkame.\f

en: Left without offering a name...\e Is that\rwhat passes for manners these days?\f
cz: Odesel, aniz rekl sve jmeno...\e To se\rdnes povazuje za slusnost?\f

en: Don't worry, \eI'm sure we'll\rbe meeting again.\f
cz: Neboj se, \eurcite se jeste\rsetkame.\f

en: My thoughts exactly.\e\e\rWe'll be meeting again.\f
cz: Presne to si myslim.\e\e\rJeste se setkame.\f

en: Kanbei's army grows\rmightier with every day!
cz: Kanbeiho armada je\rkazdym dnem mocnejsi!

en: We can't afford to take\rBlack Hole lightly.
cz: Nemuzeme si dovolit Black\rHole podcenit.

en: A new type of tank...\rGlad we got those plans.
cz: Novy typ tanku...\rDobre, ze mame ty plany.

en: Orange Star troops here?\e\rWhat is Flak doing?\fNot that it mattered, \eI could defeat\rany number of countries.\e Heh, heh...\f
cz: Jednotky Orange Star tady?\e\rCo to Flak provadi?\fNe ze by na tom zalezelo, \eporazim\rsebevic zemi.\e Che, che...\f

en: This is no good.\f
cz: Tohle neni dobre.\f

en: Sonja, \edid you gain any strategic\rinsight from that battle?\f
cz: Sonjo, \eziskala jsi z te bitvy\rnejaky strategicky postreh?\f

en: Let me see...\e On this terrain, \esplitting\rup our troops is a bad idea.\fWe should build up our strike force\e\rand then attack in one fell swoop.\fIf possible, \esupport from air units\rwould really help.\f
cz: Pockej...\e V tomto terenu je\rrozdeleni jednotek spatny napad.\fMeli bychom soustredit udernou silu\e\ra pak uderit najednou.\fPokud mozno, \epodpora ze vzduchu\rby hodne pomohla.\f

en: That Orange Star CO was fighting\runder unfavorable terrain conditions\fin a strange country.\fWe're responsible for the loss\rof her troops.\fWe must do better!\f
cz: Ten velitel Orange Star bojoval\rv nevyhodnem terenu\fv cizi zemi.\fJsme zodpovedni za ztratu\rjejich jednotek.\fMusime se polepsit!\f

en: I will not rest until every last\rinvader is driven from our soil!\f
cz: Neustanu, dokud nevyzeneme\rposledniho vetrelce z nasi zeme!\f

en: They...\e They've come this far?\e\rThat must mean...\f
cz: Oni...\e Dostali se az sem?\e\rTo musi znamenat...\f

en: Adder...\f
cz: Adder...\f

en: Who's there?\e\rWho dares address me?!?\fOh! \e\eHawke!\e\rIt's you.\f
cz: Kdo je tam?\e\rKdo se mnou opovazuje mluvit?!?\fOh! \e\eHawke!\e\rTo jsi ty.\f

en: It appears that you're behind\rschedule. \eWhat've you been doing?\f
cz: Zda se, ze mas zpozdeni.\e\rCo jsi celou tu dobu delal?\f

en: I\e-I've been delayed. \eBut only\rslightly. \eIt's no problem.\fWe'll be in control of this tiny\rcountry soon. \eYou have my word.\f
cz: Ja\e-zdrzel jsem se. \eAle jen\rtrochu. \eNeni to problem.\fBrzy budeme mit tuto malickou\rzemi pod kontrolou. \eMate me slovo.\f

en: Do you understand \ewhat it means\rthat I am here, \eAdder?\f
cz: Chapes, \eco znamena,\rze jsem tady, \eAddere?\f

en: If-\eIf I win...\e\rIf I win here, \ethere's no problem!\fThat's correct, isn't it?\f
cz: Kdy-\eKdyz vyhraju...\e\rKdyz tady vyhraju, \eneni problem!\fTak je to spravne, ze?\f

en: Hmmm...\e\e IF you win.\f
cz: Hmmm...\e\e KDYZ vyhrajes.\f

en: At last, \ethe enemy's factory.\fIf we claim victory here, \ewe can\rdrive the enemy out of our homeland.\f
cz: Konecne, \etovarna nepritele.\fKdyz tady zvitezime, \emuzeme\rvyhnat nepritele z nasi vlasti.\f

en: Yes!\e\rLet it begin!\f
cz: Ano!\e\rAt to zacne!\f

en: Commander! \e\eThe leader of the\rBlue Moon Army to see you.\f
cz: Velitel! \e\eVudce armady Blue\rMoon vas chce videt.\f

en: It's been a long time, Kanbei.\f
cz: Uz je to davno, Kanbei.\f

en: If it isn't Olaf!\e\e\rWhy are you here?\f
cz: Neni-li to Olaf!\e\e\rProc jsi tady?\f

en: I've brought along my men to lend\rYellow Comet my aid.\fThe Black Hole Army threatens\rus all.\fBlue Moon will stand beside you\rin this fight.\f
cz: Privedl jsem sve muze, abych pomohl\rYellow Comet.\fArmada Black Hole ohrozuje\rnas vsechny.\fBlue Moon bude stat po vasem boku\rv tomto boji.\f

en: Ah! \eKanbei is grateful!\fWith the power of Blue Moon\rbeside us, \ewe cannot lose!\f
cz: Ach! \eKanbei je vdecny!\fSe silou Blue Moon po nasem\rboku \enemuzeme prohrat!\f

en: Commander! \e\eThe leader of the\rOrange Star Army to see you.\f
cz: Velitel! \e\eVudce armady Orange\rStar vas chce videt.\f

en: Long time, no see, Kanbei.\f
cz: Dlouho jsme se nevideli, Kanbei.\f

en: Is that you, Nell?\e\rWhat brings you here?\f
cz: To jsi ty, Nell?\e\rCo te sem privadi?\f

en: I would like to propose an alliance\rbetween your country and ours.\fThe Black Hole Army is our\rmutual enemy.\f
cz: Rada bych navrhla spojenectvi\rmezi vasi a nasi zemi.\fArmada Black Hole je nas\rspolecny nepritel.\f

en: Ah! \eKanbei is grateful!\fYellow Comet and Orange Star!\e\rBlack Hole is a good as defeated!\f
cz: Ach! \eKanbei je vdecny!\fYellow Comet a Orange Star!\e\rBlack Hole je jako porazena!\f

en: Attention! \eWe're moving out for\rYellow Comet! \eLet's go!\f
cz: Pozor! \eVyrazime k Yellow\rComet! \eJdeme!\f

en: I hope my infantry is up to the task.\f
cz: Doufam, ze ma pechota na to staci.\f

en: I'm gonna break Black Hole like a twig!\f
cz: Zlomim Black Hole jako vetvicku!\f

en: If I take the field,\e our victory\ris assured!\f
cz: Kdyz vyrazim do pole,\e nase\rvitezstvi je jiste!\f

en: Hm? \eMe? \eYou're sure now?\f
cz: Hm? \eJa? \eUrcite?\f

en: People of Yellow Comet, \elet's work\rtogether and do our best!\f
cz: Lide Yellow Comet, \epracujme\rspolecne a dejme do toho vse!\f

en: It is I who shall deal the final blow!\f
cz: To ja zasadim posledni ranu!\f

en: Two against one?\e\rThe odds are in our favor.\f
cz: Dva proti jednomu?\e\rSance jsou na nasi strane.\f

en: Now is the moment of truth.\f
cz: Ted prichazi okamzik pravdy.\f

en: It looks like it's our turn.\e\e\rLet's move 'em out!\f
cz: Vypada to, ze jsme na rade.\e\e\rVyrazme s nimi!\f

en: March! \eLet them behold the\rmight of the Blue Moon Army!\f
cz: Pochodem! \eAt spatri silu\rarmady Blue Moon!\f

en: The factory...\e\rIt's completely...\fIt's the blasted weather!\e\e\rThat was the problem!\fHssss!\f
cz: Ta tovarna...\e\rJe uplne...\fTo to proklate pocasi!\e\e\rTo byl ten problem!\fHssss!\f

en: The Black Hole Army's in full retreat.\fYes!\e\rFather!\e Sensei!\fWe won! \eWe won!\f
cz: Armada Black Hole je v plnem ustupu.\fAno!\e\rOtce!\e Sensei!\fVyhrali jsme! \eVyhrali jsme!\f

en: That we did.\e\rAnd an impressive win it was.\f
cz: To ano.\e\rA bylo to vitezstvi k pohledani.\f

en: Today's battle will long be\rremembered.\fThrough our combined efforts,\rour common foe was defeated.\fI offer my gratitude.\e\e\rThank you for your aid.\f
cz: Na dnesni bitvu se bude\rdlouho vzpominat.\fDiky nasemu spolecnemu usili\rbyl spolecny neprritel porazen.\fSkladam svou vdecnost.\e\e\rDekuji za vasi pomoc.\f

en: Don't be foolish!\e\rYou would've done the same for us.\fActually, \eBlack Hole was foolish\renough to attack us as well.\fOf course, we defeated them soundly.\e\rWith...some help from Orange Star.\fWell, well... \eHere come Nell and her\rtroops now.\f
cz: Nebudte hloupy!\e\rUdelali byste pro nas to same.\fVlastne byla Black Hole tak hloupa,\rze napadla i nas.\fSamozrejme jsme je porazili na hlavu.\e\rS...trochou pomoci od Orange Star.\fNo neni to... \eTady prichazi Nell\rse svymi jednotkami.\f

en: Long time, no see, Kanbei.\f
cz: Dlouho jsme se nevideli, Kanbei.\f

en: It seems that you have crossed\rswords with the Black Hole Army, too.\f
cz: Zda se, ze i vy jste zkrizili\rmece s armadou Black Hole.\f

en: Yes, we have.\fThe strength of the Black Hole Army\ris immeasurable.\fEspecially the CO named Hawke.\fWe've heard reports that he has\rGreen Earth on the verge of defeat.\f
cz: Ano, zkrizili.\fSila armady Black Hole\rje nezmerna.\fObzvlaste velitel jmenem Hawke.\fSlyseli jsme zpravy, ze ma\rGreen Earth na pokraji porazky.\f

en: Impossible!\f
cz: Nemozne!\f

en: There's no time to spare. \e\eWe must\rget to Green Earth on the double!\f
cz: Neni cas nazbyt. \e\eMusime se\rk Green Earth dostat co nejdriv!\f

en: Yellow Comet is with you!\e\e\rOur strength is yours!\fIf we all stand together,\e\rthere is nothing we need fear!\f
cz: Yellow Comet je s vami!\e\e\rNase sila je vasi silou!\fKdyz budeme stat spolu,\e\rnemame se ceho bat!\f

en: A friend in need \eis a friend indeed.\fNow, however, \ewe must hurry to the\rnext battlefield.\f
cz: V nouzi poznas pritele.\fTeted ale \emusime spechat na\rdalsi bojiste.\f

en: The next battlefield?\f
cz: Dalsi bojiste?\f

en: Yes.\fBlack Hole's power is immeasurable.\fEven now, they are attacking your\rneighbor, Blue Moon.\f
cz: Ano.\fSila Black Hole je nezmerna.\fI ted utoci na vaseho\rsouseda, Blue Moon.\f

en: What?\f
cz: Coze?\f

en: We have no time to spare.\fWe must march to Blue Moon's aid\rimmediately!\f
cz: Nemame cas nazbyt.\fMusime okamzite vyrazit\rna pomoc Blue Moon!\f

en: Yellow Comet is with you!\e\e\rOur strength is yours!\fIf we all stand together, \e\rthere is nothing we need fear!\f
cz: Yellow Comet je s vami!\e\e\rNase sila je vasi silou!\fKdyz budeme stat spolu, \e\rnemame se ceho bat!\f

en: Wahoo! I won!
cz: Hura! Vyhral jsem!

en: All right! Teamwork\rwins again!
cz: Vyborne! Tymova prace\ropet vitezi!

en: Now THAT was a\rbeating!
cz: TO byl teda\rvylet!

en: Ha ha ha!\rVictory is ours!
cz: Ha ha ha!\rVitezstvi je nase!

en: I'm all tuckered out.\rThink I'll get some shut-eye.
cz: Jsem uplne vycerpany.\rAsi si trochu zdrimnu.

en: Congratulations,\rYellow Comet!
cz: Gratulujeme,\rYellow Comet!

en: Splendid! Kanbei\ris pleased!
cz: Skvele! Kanbei\rje potesen!

en: And so, peace returns\rto Yellow Comet.
cz: A tak se mir vraci\rdo Yellow Comet.

en: Now we can take things\rnice and slow again...
cz: Ted to muzeme zase brat\rv klidu a pomalu...

en: Even with aid from our allies,\rwe suffer defeat. \eNever!\fSonja, \ewe will draw up battle plans\ranew. \eThis fight is not over!\f
cz: I s pomoci spojencu utrpime\rporazku. \eNikdy!\fSonjo, \esestavime nove bojove\rplany. \eTento boj jeste neskoncil!\f

en: Yes, Father.\e\e\rWe must liberate our country.\fI see it...\e On this map, controlling\rthe skies is essential to victory.\fLet's halt the enemy advance on the\rground, \ethen reclaim the airport.\f
cz: Ano, otce.\e\e\rMusime osvobodit nasi zemi.\fVidim to...\e Na teto mape je ovladnuti\rnebe klicove k vitezstvi.\fZastavme postup nepritele na\rzemi, \epak dobyjme zpet letiste.\f

en: What keen eyesight you have, Sonja.\fWith bombers, \ewe can assault their\rminicannons and that pipeline.\f
cz: Jak bystry zrak mas, Sonjo.\fS bombardery \emuzeme zautocit\rna jejich minideala a to potrubi.\f

en: This time we must win!\e\rFall in, \eand follow me!\f
cz: Tentokrat musime vyhrat!\e\rNastoupit, \ea za mnou!\f

en: Lord Sturm,\e the enemy army...\f
cz: Pane Sturme,\e neprritelska armada...\f

en: So they've arrived...\f
cz: Tak oni dorazili...\f

en: I'll smash 'em.\e\e\rLord Sturm, let me have 'em.\f
cz: Rozdrtim je.\e\e\rPane Sturme, prenechte mi je.\f

en: Flak will make a mess of it, sir.\e\e\rLet me take command.\f
cz: Flak to zvrta, pane.\e\e\rPrenechte veleni mne.\f

en: The command is...\emine.\f
cz: Veleni je...\emoje.\f

en: What?\f
cz: Coze?\f

en: I will ascertain how strong they've\rbecome with my own eyes.\fYou wretches report to the missile\rplatform and assist Lash.\f
cz: Na vlastni oci se presvedcim,\rjak silnymi se stali.\fVy ubozaci se hlaste na raketove\rplosine a pomozte Lash.\f

en: Understood.\f
cz: Rozumim.\f

en: Yes, sir.\f
cz: Ano, pane.\f

en: Good riddance.\fPathetic fools.\e They have served me\rpoorly.\fWhen this is finished,\e I will\rmake...adjustments.\f
cz: Dobre, ze jsou pryc.\fUbozi hlupaci.\e Slouzili mi\rspatne.\fAz tohle skonci,\e provedu...\rurcite upravy.\f

en: Here we are at last.\e\rThe Black Hole Army's citadel.\f
cz: Konecne jsme tady.\e\rCitadela armady Black Hole.\f

en: I don't care what they call it.\fAll I know is, everything they pillaged\rfrom Orange Star is here.\f
cz: Je mi jedno, jak tomu rikaji.\fVim jen, ze vse, co nakradli\rz Orange Star, je tady.\f

en: That's been confirmed by our allies,\rtoo.\f
cz: To potvrdili i nasi\rspojenci.\f

en: So if we can capture this place,\e\rwe can get all of our money back!\f
cz: Takze kdyz obsadime tohle misto,\e\rziskame vsechny penize zpet!\f

en: I'm not so sure of that.\f
cz: Tim si nejsem tak jista.\f

en: What do you mean, Nell?\f
cz: Jak to myslis, Nell?\f

en: Just because it was all sent here\rdoesn't mean it's still here.\f
cz: To, ze to sem vsechno poslali,\rneznamena, ze to tu jeste je.\f

en: Are you saying they might have\rmoved it all to another location?\f
cz: Chces rici, ze to mozna vsechno\rpresunuli jinam?\f

en: What makes you think that?\f
cz: Proc si to myslis?\f

en: We gotta assume they weren't\rgathering it just for kicks.\fThey've got something planned, and\rmore 'n likely, they've moved all\four stuff to where they need it.\fThat sound 'bout right, Nell?\f
cz: Musime predpokladat, ze to neshromazdovali\rjen tak pro zabavu.\fNeco maji v planu a nejspis presunuli\rvsechny nase veci tam, kde je\fpotrebuji.\fNeni to tak, Nell?\f

en: Grit's exactly right.\fWhich means this battle is also about\rdeciphering their ultimate plan.\f
cz: Grit ma naprostou pravdu.\fCoz znamena, ze tahle bitva je i o\rrozlusteni jejich konecneho planu.\f

en: Hmmm...\fRegardless, \ewe must still attack.\e\e\rThe longer we wait,\fthe stronger their defenses become.\e\e\rOur target...\f
cz: Hmmm...\fAt tak ci tak, \emusime zautocit.\e\e\rCim dele cekame,\ftim silnejsi je jejich obrana.\e\e\rNas cil...\f

en: Our objective is to destroy the\r3 Black Cannons.\f
cz: Nasim cilem je znicit\r3 Cerna dela.\f

en: Hm?\e Just the cannons? \eAre you sure,\rSonja?\f
cz: Hm?\e Jen ta dela? \eUrcite,\rSonjo?\f

en: If we eliminate those, \ewe should\rbe able to rout our foe.\fIf there's nothing here for\rthem to protect, they'll run.\f
cz: Kdyz je znicime, \emeli bychom\rdokazat zahnat nepritele.\fKdyz tu nebude nic, co by\rbranili, daji se na utek.\f

en: Ah.\e\e And if they do...\fThat would tell us whether or not\rthis was their true headquarters.\f
cz: Aha.\e\e A pokud ano...\fTo by nam reklo, zda tohle byla\rjejich skutecna zakladna.\f

en: I see...\f
cz: Aha...\f

en: That's brilliant, Commander Sonja!\f
cz: To je genialni, velitelko Sonjo!\f

en: As we can see, indirect fire will be\ruseful in this battle.\fThe other vital elements will be\rselecting the right first CO...\f...and using decoys effectively\ragainst the Black Cannons.\f
cz: Jak vidime, neprima palba bude\rv teto bitve uzitecna.\fDalsimi klicovymi prvky budou\rvolba spravneho prvniho velitele...\f...a ucinne pouziti vnadidel\rproti Cernym delum.\f

en: OK,\e let's go!\f
cz: OK,\e jdeme!\f

en: Lord Sturm!\e\e\rThe Black Cannons have been--\f
cz: Pane Sturme!\e\e\rCerna dela byla--\f

en: Did you leak intel on the missile\rplatform to the enemy as I ordered?\f
cz: Vyzradil jsi nepriteli udaje o\rraketove plosine, jak jsem narridil?\f

en: Yes, sir.\fWe let one soldier be captured.\e\e\rHe will tell all in his interrogation.\f
cz: Ano, pane.\fNechali jsme zajmout jednoho vojaka.\e\e\rPri vyslechu vse poveda.\f

en: Good.\e It's time to end this game.\e\e\rOrder all units to the platform.\f
cz: Dobre.\e Je cas ukoncit tuto hru.\e\e\rPosli vsechny jednotky k plosine.\f

en: Yes, sir!\f
cz: Ano, pane!\f

en: They will follow the trail all the way\rto the missile platform.\fMy best troops will greet them there\rwith a storm of death.\fThen, \ebefore their very eyes,\e\rI will launch our missiles.\f
cz: Pojdou po stope az\rk raketove plosine.\fMe nejlepsi jednotky je tam uvitaji\rbouri smrti.\fPak, \eprrimo pred jejich zraky,\e\rodpalim nase rakety.\f

en: The enemy's constructing a missile\rplatform?\f
cz: Neprritel stavi raketovou\rplosinu?\f

en: Yes.\fThey're planning to launch missiles\rat Cosmo Land and other continents.\f
cz: Ano.\fChystaji se odpalit rakety na\rCosmo Land a dalsi kontinenty.\f

en: Is this intel reliable?\f
cz: Je tato informace spolehliva?\f

en: We heard it from a captured soldier.\fIntel we gathered on our own confirms\rhis story.\f
cz: Slyseli jsme to od zajateho vojaka.\fInformace, ktere jsme sami ziskali,\rjeho vypoved potvrzuji.\f

en: What are we waiting for?\e\e We have\rto attack that missile platform!\f
cz: Na co cekame?\e\e Musime\rzautocit na tu raketovou plosinu!\f

en: It's not that simple, Andy.\f
cz: Neni to tak jednoduche, Andy.\f

en: It's not? \eWhy?\f
cz: Neni? \eProc?\f

en: 'Cause it might be a trap.\f
cz: Protoze to muze byt past.\f

en: You've confirmed the intel, correct?\f
cz: Tu informaci jste potvrdili, ze?\f

en: Would a soldier who's fought so long\rbreak so easily?\e I wonder...\f
cz: Zlomil by se vojak, co bojoval tak\rdlouho, tak snadno?\e Zajimave...\f

en: I think it's best to assume that\rit's a snare.\f
cz: Mysim, ze je nejlepsi predpokladat,\rze je to past.\f

en: Well, even so, we can't sit in\rport forever.\fWe need to end this quickly while\rtroop morale is high.\f
cz: I tak ale nemuzeme sedet\rv pristavu vecne.\fMusime to rychle ukoncit, dokud\rje morale vojsk vysoke.\f

en: Hmmm...\f
cz: Hmmm...\f

en: Aaaaah! \eI can't stand it!\e How\rlong are we gonna talk about this?!\fIf the enemy's at the missile platform,\e\rthen let's blast it to bits!\f
cz: Aaaaah! \eUz to nevydrzim!\e Jak\rdlouho o tom budeme mluvit?!\fKdyz je neprritel na raketove plosine,\e\rtak ji rozneseme na kousky!\f

en: Andy, \eyour mouth's gettin' ahead\rof your brain again...\f
cz: Andy, \etva pusa zase predbiha\rtvuj mozek...\f

en: No.\e I think the boy's got the right\ridea.\f
cz: Ne.\e Myslim, ze ten kluk ma pravdu.\f

en: Huh?\f
cz: Co?\f

en: I concur.\e\e We must attack sometime.\fIf they're waiting for us at the\rplatform, \eit saves us the time\fand the annoyance of looking\rfor them.\f
cz: Souhlasim.\e\e Nekdy zautocit musime.\fKdyz na nas cekaji u plosiny,\e\rusetri nam to cas\fa otravne hledani.\f

en: I get what you're sayin'.\fIf you're looking for crawdads,\ryou gotta turn over some rocks.\fThat's a pretty sound principle.\f
cz: Chapu, co rikas.\fKdyz hledas raky,\rmusis prevracet kameny.\fTo je celkem rozumna zasada.\f

en: I hear no objections.\fThen let us begin our advance\ron the missile platform.\f
cz: Neslysim zadne namitky.\fTak zacneme s postupem\rna raketovou plosinu.\f

en: Waaaahooooo!\e Let's get 'em!\f
cz: Waaaahuraaa!\e Jdeme na ne!\f

en: I'll win next time, too!
cz: Priste taky vyhraju!

en: Ha ha ha...\rPiece of cake!
cz: Ha ha ha...\rHracka!

en: Next time's for real.\rI won't lose focus.
cz: Priste to bude naostro.\rNeztratim soustredeni.

en: We do not know what\rit means to lose!
cz: Nevime, co znamena\rprohravat!

en: Yaaaawn... My, oh my.\rOne more nut to crack.
cz: Iaaach... No teda.\rJeste jeden orisek.

en: I'll do my best\rnext time, too!
cz: I priste se budu\rsnazit ze vsech sil!

en: My blade is eager for\rthe next challenge!
cz: Muj mec touzi po\rdalsi vyzve!

en: Our enemy is tough,\rbut we won't lose!
cz: Nas neprritel je tuhy,\rale neprohrajeme!

en: My chute's all packed\rfor the final jump!
cz: Padak mam sbaleny\rna posledni skok!

en: This is the beginning\rof the end.
cz: Tohle je zacatek\rkonce.

en: I'm just glad I\rsurvived that...
cz: Jsem rad, ze jsem\rto prezil...

en: For our troops' sake,\rwe must end this!
cz: Kvuli nasim vojakum\rto musime ukoncit!

en: It is the Black Hole citadel after\rall.\e It's supposed to be tough.\f
cz: Je to prece citadela Black Hole.\e\rMa byt tuha.\f

en: I did notice one thing, \ethe enemy units\raren't coming out past the pipe.\fIn that case, if we hit the pipe\rfrom the outside with indirect fire...\f
cz: Jedne veci jsem si vsimla, \eneprritelske\rjednotky nevychazeji za potrubi.\fV tom pripade, kdyz potrubi zasahneme\rzvenku neprimou palbou...\f

en: You've done it, again, Sonja!\f
cz: Zase ti to vyslo, Sonjo!\f

en: Indirect fire? \eSounds like you're\rplaying my song.\f
cz: Neprima palba? \eTo zni jako\rmoje pisnicka.\f

en: Rockets are vehicular units, too.\e\e\rSo I believe I'll be useful here.\fYou know, the Black Cannon targets\rthe most expensive units first.\fLet's capitalize on that and make\rgood use of decoys.\f
cz: Rakety jsou taky vozidla.\e\e\rTakze verim, ze tu budu uzitecny.\fVis, Cerne delo si nejdriv bere\rna musku ty nejdrazsi jednotky.\fVyuzijme toho a dobre\rpouzijme vnadidla.\f

en: All right! \eWe'll definitely win next time!\e\rC'mon, everybody!\e We can do it!\f
cz: Dobre! \ePriste urcite vyhrajeme!\e\rNo tak, vsichni!\e Dokazeme to!\f

en: It's the Black Hole citadel after\rall. \eIt's supposed to be tough.\f
cz: Je to prece citadela Black Hole.\e\rMa byt tuha.\f

en: Uh...Commander Nell?\e What do we\rneed to do to win?\f
cz: Ehm...velitelko Nell?\e Co musime\rudelat, abychom vyhrali?\f

en: Colin!\e If you have questions of\rstrategy,\e you should be asking me!\f
cz: Coline!\e Kdyz mas otazky ohledne\rstrategie,\e mel by ses ptat me!\f

en: Let's see...\e The troops guarding both\rflanks should grab those bases.\fIf we can defeat their infantry, we\rwon't have to worry about any\fproperties being captured.\f
cz: Tak se podivame...\e Jednotky strezici\roba kridla by mely zabrat ty zakladny.\fKdyz porazime jejich pechotu, nebudeme\rse muset bat o zadny\fzabrany majetek.\f

en: Is no one listening to me!?\f
cz: To me nikdo neposloucha!?\f

en: I don't think we need pursue their\rnaval units too far.\fAfter all, they've no means of\rrefueling.\f
cz: Nemyslim, ze musime jejich lode\rpronasledovat prilis daleko.\fStejne nemaji jak\rdoplnit palivo.\f

en: The units guarding the center position\rhave the biggest burden.\fThey'll have to keep their wits about\rthem to avoid being routed.\f
cz: Jednotky strezici stredovou pozici\rmaji nejvetsi brimeno.\fBudou muset mit oci na stopkach,\raby nebyly rozprraseny.\f

en: Then that is the role for Kanbei!\e\rI will show the might of my troops!\f
cz: Pak je to role pro Kanbeiho!\e\rUkazu silu svych jednotek!\f

en: All right! \eWe'll definitely win next time!\e\rC'mon, everybody!\e We can do it!\f
cz: Dobre! \ePriste urcite vyhrajeme!\e\rNo tak, vsichni!\e Dokazeme to!\f

en: Lash,\e is construction on the missile\rplatform completed?\f
cz: Lash,\e je stavba raketove\rplosiny dokoncena?\f

en: I think it's going to take a little\rmore time.\f
cz: Myslim, ze to bude jeste\rchvili trvat.\f

en: How much?\f
cz: Jak dlouho?\f

en: About 3...\e\rNo, about 40 days.\e Maybe...\f
cz: Asi 3...\e\rNe, asi 40 dni.\e Mozna...\f

en: I will not wait that long.\e\e\rFinish it in 30 days.\f
cz: Tak dlouho cekat nebudu.\e\e\rDokonci to za 30 dni.\f

en: Do you understand?\f
cz: Rozumis?\f

en: OK, \eI'll try...\f
cz: OK, \ezkusim to...\f

en: And how is the Deathray?\f
cz: A jak je na tom Paprsek smrti?\f

en: It's fine.\e\e You can use it now.\e\rI even fixed it, too!\fNow it won't damage our troops\rwhen it's fired.\fIt does need 7 days to build up\renough energy to fire, though.\f
cz: Je v poradku.\e\e Uz ho muzete pouzit.\e\rDokonce jsem ho i opravila!\fTeted pri vypalu neposkodi\rnase jednotky.\fPotrebuje ale 7 dni, aby nashromazdil\rdost energie na vypal.\f

en: Hm.\e\e\r7 days...\e\e I'll not forget.\f
cz: Hm.\e\e\r7 dni...\e\e Nezapomenu.\f

en: Hey! I think I see it!\e\e\rThe missile platform!\f
cz: Hej! Asi to vidim!\e\e\rRaketova plosina!\f

en: Here we go...\f
cz: Tak jdeme na to...\f

en: Look what I've found.\f
cz: Podivejme, co jsem nasel.\f

en: You...\e You're Sturm!\f
cz: Ty...\e Ty jsi Sturm!\f

en: And you're the little girl who likes\rplaying with soldiers.\fHere you are again, sneaking around\rwhere you don't belong.\f
cz: A ty jsi ta holcicka, co si rada\rhraje s vojacky.\fA zase tady slidis tam,\rkam nepatris.\f

en: Sonja's not alone.\fWe're all here.\e\e\rDifferent place, \esame cast.\f
cz: Sonja neni sama.\fJsme tady vsichni.\e\e\rJine misto, \estejna sestava.\f

en: You're all here?\e\e\rThen you shall all taste despair.\fFor you shall witness the destruction\rof your world when my missile strikes.\f
cz: Jste tu vsichni?\e\e\rPak vsichni okusite zoufalstvi.\fNebot spatrite zkazu sveho sveta,\raz udeeri ma raketa.\f

en: As long as we're alive,\e\rthat will never happen.\f
cz: Dokud jsme nazivu,\e\rto se nikdy nestane.\f

en: Empty words, worm.\e The missile\rplatform is beyond your reach.\f
cz: Prazdna slova, cervu.\e Raketova\rplosina je mimo tvuj dosah.\f

en: What is that supposed to mean?\f
cz: Co to ma znamenat?\f

en: Enough talk.\e\e\rI would see your \epower.\f
cz: Dost reci.\e\e\rRad bych videl tvou \esilu.\f

en: Hey! \eWait a...\e\e\rBeyond our reach? \eIt's right...\f
cz: Hej! \ePockej...\e\e\rMimo nas dosah? \eVzdyt je tam...\f

en: Ohmigosh!\e We've just received report\rof a giant laser blocking the platform!\f
cz: Paneboze!\e Prave jsme dostali zpravu\ro obrim laseru, co bloskuje plosinu!\f

en: That would explain why the old boy\rwas so doggone sure of himself.\f
cz: To by vysvetlovalo, proc si byl\rten stary tak zatrolene jisty.\f

en: In that case, \ewe should strike now,\rwhile we have the chance.\f
cz: V tom pripade \ebychom meli uderit\rted, dokud mame sanci.\f

en: It doesn't look like we'll be able\rto avoid that contraption.\f
cz: Nevypada to, ze se tomu\rprristroji vyhneme.\f

en: So we weaken his defenses,\e attack\rthe platform,\e and stop the launch...\f
cz: Takze oslabime jeho obranu,\e\rzautocime na plosinu\fa zastavime odpal...\f

en: That sounds like a plan I can\rget behind!\f
cz: To zni jako plan, ktery\rmuzu podporit!\f

en: Let us aim for the laser.\e\e\rMove out, everyone!\f
cz: Zamerme se na laser.\e\e\rVyrazte, vsichni!\f

en: You are fodder for my laser.\f
cz: Jste potravou pro muj laser.\f

en: Lord Sturm!\fJust as promised,\e the missile will\rbe ready to launch tomorrow!\f
cz: Pane Sturme!\fJak slibeno,\e raketa bude\rpripravena k odpalu zitra!\f

en: Well done.\e\e We shall use it to\rsalute the Black Hole Army.\f
cz: Vyborne.\e\e Pouzijeme ji k pozdravu\rarmade Black Hole.\f

en: Tee hee hee!\e I can't wait!\e It'll be\rlike a big fireworks display!\f
cz: Chi chi chi!\e Nemuzu se dockat!\e Bude\rto jako velky ohnostroj!\f

en: My...\e My Deathray...\f
cz: Muj...\e Muj Paprsek smrti...\f

en: The enemy's weakening!\e\e Attack\rthe platform, and halt that launch!\f
cz: Neprritel slabne!\e\e Zautocte\rna plosinu a zastavte ten odpal!\f

en: C'mon, everybody!\e Let's go!\f
cz: No tak, vsichni!\e Jdeme!\f

en: All right!\e\e\rThat platform's goin' down!\f
cz: Dobre!\e\e\rTa plosina pujde k zemi!\f

en: Understood!\e\e All right, troops.\e\rFocus your fire on that platform!\f
cz: Rozumim!\e\e Dobre, vojaci.\e\rSoustredte palbu na tu plosinu!\f

en: Leave this to me.\e\e\rI'll show you how it's done!\f
cz: Tohle nechte na mne.\e\e\rUkazu vam, jak se to dela!\f

en: Listen up, y'all!\e\e\rLet's mop up and skedaddle for home!\f
cz: Poslouchejte, vsichni!\e\e\rDodelame to a frnkneme domu!\f

en: Ye-\eYes, ma'am!\e\e\rQuickly! \eLet's hit the platform!\f
cz: A-\eAno, pani!\e\e\rRychle! \eZautocme na plosinu!\f

en: We will do our duty.\e\e\rSoldiers!\e Attack!!!\f
cz: Splnime svou povinnost.\e\e\rVojaci!\e Utok!!!\f

en: This is the end.\e\e\rOur goal is that launch platform!\f
cz: Tohle je konec.\e\e\rNasim cilem je ta odpalovaci plosina!\f

en: Let's put an end to this once\rand for all. \eAll together now.\f
cz: Skoncime s tim jednou\rprovzdy. \eVsichni spolecne.\f

en: The moment of victory is at hand.\e\e\rThe platform must fall! \eHit it now!!!\f
cz: Okamzik vitezstvi je na dosah.\e\e\rPlosina musi padnout! \eUderte ted!!!\f

en: We're almost there.\e\e\rStand tall, sailors!\f
cz: Uz jsme skoro tam.\e\e\rVzhuru, namornici!\f

en: Hit that platform with everything\ryou've got!\e Nothing else matters!\f
cz: Uderte na tu plosinu vsim,\rco mate!\e Na nicem jinem nezalezi!\f

en: Lord Sturm!\e\e\rThe missile platform... \eIt won't hold!\f
cz: Pane Sturme!\e\e\rRaketova plosina... \eNevydrzi!\f

en: The missile must be launched.\f
cz: Raketa musi byt odpalena.\f

en: It's impossible...\e\e Eeeeek!\f
cz: To je nemozne...\e\e Iiiii!\f

en: The missile launch platform is\rcompletely inoperable.\f
cz: Odpalovaci plosina raket je\rzcela nefunkcni.\f

en: YES!!\f
cz: ANO!!\f

en: I have come so far...\f
cz: Dosel jsem az sem...\f

en: You're next on this list, Sturm!\f
cz: Ty jsi dalsi na rade, Sturme!\f

en: ...only to be stopped by you again.\fI will not let it end here.\fI will sacrifice my own flesh,\e and\rall of you...\f
cz: ...jen abych byl zase tebou zastaven.\fNedovolim, aby to tady skoncilo.\fObetuji vlastni telo,\e a vy\rvsichni...\f

en: ...will join me \ein death!!!\f
cz: ...se ke mne pridate \eve smrti!!!\f

en: Whoa! \eHold it!\e\rWhat're you planning?\f
cz: Hej! \eZadrz!\e\rCo to pl--anujes?\f

en: A self-destruct device?\f
cz: Sebedestrukcni zarizeni?\f

en: Possum spit!\e\rMaxie! \eBack off!\f
cz: U vsech rohatych!\e\rMaxie! \eUstup!\f

en: You jerk!\f
cz: Ty hajzle!\f

en: Andy!\f
cz: Andy!\f

en: You think for one second that we're\rgoing to let you get away with this!?\f
cz: Myslis si jen na vterinu, ze ti\rtohle nechame projit!?\f

en: This...\e This worm...\f
cz: Tenhle...\e Tenhle cerv...\f

en: I...am...not...a...WORM!!!\e I'm Andy!\e\rI'm a CO in the Orange Star Army!!!\f
cz: Ja...nejsem...zadny...CERV!!!\e Jsem Andy!\e\rJsem velitel armady Orange Star!!!\f

en: No! \eAndy!\e\rRun away!\f
cz: Ne! \eAndy!\e\rUtec!\f

en: Andy!\fEveryone! \eGet back!\f
cz: Andy!\fVsichni! \eZpatky!\f

en: Chance is a fickle thing. You never\rknow when it will come your way.\f
cz: Sance je vrtkava vec. Nikdy nevis,\rkdy se ti naskytne.\f

en: Who?\e\e Hawke?\f
cz: Kdo?\e\e Hawke?\f

en: Sturm...\eI think it's time for you to go!\e\e\rBlack Storm!!!\f
cz: Sturme...\eMyslim, ze je cas, abys sel!\e\e\rBlack Storm!!!\f

en: Gaaaaaah!!!\e\e\rHawke...\eyou \etrai...tor...\f
cz: Gaaaaaah!!!\e\e\rHawke...\ety \ezra...dce...\f

en: Good riddance.\f
cz: Dobre, ze je pryc.\f

en: But\e\e why?\e\rWhy would you...\f
cz: Ale\e\e proc?\e\rProc bys...\f

en: Lord...Sturm...\e\rHawke, \ewhat have you done?\f
cz: Pane...Sturme...\e\rHawke, \eco jsi to udelal?\f

en: As of now,\e I am the commander-\rin-chief of the Black Hole Army.\fIf you have anything to say,\e\rcome forward, or hold your peace.\f
cz: Od teto chvile jsem vrchnim\rvelitelem armady Black Hole.\fKdyz chcete neco rici,\e\rpredstupte, nebo mlcte.\f

en: What's this all about?\e\rWeren't you in league with Sturm?\f
cz: O co tu jde?\e\rNebyl jsi spolcen se Sturmem?\f

en: I wanted to test my power.\e\rTo see how strong I could become.\fI'm interested in nothing save myself.\e\e\rThat was my purpose.\e Nothing more.\f
cz: Chtel jsem si vyzkouset svou silu.\e\rVidet, jak silnym se muzu stat.\fNezajima me nic krome me samotneho.\e\e\rTo byl muj cil.\e Nic vic.\f

en: In any case, \eyou saved us all.\f
cz: Tak ci tak, \ezachranil jsi nas vsechny.\f

en: Does that eliminate his sins?\e I won't\rforget what you did to Green Earth!\f
cz: To smaze jeho hrichy?\e Nezapomenu,\rco jsi udelal Green Earth!\f

en: Hah...\e I didn't ask you to.\fI'm through with all of you.\e\e\rI'm satisfied with your performances.\f
cz: Cha...\e O to jsem te nezadal.\fS vami vsemi jsem skoncil.\e\e\rJsem spokojen s vasimi vykony.\f

en: What?\e How about this...\e We continue\rthis fight until I'm satisfied!\f
cz: Coze?\e A co takhle...\e Budeme\rbojovat dal, dokud nebudu spokojen ja!\f

en: Eagle!\e That's enough!\e Our troops\rare on the brink of collapse.\fThere's nothing to be gained by\rfighting any longer.\f
cz: Eagle!\e To staci!\e Nase jednotky\rjsou na pokraji zhrouceni.\fDalsim bojem se nic\rneziska.\f

en: I may be out of line, sir...\e\rBut I believe he's correct.\f
cz: Mozna to neprislusi mne, pane...\e\rAle myslim, ze ma pravdu.\f

en: The Black Hole Army is in ruins.\e\e\rThey're no match for you now.\fI'll take them and withdraw.\f
cz: Armada Black Hole je v troskach.\e\e\rUz se vam nevyrovnaji.\fVezmu je a stahnu se.\f

en: Hawke! \e\eI'm with you all the way!\f
cz: Hawke! \e\eJsem s tebou az do konce!\f

en: Me, too!\e\rThis looks like it could be fun!\f
cz: Ja taky!\e\rTohle by mohla byt zabava!\f

en: I...\e\e\rI follow the strong.\f
cz: Ja...\e\e\rJa nasleduji silne.\f

en: Then prepare your troops.\e\rWe're leaving this place.\f
cz: Tak pripravte sve jednotky.\e\rOpoustime toto misto.\f

en: Hold it, Hawke!\fWhat you've done to Macro Land is\runforgivable!\f
cz: Zadrz, Hawke!\fCo jsi udelal Macro Landu, je\rneodpustitelne!\f

en: But...\fYou saved me...\e\e\rYou saved all of us.\e\e Thanks.\f
cz: Ale...\fZachranil jsi me...\e\e\rZachranil jsi nas vsechny.\e\e Diky.\f

en: Hah...\fThough the Black Hole Army's gone,\e\ryou would do well to remember me.\fUntil next time!\f
cz: Cha...\fI kdyz je armada Black Hole pryc,\e\rudelate dobre, kdyz si me budete pamatovat.\fAz priste!\f

en: He had his say and left...\e\rI wonder if he'll attack again someday.\f
cz: Rekl sve a odesel...\e\rZajima me, jestli jednou zase zautoci.\f

en: It's hard to say.\fIf he does, though,\e we'll just\rhave to drive him back.\f
cz: Tezko rici.\fKdyz ano,\e prosrte ho\rzase budeme muset zahnat.\f

en: We'll have to spend some time\rpreparing if we're going to do that.\f
cz: Budeme se muset nejaky cas\rpripravovat, kdyz to chceme zvladnout.\f

en: We must help heal the battle-ravaged\rsoil of Macro Land as well.\f
cz: Musime take pomoci zhojit valkou\rzpustosenou zemi Macro Landu.\f

en: All of that can wait!\e We won!\r\e\e...Well, we did, didn't we?\f
cz: To vsechno pocka!\e Vyhrali jsme!\r\e\e...No, vyhrali, ze?\f

en: Yes, we did.\f
cz: Ano, vyhrali.\f

en: Well, \elet's celebrate!\e\rIt's party time! \ePaaaarty!\f
cz: Tak \eoslavme to!\e\rJe cas na party! \ePaaaarty!\f

en: Figures. \eWe barely escape death,\e\rand he wants cake and ice cream.\f
cz: Jasne. \eSotva unikneme smrti,\e\ra on chce dort a zmrzlinu.\f

en: PARTY!!!\f
cz: PARTY!!!\f

en: Macro Land was free at last, and\rthe Black Hole Army had been driven\rfrom its shores.\r\rBut peace can be a fragile thing.\rBe vigilant... Be brave.
cz: Macro Land byl konecne svobodny a\rarmada Black Hole byla vyhnana\rz jeho bremu.\r\rAle mir muze byt krehka vec.\rBudte bdeli... Budte stateci.

en: Hey, there! You all look\rlike you're in good spirits!\f
cz: Hej, vy tam! Vsichni vypadate,\rze mate dobrou naladu!\f

en: Isn't that...\e Hey, it's Hachi!\e\e\rWhat brings you all the way out here?\f
cz: Neni to...\e Hej, to je Hachi!\e\e\rCo te privadi az sem?\f

en: Well...\eI saw all of you in the heat\rof battle, \eand it got to me!\fI just had to come out and walk\ra battlefield again.\f
cz: No...\eVidel jsem vas vsechny v zaru\rbitvy, \ea dostalo me to!\fProste jsem si musel zase\rprojit bojiste.\f

en: The battle's over, sir...\f
cz: Bitva uz skoncila, pane...\f

en: Don't you believe it, laddie!\fThere's always the War Room, \eand\rother modes to boot!\f
cz: Tomu neverr, chlapce!\fVzdycky tu je War Room, \ea\rdalsi rezimy k tomu!\f

en: Wo ho ho ho.\e\e\rLong time, no see, Hachi.\f
cz: Vo ho ho ho.\e\e\rDlouho jsme se nevideli, Hachi.\f

en: Well I'll be... \eSensei!\e\e\rGood to see you looking so fit.\f
cz: No to mne podrz... \eSensei!\e\e\rRad te vidim v takove forme.\f

en: Do you know Sensei?\f
cz: Ty znas Senseie?\f

en: Yes. \eHachi and I were both pupils\runder Sensei's tutelage.\fI remember, \eSensei was at times\rgentle, \eat times harsher than...\f
cz: Ano. \eHachi a ja jsme byli oba zaky\rpod Senseiho vedenim.\fPamatuji si, \eSensei byl chvilemi\rlaskavy, \echvilemi prisnejsi nez...\f

en: Oh, c'mon, Kanbei!\e\rNo one wants to hear about that!\fTell me, \ewhat are everyone's plans\rfrom here on out?\f
cz: Ale no tak, Kanbei!\e\rO tom nikdo slyset nechce!\fRekni, \ejake ma kdo plany\rod ted dal?\f

en: I will return to my demolished hometown\rand start rebuilding.\f
cz: Vratim se do sveho zniceneho rodneho\rmesta a zacnu ho obnovovat.\f

en: Well, \ein that case, I'm going\rto help out, too.\f
cz: No, \ev tom pripade pomuzu\ri ja.\f

en: Yep, \eit's about time for me to\rmosey along as well.\f
cz: Jo, \eje cas, abych se taky\rvydal na cestu.\f

en: Yo, Grit.\e\e Are you ever coming\rback to Orange Star?\f
cz: Hej, Grit.\e\e Vratis se\rnekdy do Orange Star?\f

en: Hmm...\e Can't say for sure.\e\e Olaf's\rbeen pretty good to me, you know?\fAnd I do enjoy the slow pace\e and the\rfine cookin'.\fHey, Maxie...\e\e\rGive my regards to Nell, will ya?\f
cz: Hmm...\e Tezko rici.\e\e Olaf\rke mne byl dost hodny, vis?\fA ten klidny zivot\e a dobre\rjidlo si uzivam.\fHej, Maxie...\e\e\rPozdravuj ode mne Nell, jo?\f

en: Yeah...\f
cz: Jasne...\f

en: Let's see...\e\rI guess I'm off to the academy.\f
cz: Tak se podivame...\e\rAsi se vratim na akademii.\f

en: With this out of the way,\e maybe you\rcan work on improving your grades.\f
cz: Kdyz mas tohle z krku,\e mozna\rzapracujes na svych znamkach.\f

en: Hey!\e Just because we attended the\rsame school doesn't give you\fthe right to say stuff like that!\fBesides, \emy diligence may have made\rthe difference here today!\e Right?\f
cz: Hej!\e To, ze jsme chodili na stejnou\rskolu, ti nedava\fpravo rikat takove veci!\fKrome toho, \emoje pile mozna dnes\rrozhodla o vysledku!\e Ne?\f

en: Hee hee...\e\rRight.\f
cz: Chi chi...\e\rJasne.\f

en: As for us...\e We're going to be busy\rsetting things right for Green Earth.\f
cz: Co se nas tyce...\e Budeme mit plno\rprace s obnovou Green Earth.\f

en: Yes, we are.\e\e I'll go with you now\rso we can get started right away.\f
cz: Ano, budeme.\e\e Pujdu s tebou hned,\rabychom mohli zacit okamzite.\f

en: Afterward, \ewe strengthen our air\rforce!\fWe have to do better in the future\rto avoid things like this.\fAnd that means you, too, Jess.\e I'm\rgoing to work you harder than ever!\f
cz: Pote \eposilime nase letectvo!\fV budoucnu se musime polepsit,\rabychom se vyhnuli takovym vecem.\fA to plati i pro tebe, Jess.\e Budu\rte hnat vic nez kdy predtim!\f

en: That's fine.\e But there's something\relse we really need to do.\fAnd that's to make you into something\rother than a one-dimensional flyboy!\f
cz: To je fajn.\e Ale je tu jeste neco,\rco opravdu musime udelat.\fA to udelat z tebe neco vic\rnez jen jednostrunneho letce!\f

en: I've been wanting to do this for a long\rtime. \eYou and me, one on one.\fAs soon as we get back,\e I want you on\rthe training field.\fWe'll see who's better once and\rfor all!!!\f
cz: Uz dlouho jsem to chtel udelat.\e\rTy a ja, jeden na jednoho.\fJakmile se vratime,\e chci te videt\rna cvicisti.\fJednou provzdy uvidime, kdo\rje lepsi!!!\f

en: It will be my pleasure.\f
cz: Bude mi potesenim.\f

en: Ohhhh...\e\e\rNot this again...\e Somebody save me.\f
cz: Ohhhh...\e\e\rTohle uz zase ne...\e At me nekdo zachrani.\f

en: Ha ha ha...\e Everyone sure has a\rlot of work to do.\f
cz: Ha ha ha...\e Vsichni maji rozhodne\rspoustu prace.\f

en: Hey...\e\rWhat about the party?\f
cz: Hej...\e\rA co ta party?\f

en: All right, everybody.\e Nell, \eSami,\e\rAndy... \eOh!\e And you, too, Hachi!\fLet's head for home!\f
cz: Dobre, vsichni.\e Nell, \eSami,\e\rAndy... \eOh!\e A ty taky, Hachi!\fVyrazme domu!\f

en: OK.\e When we get back, make sure\ryou stop by the store and see me!\f
cz: OK.\e Az se vratime, urcite se\rstavte v obchode a navstivte me!\f

en: Good-bye, everyone!\e\e\rThanks!\e\e Thanks for everything!\f
cz: Sbohem, vsichni!\e\e\rDiky!\e\e Diky za vsechno!\f

en: Aw, man!\e\rThis stinks!\f
cz: Ach jo!\e\rTohle je na nic!\f

en: I'll never lose to\rthe likes of Sturm!
cz: Nikdy neprohraju s\rnekym jako Sturm!

en: He can keep trying, but\rhe'll never beat us!
cz: At to zkousi dal, ale\rnikdy nas neporazi!

en: That just about wraps\rthings up.
cz: Tim je to tak nejak\rvsechno hotovo.

en: In the end, Olaf\rstands victorious!
cz: Nakonec Olaf\rstoji jako vitez!

en: I sure hope this\rreally is the end.
cz: Pevne doufam, ze tohle\rje opravdu konec.

en: Now that was a\rlearning experience.
cz: To byla teda\rpoucna zkusenost.

en: A long and difficult\rwar it was.
cz: Byla to dlouha a\rtezka valka.

en: Old soldiers don't die.\rThey fade away. Bye!
cz: Stari vojaci neumiraji.\rJen se vytrati. Sbohem!

en: Now we rebuild the\rcontinent!
cz: Ted obnovime\rkontinent!

en: We're the best. No\rone can defeat us.
cz: Jsme nejlepsi. Nikdo\rnas neporazi.

en: Smooth sailing at last.\rIt's over.
cz: Konecne klidne vody.\rJe po vsem.

en: I can finally send\rmy troops home.
cz: Konecne mohu poslat\rsve vojaky domu.

en: Oh, no! \eA missile!\e It's launching!\f
cz: Ale ne! \eStrela!\e Odpaluji ji!\f

en: We didn't make it in time...\f
cz: Nestihli jsme to vcas...\f

en: We need to fall back and regroup.\fThat was bad, \ebut surely the\rwhole world hasn't been destroyed.\fWe can't let them fire another missile\rthough. We have to stop them.\f
cz: Musime ustoupit a preskupit se.\fBylo to zle, \eale snad neni\rcely svet zniceny.\fNesmime je ale nechat vypalit\rdalsi strelu. Musime je zastavit.\f

en: We need to rethink our strategy.\f
cz: Musime prehodnotit nasi strategii.\f

en: Sonja,\e\rdo you have any good ideas?\f
cz: Sonjo,\e\rmas nejaky dobry napad?\f

en: I do, Father.\e Leave it to me.\fThat Deathray is truly powerful,\e\rbut only in one direction.\fWhile the CO in the middle stops\rthe enemy on that small isle...\f
cz: Mam, otce.\e Nech to na mne.\fTen Deathray je opravdu mocny,\e\rale jen v jednom smeru.\fZatimco velitel uprostred zastavi\rnepritele na tom ostruvku...\f

en: The COs on the left and right break\rthrough the pipe and advance.\fTheir targets are the base and\rairport, correct?\f
cz: Velitele vlevo a vpravo prorazi\rtrubku a postoupi.\fJejich cile jsou zakladna a\rletiste, spravne?\f

en: You've got it, Nell.\f
cz: Mas to, Nell.\f

en: If you need power, I'm your man!\e\rI'll slice that pipe like butter!\f
cz: Kdyz potrebujes silu, jsem tu ja!\e\rRozkrojim tu trubku jak maslo!\f

en: Don't y'all forget, I'm the best\rmarksman there ever was.\fAnd I got some mighty big guns\raround here somewhere!\f
cz: Nezapomente, jsem nejlepsi\rostrelovac vsech dob.\fA nekde tu mam par pekne\rvelkych del!\f

en: I know I'm no Commander Grit,\e but\rI think I can be of service, too.\f
cz: Vim, ze nejsem velitel Grit,\e ale\rmyslim, ze take mohu byt uzitecny.\f

en: Lest you forget, I do have the best\rbombers available.\f
cz: Abys nezapomnel, mam ty nejlepsi\rbombardery, co existuji.\f

en: You're all so trustworthy.\fI have every confidence that victory\rwill be ours!\f
cz: Jste vsichni tak spolehlivi.\fJsem pevne presvedcen, ze vitezstvi\rbude nase!\f

en: Oh, no! \eFrom the platform! \eA missile!\f
cz: Ale ne! \eZ plosiny! \eStrela!\f

en: We didn't make it in time...\f
cz: Nestihli jsme to vcas...\f

en: We need to fall back and regroup.\fThat was bad, \ebut surely the\rwhole world hasn't been destroyed.\fWe can't let them fire another missile\rthough. We have to stop them.\f
cz: Musime ustoupit a preskupit se.\fBylo to zle, \eale snad neni\rcely svet zniceny.\fNesmime je ale nechat vypalit\rdalsi strelu. Musime je zastavit.\f

en: We need to rethink our strategy.\f
cz: Musime prehodnotit nasi strategii.\f

en: Sonja,\e\rdo you have any good ideas?\f
cz: Sonjo,\e\rmas nejaky dobry napad?\f

en: I do, Father.\e Leave it to me.\fFirst, the army in the center must\rattack the Black Cannon from behind.\fOnce the troops on the right and\rleft are assured safe passage,\feveryone can advance and attack at\ronce.\fDon't forget about the laser, either.\rIt fires every 7 days.\f
cz: Mam, otce.\e Nech to na mne.\fNejprve musi armada uprostred\rzautocit na Black Cannon zezadu.\fJakmile maji jednotky vpravo a\rvlevo zajistenu bezpecnou cestu,\fvsichni mohou postoupit a zautocit\rnajednou.\fNezapominejte ani na laser.\rPali kazdych 7 dni.\f

en: The pipe seam, \eBlack Cannon,\e\rminicannon, \eDeathray...\fStrong firepower is one thing that\rwould give us an advantage.\f
cz: Spara trubky, \eBlack Cannon,\e\rminicannon, \eDeathray...\fSilna palebna sila je neco, co\rby nam dalo vyhodu.\f

en: If you need power, I'm your man!\e\rI'll slice that pipe like butter!\f
cz: Kdyz potrebujes silu, jsem tu ja!\e\rRozkrojim tu trubku jak maslo!\f

en: Don't y'all forget, I'm the best\rmarksman there ever was.\fAnd I got some mighty big guns\raround here somewhere!\f
cz: Nezapomente, jsem nejlepsi\rostrelovac vsech dob.\fA nekde tu mam par pekne\rvelkych del!\f

en: Yellow Comet has Kanbei!\e\rMy superior troops are matchless!\f
cz: Yellow Comet ma Kanbeie!\e\rMe skvele jednotky nemaji soupere!\f

en: Lest you forget, I do have the best\rbombers available.\f
cz: Abys nezapomnel, mam ty nejlepsi\rbombardery, co existuji.\f

en: You're all so trustworthy.\fWe've made it this far,\e and I have\revery confidence victory will be ours!\fThe Black Hole Army is on the brink\rof defeat!\e Let's push 'em over!\f
cz: Jste vsichni tak spolehlivi.\fDosli jsme az sem,\e a jsem pevne\rpresvedcen, ze vitezstvi bude nase!\fBlack Hole Army je na pokraji\rporazky!\e Dorazme je!\f

en: Welcome to the map designer!\f
cz: Vitej v navrhari map!\f

en: We'll provide you with all the tools\ryou need to design your own maps!\f
cz: Dame ti vsechny nastroje, ktere\rpotrebujes k navrhu vlastnich map!\f

en: If you need instructions,\rchoose Help from the menu.\f
cz: Pokud potrebujes navod,\rvyber z menu Napovedu.\f

en: Press SELECT and\rthen choose Help.\f
cz: Stiskni SELECT a\rpak vyber Napovedu.\f

en: Help contains control explanations, as\rwell as rules and instructions for\fplaying on the maps you create.\f
cz: Napoveda vysvetluje ovladani a take\rpravidla a pokyny pro hrani\fna mapach, ktere vytvoris.\f

en: Enjoy!\f
cz: Bav se!\f

en: Map Requirements :
cz: Pozadavky na mapu :

en: At least two armies, with an HQ and
cz: Alespon dve armady, kazda s HQ a

en: one or more units or factories each.
cz: jednou ci vice jednotkami nebo tovarnami.

en: How to Play :
cz: Jak hrat :

en: Select this map in either
cz: Vyber tuto mapu v rezimu

en: Vs. mode or Link mode.
cz: Vs. nebo rezimu Link.

en: Place the terrain or unit.
cz: Umisti teren nebo jednotku.

en: Select the terrain or unit.
cz: Vyber teren nebo jednotku.

en: Open the unit-selection menu.
cz: Otevri menu vyberu jednotek.

en: Open the terrain-selection menu.
cz: Otevri menu vyberu terenu.

en: Display overhead map.
cz: Zobraz mapu shora.

en: There's no data.
cz: Zadna data.

cz: Zadna data.\f

cz: Prepsat soucasna data?\r\x17

cz: Ulozit?\r\x17

en: A rich, green plain.\rEasy to traverse,\rbut offers little\rdefensive cover.
cz: Bujna zelena plan.\rSnadny prechod, ale\rposkytuje malo\robranneho krytu.

en: A gentle, flowing\rriver. Only infantry\runits can ford\rrivers.
cz: Klidna tekouci reka.\rReky muze prebrodit\rjen pechota.

en: A steep mountain.\rInfantry units add\r3 to their vision\rrange from here.
cz: Strma hora. Pechota\rsi odtud zvysi\rdohled o 3.

en: In Fog of War, units\rhidden here can only\rbe seen by adjacent\runits and air units.
cz: V Mlze valky vidi\rzde skryte jednotky\rjen sousedni a\rvzdusne jednotky.

en: A paved road.\rEasy to traverse,\rbut offers little\rdefensive cover.
cz: Zpevnena cesta.\rSnadny prechod, ale\rposkytuje malo\robranneho krytu.

en: A normal city.\rGround units gain\rsupplies and HP\rin allied cities.
cz: Bezne mesto. Pozemni\rjednotky ziskaji ve\rspojeneckych mestech\rzasoby a HP.

en: A body of water.\rOnly naval and\rair units can\rtraverse seas.
cz: Vodni plocha. More\rmohou prekonat jen\rnamorni a vzdusne\rjednotky.

en: An army HQ. Battle\rends if it's \x83captured\x80.\rGround units get HP\rand supplies here.
cz: HQ armady. Pri \x83obsazeni\x80\rbitva konci. Pozemni\rjednotky zde ziskaji\rHP a zasoby.

en: An air base. Allied\rbases deploy, supply,\rand restore HP\rto air units.
cz: Letecka zakladna.\rSpojenecke zakl. zde\rnasazuji, zasobuji a\robnovuji HP letadlum.

en: A naval base. Allied\rbases deploy, supply,\rand restore HP\rto naval units.
cz: Namorni zakladna.\rSpojenecke zakl. zde\rnasazuji, zasobuji a\robnovuji HP lodim.

en: A bridge allows\runits to traverse\rrivers, but offers\rno terrain benefits.
cz: Most umoznuje\rjednotkam prejit\rreky, ale nedava\rzadne vyhody terenu.

en: A sandy shoal.\r\x82Lander\x80 units\rload and unload\runits here.
cz: Piscita melcina.\rJednotky \x82Lander\x80\rzde nakladaji a\rvykladaji jednotky.

en: A base. Allied bases\rdeploy, supply,\rand restore HP\rto ground units.
cz: Zakladna. Spojenecke\rzakl. nasazuji,\rzasobuji a obnovuji\rHP pozemnim jednotkam.

en: A Black Hole pipeline.\rThick armor renders\rit indestructible. No\runits can pass it.
cz: Potrubi Black Hole.\rSilny panic ho cini\rneznicitelnym. Zadna\rjednotka jim neprojde.

en: A Black Hole pipeline.\rThe armor is weaker\rhere than on other\rsections of the pipe.
cz: Potrubi Black Hole.\rPanic je zde slabsi\rnez na ostatnich\rcastech potrubi.

en: A missile silo. Has a\rhuge blast radius &\runlimited range, but\rcan only fire once.
cz: Raketove silo. Ma\robri dosah vybuchu i\rneomezeny dostrel,\rale pali jen jednou.

en: In Fog of War, units\rhidden here can only\rbe seen by adjacent\runits and air units.
cz: V Mlze valky vidi\rzde skryte jednotky\rjen sousedni a\rvzdusne jednotky.

en: A Black Hole lab.\rNew tank designs\rare currently being\rresearched here.
cz: Laborator Black Hole.\rPrave se zde vyvijeji\rnove navrhy tanku.

en: A Lash invention.\rA powerful cannon\rwith unlimited ammo\rand a huge range.
cz: Lashin vynalez.\rMocne delo s\rneomezenou munici\ra obrim dostrelem.

en: A Lash invention.\rLess powerful than\rthe cannon, but still\rdevastating.
cz: Lashin vynalez.\rSlabsi nez velke\rdelo, ale stale\rzniciujici.

en: A Lash invention.\rThis laser slices\rthrough friend\rand foe alike.
cz: Lashin vynalez.\rTento laser projde\rpritelem i\rnepritelem stejne.

en: A large volcano.\rIt erupts from time\rto time. No units\rcan traverse here.
cz: Velka sopka. Cas od\rcasu vybuchne. Zadna\rjednotka tudy\rneprojde.

en: A Black Hole\rfactory. It can\rdeploy any and all\rtypes of units.
cz: Tovarna Black Hole.\rMuze nasadit\rjakekoli a vsechny\rtypy jednotek.

en: Black Hole's pride\rand joy. This mighty\rlaser cannon fires\revery 7 days.
cz: Pycha a radost Black\rHole. Toto mocne\rlaserove delo pali\rkazdych 7 dni.

en: Black Hole property.\rIt's heavily armored\rand cannot be\rentered or attacked.
cz: Objekt Black Hole.\rJe silne pancirovany\ra nelze do nej vstoupit\rani na nej zautocit.

cz: Jednotky

cz: Jednotka

en: HP

en: Gas
cz: Palivo

en: Rounds
cz: Munice

en: Select CO
cz: Vyber CO

en: Select Color
cz: Vyber barvu

en: A competent Orange\rStar CO. Attended\rmilitary school with\rGrit and Max.\rHit: Willful students\rMiss: Downtime
cz: Schopny velitel\rOrange Star. Chodil\rna vojenskou skolu s\rGritem a Maxem.\rMa rad: zvedave zaky\rNemusi: necinnost

en: Sometimes strikes\rwith more force than\rexpected. She'll be\rthe first to tell you\rshe was born lucky.
cz: Obcas udeti vetsi\rsilou, nez se ceka.\rRada vam rekne, ze\rse narodila se\rstestim.

en: Improves her chance\rto strike with\rincreased firepower,\rand damages multiple\rfoes. Lucky!
cz: Zvysi sanci na uder\rs vetsi palebnou\rsilou a zasahne vice\rnepratel. Stesti!

en: Improves her chance\rto strike with\rincreased firepower,\rand damages even\rmore foes. Lucky!
cz: Zvysi sanci na uder\rs vetsi palebnou\rsilou a zasahne jeste\rvice nepratel. Stesti!

en: A mechanical boy\rwonder. Impulsive to a\rfault, he's fiercely\rprotective of friends.\rHit: Mechanics\rMiss: Waking up early
cz: Mlady technicky\rzazrak. Az prilis\rimpulzivni, urputne\rchrani sve pratele.\rMa rad: mechaniku\rNemusi: rano vstavat

en: No real weaknesses.\rProficient with air,\rsea, and land units.\rReady to fight where-\rever and whenever.
cz: Zadne slabiny. Zdatny\rse vzdusnymi, namor-\rnimi i pozemnimi jed-\rnotkami. Pripraven\rbojovat kdekoli a kdykoli.

en: Restores 2 HP\rto all units.
cz: Obnovi 2 HP\rvsem jednotkam.

en: Restores 5 HP to all\runits. Firepower\rrises, and unit\rmovement increases\rby 1 space.
cz: Obnovi 5 HP vsem\rjednotkam. Vzroste\rpalebna sila a pohyb\rjednotek se zvysi\ro 1 pole.

en: A brave and loyal\rfriend and an earnest\rwarrior who hates\rdeception and trickery.\rHit: Weight training\rMiss: Studying
cz: Statecny a verny\rpritel a opravdovy\rbojovnik, jenz nesnasi\rlsti a podvody.\rMa rad: posilovani\rNemusi: uceni

en: Non-infantry direct-\rcombat units are tops.\rIndirect-combat troops\rare limited in range\rand firepower.
cz: Nepechotni jednotky\rprimeho boje jsou\rspicka. Jednotky\rneprimeho boje maji\romezeny dosah i silu.

en: Firepower of direct-\rcombat units rises\rslightly, and unit\rmovement increases\rby 1 space.
cz: Palebna sila jednotek\rprimeho boje mirne\rvzroste a pohyb\rjednotek se zvysi\ro 1 pole.

en: Direct-combat units\rreceive firepower\rboost, and their\rmovement increases\rby 2 spaces.
cz: Jednotky primeho boje\rziskaji posilu palebne\rsily a jejich pohyb\rse zvysi o 2 pole.

en: A pompous braggart\rwhose tactical prowess\rhas earned him the\rrespect of his peers.\rHit: Warm boots\rMiss: Rain clouds
cz: Domyslivy chvastoun,\rjehoz takticke umeni\rmu ziskalo respekt\rkolegu.\rMa rad: teple boty\rNemusi: destove mraky

en: Winter weather poses\rno problem for Olaf or\rhis troops. Rain,\rhowever, does. His\rgruff nature belies\rhis overall competence.
cz: Zimni pocasi neni pro\rOlafa ani jeho vojaky\rproblem. Dest ale ano.\rJeho drsna povaha\rskryva jeho celkovou\rschopnost.

en: Causes snow to fall,\rwhich adversely\raffects all units\rexcept his own.
cz: Spusti snezeni, ktere\rnepriznive ovlivni\rvsechny jednotky\rkrome jeho vlastnich.

en: A mighty blizzard\rreduces enemy\rmovement and causes\r2 HP of damage to\rall deployed enemy\rtroops.
cz: Mocna vanice snizi\rpohyb nepritele a\rzpusobi 2 HP poskozeni\rvsem nasazenym\rnepratelskym jednotkam.

en: A strong-willed soldier\rwho backs up Max and\rAndy. A graduate of\rspecial-forces training.\rHit: Chocolate\rMiss: Cowards
cz: Houzevnata vojacka,\rktera kryje Maxe a\rAndyho. Absolventka\rvycviku specialnich sil.\rMa rada: cokoladu\rNemusi: zbabelce

en: Being an infantry\rspecialist, her foot\rsoldiers move farther,\rcapture faster, and\rcause more damage.\rWeak vs. vehicles.\r
cz: Jako specialistka na\rpechotu maji jeji pesi\rvetsi dosah, rychleji\robsazuji a vice\rposkozuji.\rSlaba proti vozidlum.\r

en: Infantry and mech\runits receive a\rmovement bonus of\r1 space. Their attack\rstrength increases\ras well.
cz: Pechota a mechy\rziskaji bonus pohybu\r1 pole. Zvysi se i\rjejich sila utoku.

en: Increases all foot\rsoldiers' movement\rrange by 2 spaces.\rThey can capture in\rone turn even if\rthey're not at full HP.
cz: Zvysi pohyb vsech\rpesich o 2 pole.\rMohou obsadit za\rjeden tah, i kdyz\rnemaji plne HP.

en: Laid-back style masks\rhis dependability.\rA peerless marksman.\rWorks well with Olaf.\rHit: Cats\rMiss: Rats
cz: Pohodovy styl skryva\rjeho spolehlivost.\rBezkonkurencni strelec.\rDobre vychazi s Olafem.\rMa rad: kocky\rNemusi: krysy

en: Range for distance\rweapons is 1 space\rgreater than other\rCOs. They cause more\rdamage, too. Weak in\rdirect combat.
cz: Dostrel zbrani na\rdalku je o 1 pole\rvetsi nez u jinych CO.\rTake vice poskozuji.\rSlaby v primem boji.

en: Increases range of\rdistance weapons by\r1 space. Attack\rstrength of these\runits also increases.
cz: Zvysi dostrel zbrani\rna dalku o 1 pole.\rZvysi se i sila\rutoku techto jednotek.

en: Distance weapons can\rshoot 2 spaces\rfarther than normal.\rThey also receive a\rfirepower bonus.
cz: Zbrane na dalku\rstrili o 2 pole dale\rnez obvykle. Take\rziskaji bonus\rpalebne sily.

en: The emperor of Yellow\rComet. A skilled CO\rwho has a soft spot\rfor his daughter.\rHit: Sonja\rMiss: Computers
cz: Cisar Yellow Comet.\rSchopny velitel, ktery\rma slabost pro svou\rdceru.\rMa rad: Sonju\rNemusi: pocitace

en: All units have high\roffensive and\rdefensive abilities,\rbut are expensive\rto deploy.
cz: Vsechny jednotky maji\rvysoke utocne i\robranne schopnosti,\rale jejich nasazeni\rje drahe.

en: Increases attack\rstrength of all units.
cz: Zvysi silu utoku\rvsech jednotek.

en: Strengthens offensive\rand defensive abilities\rof all units. Damage\rinflicted when counter-\rattacking is multiplied\rby 1.5.
cz: Posili utocne i obranne\rschopnosti vsech\rjednotek. Poskozeni pri\rprotiutoku se nasobi\r1,5.

en: Kanbei's daughter.\rCool and collected,\rshe likes to plan\rbefore making a move.\rHit: Computers\rMiss: Bugs
cz: Kanbeiova dcera.\rChladna a klidna, rada\rplanuje, nez se\rk necemu rozhodne.\rMa rada: pocitace\rNemusi: chyby

en: All units have an\rextended vision\rrange in Fog of War.\rHides HP intel from\rfoes. Counterattacks\rare slightly stronger.
cz: Vsechny jednotky maji\rrozsireny dohled v\rMlze valky. Skryva HP\rpred nepriteli. Proti-\rutoky jsou o neco\rsilnejsi.

en: Increases the vision\rrange of all units by\r1 space and allows\rthem to see into woods\rand reefs.
cz: Zvysi dohled vsech\rjednotek o 1 pole a\rumozni jim videt do\rlesu a utesu.

en: Increases the vision\rrange of all units by\r1 space and allows\rthem to see into woods\rand reefs. Counter-\rattacks are stronger.
cz: Zvysi dohled vsech\rjednotek o 1 pole a\rumozni jim videt do\rlesu a utesu. Proti-\rutoky jsou silnejsi.

en: Green Earth's daring\rpilot hero. Joined the\rair force to honor his\rfather's legacy.\rHit: Lucky goggles\rMiss: Swimming
cz: Odvazny pilot a hrdina\rGreen Earth. Vstoupil\rk letectvu na pocest\rodkazu sveho otce.\rMa rad: stastne bryle\rNemusi: plavani

en: Air units use less fuel\rthan those of other\rarmies. They have\rsuperior offense\rand defense, too.\rWeak vs. naval units.
cz: Vzdusne jednotky\rspotrebuji mene paliva\rnez u jinych armad.\rMaji i lepsi utok a\robranu.\rSlabe proti lodim.

en: Air unit offensive and\rdefensive abilities\rare increased.
cz: Utocne i obranne\rschopnosti vzdusnych\rjednotek se zvysi.

en: Improves offense\rand defense of all\rair units. Additionally,\rall non-infantry units\rthat have carried out\rorders can move again.
cz: Zlepsi utok a obranu\rvsech vzdusnych jed-\rnotek. Navic vsechny\rnepechotni jednotky,\rktere splnily rozkazy,\rse mohou znovu pohnout.

en: A bighearted former\rpirate, he often calms\rthe waters between\rJess and Eagle.\rHit: The open sea\rMiss: High places
cz: Dobrosrdecny byvaly\rpirat, casto urovnava\rspory mezi Jess a\rEaglem.\rMa rad: sire more\rNemusi: vysky

en: Naval units move 1\rspace more than other\rarmies' do, and their\rdefenses are higher.\rMovement isn't\raffected by rain.
cz: Namorni jednotky se\rpohybuji o 1 pole\rvice nez u jinych armad\ra maji vyssi obranu.\rDest neovlivnuje\rjejich pohyb.

en: Causes a tidal wave\rthat does 1 HP of\rdamage to all enemy\runits and reduces\rtheir fuel by half.
cz: Spusti prilivovou vlnu,\rktera zpusobi 1 HP\rposkozeni vsem nepra-\rtelskym jednotkam a\rsnizi jim palivo na pul.

en: Causes a tidal wave\rthat does 2 HP of\rdamage to all enemy\runits and reduces\rfuel by half. Hinders\renemy movement.
cz: Spusti prilivovou vlnu,\rktera zpusobi 2 HP\rposkozeni vsem nepra-\rtelum a snizi palivo\rna pul. Brzdi pohyb\rnepritele.

en: Commander of Black\rHole's forces. A\rmysterious invader\rfrom another world.\rHit: Invasions\rMiss: Peace
cz: Velitel sil Black Hole.\rZahadny utocnik z\rjineho sveta.\rMa rad: invaze\rNemusi: mir

en: All units have superior\rfirepower. Movement\rcost is equal over all\rterrain types. Weak\rin the snow.
cz: Vsechny jednotky maji\rskvelou palebnou silu.\rCena pohybu je stejna\rna vsech typech terenu.\rSlaby ve snehu.

en: Sturm focuses all his\renergy on his Super\rCO power, which is\rso strong that he does\rnot need a normal\rCO Power.
cz: Sturm soustredi vsi\rsvou energii na Super\rCO silu, ktera je tak\rsilna, ze nepotrebuje\rbeznou CO silu.

en: Pulls a giant meteor\rfrom space, which\rdoes 8 HP of damage\rto all affected units.\rIncreases his units'\rfirepower & defense.
cz: Pritahne obri meteor\rz vesmiru, ktery zpusobi\r8 HP poskozeni vsem\rzasazenym jednotkam.\rZvysi palebnou silu a\robranu jeho jednotek.

en: The strongman of the\rBlack Hole Army.\rPromoted from private\rby Hawke.\rHit: Meat\rMiss: Veggies
cz: Silak armady Black\rHole. Z vojina ho\rpovysil Hawke.\rMa rad: maso\rNemusi: zeleninu

en: High firepower, but\rhe relies solely on\rstrength. His shoddy\rtechnique sometimes\rreduces the damage\rhis units deal.
cz: Vysoka palebna sila,\rale spoleha jen na sile.\rJeho mizerna technika\robcas snizi poskozeni,\rktere jeho jednotky\rzpusobi.

en: Increases dispersion\rof fire. There is a\rchance of getting a\rsuper strong blow, but\runits' firepower might\rsuddenly drop instead.
cz: Zvysi rozptyl palby.\rJe sance na super\rsilny uder, ale palebna\rsila jednotek muze\rmisto toho nahle\rklesnout.

en: Attack power\rincreases dramatically,\rbut so does the\rdispersion rate, which\raffects the amount of\rdamage targets take.\r
cz: Sila utoku dramaticky\rvzroste, ale i rozptyl,\rktery ovlivnuje vysi\rposkozeni, jez cile\rutrpи.\r

en: The wunderkind of the\rBlack Hole forces. A\rsmall, fierce, and\rbrilliant inventor.\rHit: Getting her way\rMiss: Not getting it
Skilled at taking\radvantage of terrain\rfeatures. Can turn\rterrain effects into\rfirepower bonuses.
In addition to using\rterrain effects to\rincrease firepower,\rdrops movement cost\rfor all units to 1.
Terrain effects are\rdoubled and used\rto increase attack\rstrength. Additionally,\rmovement cost for all\runits drops to 1.
A self-absorbed CO\rwho believes his skills\rare matchless. Second\rto Hawke in rank.\rHit: His own face\rMiss: Dirty things
Adept at making\rquick command\rdecisions, he stores\rup energy for his CO\rPower more rapidly\rthan other COs do.
Movement range for\rall units is increased\rby 1 space.
All units improve\rtheir movement range\rby 2 spaces.
The leader of Black\rHole's 4 COs.\rHe'll stop at nothing\rto achieve his goals.\rHit: Black coffee\rMiss: Incompetence
All units possess\rsuperior firepower.\rHis CO Power builds\rup more slowly than\rthose of the other COs.
All damaged units\rrecover 1 HP. In\raddition, all enemy\runits suffer 1 HP\rof damage.
All damaged units\rrecover 2 HP. In\raddition, all enemy\runits suffer 2 HP\rof damage
Rumored to be Orange\rStar's former chief,\rhe's closing up shop\rto hit the battlefield.\rHit: Tea\rMiss: Medicine
Uses secret trade\rroutes to get lower\rdeployment costs\rfor all units.
Speaks with such\rauthority that he\robtains even lower\rdeployment costs.
Deployment costs drop.\rMerchant pals gather\rfrom around the globe\rand help him deploy\rground units from any\rallied property.
Blue Moon's little rich\rboy CO. Views Olaf\rand Grit with awe\rand admiration.\rHit: Olaf and Grit\rMiss: Black Hole
cz: Bohaty mlady CO frakce\rBlue Moon. K Olafovi\ra Gritovi vzhlizi\rs uctou a obdivem.\rOblibene: Olaf a Grit\rNeoblibene: Black Hole

en: The heir to a vast\rfortune. Purchases\rall units at a special\rlow price. Troops' low\rfirepower stems from\rhis lack of experience.
cz: Dedic obrovskeho\rjmeni. Nakupuje\rvsechny jednotky za\rnizkou cenu. Slaba\rpalba vojaku plyne z\rjeho nedostatku zkusenosti.

en: Increases deployment\rfunds by one and a\rhalf times.
cz: Zvysuje nasazovaci\rfinance jeden a pul-\rkrat.

en: Uses wealth to\rincrease the strength\rof weapons. The more\rfunds available, the\rstronger the weapons\rbecome.
cz: Pomoci bohatstvi\rzvysuje silu zbrani.\rCim vice financi mas,\rtim silnejsi zbrane\rmas.

en: A gallant tank-driving\rCO who fought her\rway to the top. Often\rargues with Eagle.\rHit: Dandelions\rMiss: Unfit COs
cz: Statecny CO za volantem\rtanku, ktery se probil\raz na vrchol. Casto se\rhada s Eaglem.\rOblibene: Pampelisky\rNeoblibene: Slabi COs

en: Vehicular units have\rsuperior attack power.\rInfantry, air, and\rnaval units are\rcomparatively weak.
cz: Vozidlove jednotky maji\rvyssi silu utoku.\rPechota, letecke a\rnamorni jednotky jsou\rpomerne slabe.

en: Movement range of\rvehicles increases by\r1 space. Firepower\rincreases, and fuel\rand ammo supplies\rare also replenished.
cz: Dosah pohybu vozidel\rse zvysi o 1 pole.\rPalba se zvysi a take\rse doplni zasoby paliva\ra munice.

en: Increase in the attack\rstrength of vehicular\runits and 2-space\rincrease in movement\rrange. Also restores\rfuel and ammo supplies.
cz: Zvyseni sily utoku\rvozidlovych jednotek a\rzvyseni dosahu pohybu\ro 2 pole. Take doplni\rzasoby paliva a\rmunice.

en: A former paratrooper\rrumored to have\rbeen quite the CO\rin his day.\rHit: Lazy, rainy days\rMiss: Busy malls
cz: Byvaly vysadkar, o nemz\rse rika, ze byval\rpekny CO za svych\rcasu.\rObl.: Lenive, destive dny\rNeobl.: Rusna obchodni centra

en: Powerful infantry &\rhigh transport move-\rment range. Superior\rfirepower for copters,\rbut weak vs. naval\rand vehicle units.
cz: Silna pechota a velky\rdosah pohybu trans-\rporteru. Vyssi palba\rvrtulniku, ale slaby\rproti namornim a\rvozidlovym jednotkam.

en: Attack copter fire-\rpower increases.\rInfantry units with\r9 HP appear in all\rallied cities, ready\rto be moved.
cz: Palba bojovych vrtul-\rniku se zvysi.\rJednotky pechoty s\r9 HP se objevi ve vsech\rspojeneckych mestech,\rpripraveny k pohybu.

en: Attack copter fire-\rpower increases.\rMech units with 9\rHP appear in all\rallied cities, ready \rto be moved.
cz: Palba bojovych vrtul-\rniku se zvysi.\rJednotky mechu s 9\rHP se objevi ve vsech\rspojeneckych mestech, \rpripraveny k pohybu.

en: Fight your way through the story.
cz: Probojuj se pribehem.

en: Continue a campaign in progress.
cz: Pokracuj v rozehrane kampani.

en: Start a new campaign.
cz: Zacni novou kampan.

en: Battle friends or the computer.
cz: Bojuj s prateli nebo pocitacem.

en: Continue a Versus mode battle in progress.
cz: Pokracuj v rozehrane bitve rezimu Versus.

en: Start a new Versus mode battle.
cz: Zacni novou bitvu rezimu Versus.

en: Battle the computer and save your score.
cz: Bojuj s pocitacem a uloz sve skore.

en: Continue an in-progress War Room battle.
cz: Pokracuj v rozehrane bitve War Room.

en: Start a new War Room battle.
cz: Zacni novou bitvu War Room.

en: Shop here with your hard-earned points.
cz: Nakupuj zde za tezce vydelane body.

en: Create maps and edit the CO colors.
cz: Tvor mapy a uprav barvy CO.

en: Create new single- and multiplayer maps.
cz: Tvor nove mapy pro jednoho i vice hracu.

en: Change the colors of your COs.
cz: Zmen barvy svych COs.

en: Link up to battle friends and trade maps.
cz: Propoj se k bitvam s prateli a vymene map.

en: Press SELECT for Hard Campaign.
cz: Stiskni SELECT pro Tezkou kampan.

en: Press SELECT for the Sound Room.
cz: Stiskni SELECT pro Sound Room.

en: Select ON to limit vision with Fog of War.
cz: Zvol ON pro omezeni vyhledu Mlhou valky.

en: RANDOM causes the climate to change.
cz: RANDOM zpusobi zmenu pocasi.

en: Set funds received per allied base.
cz: Nastav finance za spojeneckou zakladnu.

en: Set number of days to battle.
cz: Nastav pocet dni bitvy.

en: Set number of properties needed to win.
cz: Nastav pocet majetku nutnych k vitezstvi.

en: Select ON to enable CO powers.
cz: Zvol ON pro zapnuti CO sil.

en: No animation.
cz: Bez animace.

en: Battle and capture animation.
cz: Animace bitvy a obsazeni.

en: Battle animation only.
cz: Jen animace bitvy.

en: Battle animation for players only.
cz: Animace bitvy jen pro hrace.

en: Set alliances by selecting the same team.
cz: Nastav spojenectvi volbou stejneho tymu.

en: Choose a CO.
cz: Vyber CO.

en: Choose Player or Computer.
cz: Vyber Hrace nebo Pocitac.

en: Field Training
cz: Vycvik v poli

en: Campaign
cz: Kampan

en: Classic
cz: Klasik

en: Vs. Maps
cz: Vs. mapy

en: Pre-Deployed
cz: Predrozmistene

en: 3P Maps
cz: 3P mapy

en: 4P Maps
cz: 4P mapy

en: War Room
cz: War Room

en: Design Maps
cz: Navrh map

en: Bean Island
cz: Bean Island

en: Crater Isle
cz: Crater Isle

en: Triangles
cz: Triangles
