en: C'mon in!\fWelcome to Battle Maps! My name's\rHachi. Pleased to meet you!\fThis is where you use points earned\rin Campaign mode or the War Room.\fI've got maps and COs you can use\rin Free Battle or the War Room, and...\fWell, I've got all kinds of stuff! \rGo ahead, take a look around!\f
cz: Pojd dal!\fVitej v Battle Maps! Jmenuji se\rHachi. Tesi me!\fTady utratis body ziskane\rv rezimu Kampan nebo War Room.\fMam mapy a COs do Free Battle\rnebo War Room, a...\fInu, mam ruzne veci! \rJen do toho, porozhledni se!\f

en: Back again?\fWhat can I do for you?\f
cz: Zase zpatky?\fCo pro tebe mohu udelat?\f

en: I'm outta everything.\rMy shelves are bare.\fIt's a sign of my consummate\rsalesmanship.\f
cz: Vsechno je vyprodano.\rPolice mam prazdne.\fJe to znamka meho dokonaleho\rprodejniho umeni.\f

en: Came back, eh? Well, I've\rgot everything you need.\f
cz: Tak ses vratil, co? Mam\rvsechno, co potrebujes.\f

en: Well, now! You're back again!\fMust mean you made some money\rin Campaign mode or the War Room.\fWhat'll it be today?\f
cz: No teda! Zase jsi tady!\fTo znamena, ze jsi vydelal penize\rv rezimu Kampan nebo War Room.\fCo to dnes bude?\f

en: Hey there, soldier!\fDon't like what you see? Finish more\rof the campaign, and try again.\fWell, do you need anything today?\f
cz: Zdravim, vojaku!\fNelibi se ti, co vidis? Dokonci vic\rz kampane a zkus to znovu.\fTak co, potrebujes dnes neco?\f

en: Look who's here!\fHey, listen. Even if you buy all the\rmaps I have in stock, come back again.\fI'm always getting new supplies.\fGo ahead and take a look at\rwhat came in today.\f
cz: Podivejme, kdo je tu!\fHele, poslouchej. I kdyz koupis\rvsechny mapy na sklade, vrat se.\fPorad dostavam nove zasoby.\fJen do toho a koukni se na to,\rco dnes prislo.\f

en: Come on in!\fHey, have you cleared\rCampaign mode?\fThere's more to it than\rjust clearing it once, you know.\fRumor has it that there's\ranother, harder campaign...\fAh, but I'm talking too much!\rAre you going to buy anything today?\f
cz: Pojd dal!\fHele, dokoncil jsi uz\rrezim Kampan?\fJe v tom vic nez jen\rdokoncit to jednou, vis.\fPovida se, ze existuje\rjeste jedna, tezsi kampan...\fAch, ale moc mluvim!\rKoupis dnes neco?\f

en: Hey! If you're coming in,\rcome in! And shut the door!\fBy the way, which CO have you\rbeen using?\fUsing the same CO over and\rover isn't very impressive.\fIf you want to earn a higher score,\ryou should try someone new.\fEnough of that; what'll\rit be today?\f
cz: Hej! Kdyz uz jdes dovnitr,\rpojd dal! A zavri dvere!\fMimochodem, ktereho CO\rjsi pouzival?\fPouzivat porad stejneho CO\rdokola neni moc psobive.\fKdyz chces vyssi skore,\rmel bys zkusit nekoho noveho.\fA dost; co to dnes\rbude?\f

en: Well, back again, are you?\fSay, have you tried\rthe Hard Campaign?\fAll you need to do is\rpress SELECT before\fyou start the Campaign Mode.\fThe Hard Campaign is just\rthe challenge you need, soldier!\fIt'll toughen you up, and the\rpayoff is bigger, too!\fIf you're ever short of funds,\rgive the Hard Campaign a shot.\fSo, go make some cash, and\rspend it all here! Heh heh heh!\f
cz: Tak zase zpatky, co?\fRekni, zkusil jsi uz\rTezkou kampan?\fStaci jen stisknout\rSELECT predtim, nez\fspustis rezim Kampan.\fTezka kampan je presne ta\rvyzva, kterou potrebujes, vojaku!\fOtuzi te a odmena je\rtaky vetsi!\fKdyz ti dojdou finance,\rzkus Tezkou kampan.\fTak jdi vydelat prachy a\rutrat je vsechny tady! He he he!\f

en: Hey, it's my favorite soldier!\fSay, are you making the best use\rof your CO Powers?\fYou're not ignoring normal powers\rin favor of super powers, are you?\fIn some situations, normal powers\rare better than super ones!\fAny energy left after you use a\rnormal power doesn't just disappear.\fDidn't you notice that?\fOh yeah, but you don't build up any\renergy when you're using CO Powers.\fLife ain't that easy, soldier!\fOops! You know, my mouth's gonna get\rme in hot water one of these days!\fEnough of this chitchat. Are you\rbuying something, or what?\f
cz: Hej, to je muj oblibeny vojak!\fRekni, vyuzivas naplno\rsve CO sily?\fNeignorujes normalni sily\rkvuli super silam, ze ne?\fV nekterych situacich jsou normalni\rsily lepsi nez ty super!\fEnergie, ktera zbyde po pouziti\rnormalni sily, jen tak nezmizi.\fNevsiml sis toho?\fAch jo, ale kdyz pouzivas CO sily,\rzadnou energii nenabiras.\fZivot neni tak snadny, vojaku!\fJejda! Vis, ta moje pusa me jednou\rdostane do horke vody!\fA dost klabosen. Koupis si\rneco, nebo co?\f

en: C'mon in!\fTell me, have you ever been in\ra battle with Jess?\fShe and Eagle are always squabbling,\rbut that shows how close they are!\fLet me tell you, that gal's the real\rdeal. Gives me goose bumps!\fShe's a bit like Max in ability, but\rthere's nothing second-rate about\fher long-range units. And her air\rand naval units?\fWell, they might not be the best, but\rshe doesn't make many mistakes.\fHer CO Power is a little plain. After\rall, supplying units isn't that glamorous.\fBut it resupplies air and naval units,\rtoo! She is amazing, isn't she?\fThere I go, rattling on like an old fool!\rLet's get down to business!\f
cz: Pojd dal!\fRekni, byl jsi nekdy\rv bitve s Jess?\fOna a Eagle se porad hadaji,\rale to ukazuje, jak jsou blizci!\fRikam ti, ta holka je opravdovy\rpoklad. Az me z ni mrazi!\fSchopnostmi je trochu jako Max, ale\rjeji jednotky s dlouhym dosahem\fnejsou vubec druhoradne. A jeji letecke\ra namorni jednotky?\fInu, nemusi byt nejlepsi, ale\rona moc chyb nedela.\fJeji CO sila je trochu obycejna. Vzdyt\rzasobovat jednotky neni nic okazaleho.\fAle doplnuje i letecke a namorni\rjednotky! Je uzasna, ze?\fA zase melu jako stary blazen!\rPojdme k veci!\f

en: Well now, look what the\rcat dragged in !\fAre you familiar with Sensei?\fHe's a bit long in the tooth now,\rbut in his day, he was something else!\fHe sure taught me a thing or two...\rAh, now I'm getting all misty!\fAnyway, Kanbei and I owe most of\rour success to that old man.\fYou're not impressed with his CO\rPower, right? If you think increasing\fthe number of mech and infantry units\ris something to sneeze at,\fthen you're still wet behind the ears!\fYou've got to consider WHY he makes\rthose 9 HP units land!\fThat's enough chitchat!\rGet to buying!\f
cz: No teda, koukni, co to\rkocka pritahla !\fZnas Senseie?\fUz je trochu starsi,\rale za svych casu byl neco extra!\fUrcite me lecemus naucil...\rAch, uz me to dojima!\fKazdopadne Kanbei a ja vdecime\rza vetsinu sveho uspechu tomu starci.\fJeho CO sila te neohromuje,\rze? Pokud si myslis, ze zvyseni\fpoctu mechu a jednotek pechoty\rneni nic moc,\fpak jsi jeste zelenac!\fMusis zvazit, PROC ty\rjednotky s 9 HP vysazuje!\fA dost klabosen!\rJdi nakupovat!\f

en: Mopping 'em up out there?\fI'm happy to see Nell in such\rfine spirits lately.\fAnd the youngsters! Sami and\rAndy are both growing so fast!.\fI think our country's safe with\rthis new generation on guard...\fOh, listen to this old fool prattle on!\rLet's talk business!\f
cz: Likvidujes je tam venku?\fJsem rad, ze Nell ma posledni\rdobou tak dobrou naladu.\fA ti mladi! Sami a\rAndy oba tak rychle rostou!\fMyslim, ze nase zeme je v bezpeci\rs touhle novou generaci ve strehu...\fAch, poslouchej toho stareho blazna!\rPojdme k veci!\f

en: Oh, it's you, again!\fHave you met the new kid,\rColin?\fHe's Blue Moon's little rich boy,\rbut his talent is undeniable.\fHis special power? Whew...\fIf you use the Power of Money right,\rit'll give you the strength to topple\feven Sturm with ease.\rDid you know that?\fHis normal firepower is low, so it's\ra question of overwhelming opponents\fwith sheer numbers or saving cash for\rCO Powers. Tough strategic choice!\fEnough with the small talk!\rWhy don't you have a look around?\f
cz: Ach, to jsi zase ty!\fPotkal jsi uz toho novacka,\rColina?\fJe to bohaty klucina z Blue Moon,\rale jeho talent je nepopiratelny.\fJeho zvlastni sila? Pche...\fKdyz Silu penez pouzijes spravne,\rda ti silu porazit\fhrave i Sturma.\rVedel jsi to?\fNormalni palbu ma slabou, takze jde\ro to zahltit protivniky\fpouhym poctem nebo setrit prachy na\rCO sily. Tezka strategicka volba!\fA dost reci!\rProc se nerozhlednes?\f

en: Good to see you again!\fHave you ever faced Flak, that\rbig ape with the Black Hole Army?\fHis attacks are so haphazard. Power\rmeans zip if you can't hit the target!\fI bet he'd be a difficult CO to use\rin the War Room.\fSo, are you ready to talk business?\rI'm all out of gossip for now!\f
cz: Rad te zase vidim!\fCelil jsi uz nekdy Flakovi, te\rvelke opici z armady Black Hole?\fJeho utoky jsou tak nahodile. Sila\rneni nic, kdyz netrefis cil!\fVsadim se, ze by byl tezky CO\rk pouziti ve War Room.\fTak co, pripraven k veci?\rDrby uz mi pro tedka dosly!\f

en: Hey! Quite the military posture\ryou're getting there!\fHave you met Lash yet? Yep, she's\rthat girl with the hair out to there!\fI hear she's the one who designed\rBlack Hole's new cannon and laser!\fWhat a waste of talent!\fIf she's gotta make stuff, why can't\rshe make a pool for my house!?\fWhat's that got to do with me, right?\rLet's get some business done!\f
cz: Hej! Pekny vojensky postoj\rsis tam osvojil!\fPotkal jsi uz Lash? Jo, to je\rta holka s tim vlasovym uceshem!\fSlysel jsem, ze ona navrhla\rnovy kanon a laser Black Hole!\fJaka skoda talentu!\fKdyz uz neco musi delat, proc nemuze\rudelat bazen pro muj dum!?\fCo to ma spolecneho se mnou, ze?\rPojdme k veci!\f

en: You've heard of Adder, right?\fHe's not much for offense, and he\rdoesn't have any specialty troops.\fThe thing is, he's got no weak points,\reither! That's the trouble right there!\fPlus, he stores up energy for his CO\rPower like there's no tomorrow!\fBut if he uses it over and over\ragain, it takes longer to build up.\fHow's that for some juicy intel?\fShow me some gratitude and\rwhip out your wallet!\f
cz: Slysel jsi o Adderovi, ze?\fNa utok neni moc dobry a nema\rzadne specialni jednotky.\fJde o to, ze nema ani zadne\rslabiny! V tom je ten problem!\fNavic nabira energii pro svou CO\rsilu, jako by zitra nebylo!\fAle kdyz ji pouziva porad\rdokola, nabira se dele.\fJak se ti libi tahle starva intel?\fProkaz mi vdecnost a\rvytahni penezenku!\f

en: Tell me, have you ever seen Hawke?\rHe's a CO in the Black Hole Army.\fHe's one bad hombre, and no fooling.\rHe's leagues above most other COs.\fAren't many who've gone head-to-\rhead with him and walked away\fa winner, you know? Of course,\rI'd teach him some manners, but...\fAh, why don't I just shut my yap\rand let you do some shopping, eh?\f
cz: Rekni, videl jsi uz Hawka?\rJe to CO v armade Black Hole.\fJe to fakt drsnak, bez legrace.\rJe o tridu nad vetsinou ostatnich COs.\fNeni mnoho tech, kdo se s nim\rstretli tvari v tvar a odesli\fjako vitez, vis? Samozrejme,\rja bych ho naucil manery, ale...\fAch, proc radsi nezavru klapacku\ra nenecham te nakupovat, co?\f

en: Is that what you're after?\r\x16
cz: Tohle hledas?\r\x16

cz: Diky tomu muzes pouzit Olafa\rmimo rezim Kampan!\f

en: It looks like it's my turn! Now, you\rcan choose me to be your CO!\f
cz: Vypada to, ze jsem na rade! Ted si\rmuzes vybrat me za sveho CO!\f

cz: Diky tomu upravis barvy Maxe!\f

en: Buy this to access the Sound Room!\fChoose Battle Maps from the Select\rMode screen, and press SELECT\fto switch to the Sound Room.\fMy personal favorite is Sensei's\rtheme song!\f
cz: Kup tohle pro pristup do Sound Room!\fZvol Battle Maps na obrazovce\rVyber rezimu a stiskni SELECT\fpro prepnuti do Sound Room.\fMuj osobni oblibenec je Senseiova\rznelka!\f

en: Buy this, then press SELECT\rbefore choosing Campaign.\fThis will allow you to access the\rHard Campaign mode.\fYou can earn a lot of points here\rif you've got the skill!\f
cz: Kup tohle a pak stiskni SELECT\rpred volbou Kampan.\fDiky tomu ziskas pristup k\rrezimu Tezka kampan.\fMuzes tu vydelat hodne bodu,\rkdyz na to mas!\f

en: You can now choose a new\rWar Room map: Pay Dirt!\f
cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou\rmapu War Room: Pay Dirt!\f

cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou\rmapu War Room: The Trident!\f

cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou\rmapu War Room: Banker Hills!\f

cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou\rmapu War Room: Missile Plains!\f

cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou\rmapu War Room: Lost Basin!\f

cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou\rmapu War Room: Strong Land!\f

cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou predro-\rzmistenou mapu: Big Daddy!\f

cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou predro-\rzmistenou mapu: Crossroad!\f

cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou 3P\rmapu Versus: Archipelagos!\f

cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou 4P\rmapu Versus: Pipe Maze!\f

cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou 4P\rmapu Versus: Badlands!\f

cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou predro-\rzmistenou mapu: Grid Assault!\f

cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou 3P\rmapu Versus: Portsmouth!\f

cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou 3P\rmapu Versus: Knotted Keys!\f

en: You can now choose a new 3P\rVersus map: Wyrm's Eye!\f
cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou 3P\rmapu Versus: Wyrm's Eye!\f

en: You can now choose a new 4P\rVersus map: Lock Ridge!\f
cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou 4P\rmapu Versus: Lock Ridge!\f

en: You can now choose a new 4P\rVersus map: Heartland!\f
cz: Ted si muzes vybrat novou 4P\rmapu Versus: Heartland!\f

en: Thanks for coming in!\rDon't forget your stuff.\e\e\e
cz: Diky za navstevu!\rNezapomen si sve veci.\e\e\e

en: You don't have enough points!\rI can't sell you this!\f
cz: Nemas dost bodu!\rTohle ti prodat nemuzu!\f

en: Well, how about something else?\f
cz: Co treba neco jineho?\f

en: Darn!\rI'm out of everything!\fI guess I'll close up\rshop for the day.\f
cz: Sakra!\rUz nic nemam!\fAsi pro dnesek zavru\rkram.\f

en: Come back again!\e\e
cz: Prijd zase!\e\e

en: Don't get discouraged!\e\e
cz: Nenech se odradit!\e\e

en: Don't get beat!
cz: Nenech se porazit!

en: Keep up the good work!\e\e
cz: Jen tak dal, dobra prace!\e\e

en: Do you want to save?\r\x17
cz: Chces ulozit hru?\r\x17

en: All right! And I'll win\rnext time, too!
cz: Dobre! A vyhraju i\rpriste!

en: Mission accomplished!\rAwaiting orders!
cz: Mise splnena!\rCekam na rozkazy!

en: Wahoo!\rEasy as pie!
cz: Juhu!\rHracka!

en: Nicely fought!\rSee you again.
cz: Hezky boj!\rUvidime se zas.

en: Done already?\rBetter luck next time!
cz: Uz konec?\rPriste vic stesti!

en: Olaf's troops know\rno match!
cz: Olafovy oddily nemaji\rsoupere!

en: Not bad, y'all!\rDon't be a sore loser!\r
cz: Slusne, vsichni!\rNebud spatny prohravac!\r

en: Whew...\rI won! I really won!
cz: Uf...\rVyhral jsem! Vazne!

en: Kanbei is victorious!\rWe shall meet again!
cz: Kanbei vitezi!\rJeste se setkame!

en: That settles that! It\rtakes brains to win!
cz: A je to! K vitezstvi\rje treba rozum!

en: Hm hm hmmm... I've\rstill got what it takes!
cz: Hm hm hmmm... Porad\rna to mam!

en: Another victory! Was\rthere ever any doubt!
cz: Dalsi vitezstvi! Byly\rvubec pochyby?

en: I won this time!\rI can't be beat at sea!
cz: Tentokrat jsem vyhral!\rNa mori me neporazis!

en: Never give up!\rThat's my motto!
cz: Nikdy se nevzdavej!\rTo je me heslo!

en: What was that?\rA waste of my time!\r
cz: Co to bylo?\rJen ztrata meho casu!\r

en: Hee hee hee...\rHm? Broken already?
cz: Chi chi chi...\rHm? Uz zniceny?

en: Heh heh heh...\rWhat did you expect?
cz: Che che che...\rCo jsi cekal?

en: You're not weak--I'm\rjust way too good!
cz: Nejsi slaby--ja jsem\rjen moc dobry!

en: My name is Sturm.\rHear it and tremble.
cz: Jmenuji se Sturm.\rSlys a chvej se.

en: Lucky me!\e\e\e\e
cz: Mam stesti!\e\e\e\e

en: Hmm...\e\rTime to get serious!\e\e\e\e
cz: Hmm...\e\rCas pritvrdit!\e\e\e\e

en: C'mon now!\e\rLet's have a little fun!\e\e\e
cz: No tak!\e\rTrochu se pobavme!\e\e\e

en: Luck IS a skill!\e\e\e\e
cz: Stesti JE dovednost!\e\e\e\e

en: I'm just getting started!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ja teprve zacinam!\e\e\e\e

en: Pretty good offense.\e\rI'm not too bad, myself!\e\e\e\e
cz: Slusny utok.\e\rJa taky nejsem spatny!\e\e\e\e

en: It's time for a tune-up!\e\e\e\e
cz: Cas na doladeni!\e\e\e\e

en: I'll win for sure!\e\e\e\e
cz: Urcite vyhraju!\e\e\e\e

en: I'm all revved up!\e\e\e\e
cz: Jsem nazhaveny!\e\e\e\e

en: I'm not worried! I can fix anything!\e\e\e\e
cz: Nebojim se! Vsechno spravim!\e\e\e\e

en: This is how I do battle!\e\e\e\e
cz: Takhle ja bojuji!\e\e\e\e

en: Never give up, and never lose!\e\rI'm on my way!
cz: Nikdy se nevzdat a nikdy neprohrat!\e\rUz jdu na to!

en: Roll, tanks, roll!\e\e\e\e
cz: Vpred, tanky, vpred!\e\e\e\e

en: Hey! Give up while you still can!\e\e\e\e
cz: Hej! Vzdej to, dokud muzes!\e\e\e\e

en: Now you're gonna get hurt!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ted to schytas!\e\e\e\e

en: Wanna test might? I won't lose!\e\e\e\e
cz: Chces zmerit sily? Neprohraju!\e\e\e\e

en: I'm no show-off!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ja se nepredvadim!\e\e\e\e

en: That's enough! Get outta the road!\e\e\e\e
cz: Uz dost! Uhni z cesty!\e\e\e\e

en: Ready or not, here I come!\e\e\e\e
cz: At chces nebo ne, uz jdu!\e\e\e\e

en: Infantry... Assault!\e\e\e\e
cz: Pechoto... Utok!\e\e\e\e

en: All right! Time to end this!\e\e\e\e
cz: Dobre! Cas to ukoncit!\e\e\e\e

en: You're not bad! Now it's my turn!\e\e\e\e
cz: Nejsi spatny! Ted jsem na rade ja!\e\e\e\e

en: In a test of skill, I'm unbeatable!\e\e\e\e
cz: V souboji dovednosti me neporazis!\e\e\e\e

en: Stay cool, stay calm...\e\rHe who panics\e loses!\e\e\e\e
cz: Klid, jen klid...\e\rKdo panikari\e prohrava!\e\e\e\e

en: Let the winds of war bring snow!\e\e\e\e
cz: At vetry valky prinesou snih!\e\e\e\e

en: Blue Moon is indestructible!\e\e\e\e
cz: Blue Moon je nezdolny!\e\e\e\e

en: You're going to regret\e\rchallenging me!\e\e\e\e
cz: Budes litovat, ze\e\rsis na me troufl!\e\e\e\e

en: Neither man nor machine can\e\rwithstand the fury of nature!\e\e\e\e
cz: Clovek ani stroj nevzdoruji\e\rzurivosti prirody!\e\e\e\e

en: You've got courage to face me,\e\rI'll give you that much!\e\e\e\e
cz: Mas odvahu postavit se mi,\e\rto ti musim uznat!\e\e\e\e

en: Ho ho ho. Do you think your\e\rpitiful troops can stand the cold?\e\e\e\e
cz: Ho ho ho. Myslis, ze tve\e\rubohe oddily snesou mraz?\e\e\e\e

en: Reckon it's time to take you down!\e\e\e\e
cz: Asi je cas te sejmout!\e\e\e\e

en: Where's the fool who wants\e\rto help me with target practice?\e\e\e\e
cz: Kde je ten hlupak, co mi chce\e\rposlouzit jako tercik?\e\e\e\e

en: Once you're in my sights,\e\rthere's no gettin' away!\e\e\e\e
cz: Kdyz te mam na musce,\e\rneutecete mi!\e\e\e\e

en: You can run, but you can't hide!\e\e\e\e
cz: Muzes utikat, ale neschovas se!\e\e\e\e

en: Don't get me all riled up!\e\rI wanna take things nice and slow.\e\e\e\e
cz: Nerozciluj me!\e\rChci to brat pekne pomalu.\e\e\e\e

en: No need for all the fuss.\e\rYou just calm yourself down!\e\e\e\e
cz: Neni treba se cuchat.\e\rJen se pekne uklidni!\e\e\e\e

en: Who shall taste my wrath?\e\e\e\e
cz: Kdo okusi muj hnev?\e\e\e\e

en: Prepare yourself! Kanbei is here!\e\e\e\e
cz: Priprav se! Kanbei je tu!\e\e\e\e

en: Your numbers mean nothing!\e\rNothing can stop me!\e\e\e\e
cz: Tva presila nic neznamena!\e\rNic me nezastavi!\e\e\e\e

en: My mind is honed for battle.\e\rThat is the essence of a samurai!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ma mysl je nabrousena k boji.\e\rTo je podstata samuraje!\e\e\e\e

en: I do not worry about that\e\rwhich MIGHT happen!\e\e\e\e
cz: Netrapim se tim,\e\rco se MOZNA stane!\e\e\e\e

en: You fight admirably, my foe!\e\rAllow me to show you my strength!\e\e\e\e
cz: Bojujes obdivuhodne, nepriteli!\e\rDovol, at ti ukazu svou silu!\e\e\e\e

en: Now you're gonna get it!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ted to schytas!\e\e\e\e

en: I see right through your plans!\e\e\e\e
cz: Prohledam tve plany skrz naskrz!\e\e\e\e

en: Father, Sensei, citizens of\e\rYellow Comet! Lend me your strength!\e\e\e\e
cz: Otce, Sensei, obcane\e\rYellow Comet! Pujcte mi svou silu!\e\e\e\e

en: I'll show you there's more to\e\rcombat than power alone!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ukazu ti, ze v boji jde\e\ro vic nez jen o silu!\e\e\e\e

en: Watch me, and learn!\e\e\e\e
cz: Sleduj me a uc se!\e\e\e\e

en: Number of enemy troops...location...\e\rGot it! This is so easy!\e\e\e\e
cz: Pocet nepratel...pozice...\e\rMam to! To je tak snadne!\e\e\e\e

en: The Eagle soars above you!\e\e\e\e
cz: Eagle se vznasi nad tebou!\e\e\e\e

en: I have no interest in underlings.\e\rBegone!\e\e\e\e
cz: O podradne nemam zajem.\e\rZmiz!\e\e\e\e

en: All units, ready for attack!\e\rDon't even give them time for regret!\e\e\e\e
cz: Vsechny jednotky, k utoku!\e\rNedejte jim ani cas k litosti!\e\e\e\e

en: Speed is the lifeblood of battle!\e\e\e\e
cz: Rychlost je miza boje!\e\e\e\e

en: Do you think you can keep up?\e\e\e\e
cz: Myslis, ze mi stacis?\e\e\e\e

en: Heh heh... Impressive!\e\rYou had almost overtaken me. Almost!\e\e\e\e
cz: Che che... Pozoruhodne!\e\rTemer jsi me predehnal. Temer!\e\e\e\e

en: Wave good-bye to your troops!\e\e\e\e
cz: Rozluc se se svymi oddily!\e\e\e\e

en: Anchors aweigh!\e\e\e\e
cz: Zvednout kotvy!\e\e\e\e

en: Time to show you\e\rhow we do things at sea!\e\e\e\e
cz: Cas ti ukazat,\e\rjak to delame na mori!\e\e\e\e

en: Panic is for landlubbers!\e\e\e\e
cz: Panika je pro suchozemce!\e\e\e\e

en: I'm a nautical know-it-all!\e\e\e\e
cz: Jsem namornicky vseved!\e\e\e\e

en: Prepare to be washed away!\e\e\e\e
cz: Priprav se, ze te smete!\e\e\e\e

en: You will tremble before my power!\e\e\e\e
cz: Budes se chvet pred mou silou!\e\e\e\e

en: Fear is all you have left...\e\e\e\e
cz: Zbyl ti uz jen strach...\e\e\e\e

en: You shall not survive!\e\e\e\e
cz: Neprezijes!\e\e\e\e

en: Prepare to embrace darkness!\e\e\e\e
cz: Priprav se objmout temnotu!\e\e\e\e

en: Such power... I regret crushing it.\e\e\e\e
cz: Takova sila... Litost, ze ji drtim.\e\e\e\e

en: Burning earth!!!
cz: Horici zeme!!!

en: Try this on for size!\e\e\e\e
cz: Zkus tohle!\e\e\e\e

en: Grrrrrraaaaaaa!\e\rI'm outta control!\e\e\e\e
cz: Grrrrrraaaaaaa!\e\rUz se neovladam!\e\e\e\e

en: I'm gonna smash you good!\e\e\e\e
cz: Poradne te rozmacknu!\e\e\e\e

en: Crushing stuff's what I do best!\e\rYou got a problem with that?!?\e\e\e\e
cz: Drceni mi jde nejlip!\e\rMas s tim problem?!?\e\e\e\e

en: Why think when you can fight!?\e\e\e\e
cz: Proc premyslet, kdyz muzes bojovat!?\e\e\e\e

en: Stay outta my way!\e\e\e\e
cz: Neplett se mi do cesty!\e\e\e\e

en: Can you survive my attack?\e\e\e\e
cz: Prezijes muj utok?\e\e\e\e

en: Tee hee! C'mon! Let's play!\e\e\e\e
cz: Chi chi! No tak! Pojdme si hrat!\e\e\e\e

en: I've had enough!\e\rI'm bored now!\e\e\e\e\r
cz: Uz mam dost!\rTed se nudim!\e\e\e\e\r

en: You're no fun... I don't like you at all!\e\e\e\e
cz: Vubec te neuzijes... Nemam te rada!\e\e\e\e

en: You want to match wits with me?\e\rYou're so silly!\e\e\e\e
cz: Chces se se mnou merit chytrosti?\e\rTy jsi ale hloupy!\e\e\e\e

en: Ooh! You're so annoying!\e\rI'm gonna have to get rid of you now!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ooh! Ty jsi ale otravny!\e\rTed se te budu muset zbavit!\e\e\e\e

en: Heh heh heh... I'm going\e\rto enjoy breaking you!\e\e\e\e
cz: Che che che... Uziju si\e\rtve zlomeni!\e\e\e\e

en: The look of terror on your face...\e\rIt's absolutely delicious!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ten vyraz hruzy v tve tvari...\e\rJe naprosto lahodny!\e\e\e\e

en: Heh heh heh...\e\rCan't a guy have a little fun!?\e\e\e\e
cz: Che che che...\e\rNemuze se clovek trochu pobavit!?\e\e\e\e

en: Heh heh heh...\e\rIt only hurts for a moment.\e\e\e\e
cz: Che che che...\e\rBoli to jen chvilku.\e\e\e\e

en: A battle with me is a greater\e\rhonor than you deserve!\e\e\e\e
cz: Boj se mnou je vetsi cest,\e\rnez si zaslouzis!\e\e\e\e

en: Heh heh heh...\e\rKneel before Adder!\e\e\e\e
cz: Che che che...\e\rKlekni pred Adderem!\e\e\e\e

en: This is the end.\e\e\e\e
cz: Toto je konec.\e\e\e\e

en: Farewell.\e\e\e\e
cz: Sbohem.\e\e\e\e

en: I give you credit for\e\rpushing me this far.\e\e\e\e
cz: Uznavam, ze jsi me\e\rdohnal az sem.\e\e\e\e

en: To be defeated is to lose everything.\e\rAre you prepared for that outcome?\e\e\e\e
cz: Byt porazen znamena ztratit vse.\e\rJsi na takovy konec pripraven?\e\e\e\e

en: Victory goes to the better combatant.\e\rIt's a simple truth.\e\e\e\e
cz: Vitezstvi nalezi lepsimu bojovniku.\e\rJe to prosta pravda.\e\e\e\e

en: Impressive....\e\rI will remember your skill!\e\e\e\e
cz: Pusobive....\e\rTvou dovednost si zapamatuji!\e\e\e\e

en: How's business?\e\e\e\e
cz: Jak jde kseft?\e\e\e\e

en: Come by and buy something!\e\e\e\e
cz: Zastav se a neco si kup!\e\e\e\e

en: You can call me Hachi, the\e\rbest CO there ever was!\e\e\e\e
cz: Rikej mi Hachi, nejlepsi\e\rvelitel vsech dob!\e\e\e\e

en: No need to get all worked up!\e\e\e\e
cz: Neni treba se rozcilovat!\e\e\e\e

en: This brings back memories!\e\e\e\e
cz: Tohle mi pripomina stare casy!\e\e\e\e

en: Runnin' away won't prove anything!\e\rStand your ground, soldier!\e\e\e\e
cz: Utekem nic nedokazes!\e\rDrz pozici, vojaku!\e\e\e\e

en: Let me show you the power of money!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ukazu ti silu penez!\e\e\e\e

en: People of Blue Moon!\e\rI need your help!\e\e\e\e
cz: Lide Blue Moon!\e\rPotrebuji vasi pomoc!\e\e\e\e

en: Money buys power!!!\e\e\e\e
cz: Penize kupuji moc!!!\e\e\e\e

en: Don't underestimate me\e\rbecause I'm new!\e\e\e\e
cz: Nepodcenuj me jen proto,\e\rze jsem novy!\e\e\e\e

en: When the time comes, I do my duty!\e\e\e\e
cz: Az prijde cas, splnim svou povinnost!\e\e\e\e

en: This is not a drill...\e\rI won't give up so easily!\e\e\e\e
cz: Toto neni cviceni...\e\rTak snadno se nevzdam!\e\e\e\e

en: I won't let this chance pass me by!\e\e\e\e
cz: Tuhle sanci si nenecham ujit!\e\e\e\e

en: All at once now!\e\rPress on!\e\e\e\e
cz: Vsichni naraz!\rVpred!\e\e\e\e

en: Battle should never be taken lightly.\e\rI always give 100%! Always!!!\e\e\e\e
cz: Boj se nikdy nesmi brat na lehkou vahu.\e\rVzdy davam 100%! Vzdy!!!\e\e\e\e

en: I'll survive this battle, too! Believe me!\e\e\e\e
cz: I tuhle bitvu prezivu! Ver mi!\e\e\e\e

en: It's simply a matter of being the best!\e\e\e\e
cz: Proste jde o to byt nejlepsi!\e\e\e\e

en: You're a formidable opponent,\e\rbut that doesn't mean I'll lose!\e\e\e\e
cz: Jsi obavany soupere,\e\rale to neznamena, ze prohraju!\e\e\e\e

en: I've still got what it takes to\e\rdefeat you youngsters!\e\e\e\e
cz: Porad mam na to, abych\e\rporazil vas mladiky!\e\e\e\e

en: Paratroopers! Prepare to jump!\e\e\e\e
cz: Vysadkari! Priprava ke skoku!\e\e\e\e

en: Ha ha hah!\e\rThis will be a crushing victory!\e\e\e\e
cz: Ha ha hah!\rTohle bude drtive vitezstvi!\e\e\e\e

en: See what experience\e\rcan do for you!?\e\e\e\e
cz: Vidis, co dokazou\e\rzkusenosti!?\e\e\e\e

en: You put up a good fight,\e\rbut this is the end!\e\e\e\e
cz: Bojoval jsi dobre,\e\rale toto je konec!\e\e\e\e

en: Nothing good ever comes from war...\e\rWhen this is done, let's go home.\e\e\e\e
cz: Z valky nikdy nevzejde nic dobreho...\e\rAz to skonci, pojdme domu.\e\e\e\e

en: This is the unit's\rmovement range. It can\rcover most terrain at a\rmovement cost of one.
cz: Toto je dosah pohybu\rjednotky. Vetsinu terenu\rzdola za cenu pohybu\rjedna.

en: This is the unit's\rmovement range. As it\rmoves on tires, it has\rtrouble on plains.
cz: Toto je dosah pohybu\rjednotky. Jede na kolech,\rtakze ma potize\rna plani.

en: This is the unit's\rmovement range. Its\rtreads allow it to move\ron plains unhindered.
cz: Toto je dosah pohybu\rjednotky. Pasy ji\rdovoluji pohyb po plani\rbez prekazek.

en: This is an air unit.\rTerrain does not\raffect its movement\rrange.
cz: Toto je vzdusna\rjednotka. Teren\rneovlivnuje jeji\rdosah pohybu.

en: This is a naval unit.\rThis is its movement\rrange across open\rwater and reefs.
cz: Toto je namorni\rjednotka. Toto je jeji\rdosah pohybu po vode\ra utesech.

en: This is a transport\runit's movement\rrange. These units\rcan move over reefs.
cz: Toto je dosah pohybu\rtransportni jednotky.\rTyto jednotky se umi\rpohybovat po utesech.

en: This is the unit's\rvision range. This\rincreases when the\runit climbs a mountain.
cz: Toto je dohled\rjednotky. Zvetsi se,\rkdyz jednotka vystoupi\rna horu.

en: This is the unit's vision\rrange. It's how far the\runit can see in Fog\rof War.
cz: Toto je dohled jednotky.\rUrcuje, jak daleko vidi\rv Mlze valky.

en: This is the current fuel\ramount. The unit can no\rlonger move when all the\rfuel is used.
cz: Toto je aktualni stav\rpaliva. Jednotka se\rnemuze hybat, kdyz\rpalivo dojde.

en: This is the current fuel\ramount. It's used at 5\runits per turn. Units\rcrash when out of fuel.
cz: Toto je aktualni stav\rpaliva. Spotreba 5\rjednotek za tah. Bez\rpaliva se zriti.

en: This is the current fuel\ramount. It's used at 2\runits per turn. Units\rcrash when out of fuel.
cz: Toto je aktualni stav\rpaliva. Spotreba 2\rjednotek za tah. Bez\rpaliva se zriti.

en: This is the current fuel\ramount. It's used at 1\runit per turn. Units\rsink when out of fuel.
cz: Toto je aktualni stav\rpaliva. Spotreba 1\rjednotky za tah. Bez\rpaliva se potopi.

en: No primary weapon\ris equipped.
cz: Nema osazenu\rprimarni zbran.

en: This is the primary\rweapon. It can \x83fire\x80\ron the units below.
cz: Toto je primarni\rzbran. Muze \x83palit\x80\rna jednotky nize.

en: This is the amount of\rprimary weapon ammo.\rSecondary weapons are\rused when it's gone.
cz: Toto je mnozstvi\rmunice primarni zbrane.\rPo vycerpani se pouziva\rsekundarni zbran.

en: The symbol on the unit\rindicates the\rpotential to hit\rthis unit type.
cz: Symbol na jednotce\rurcuje sanci zasahnout\rtento typ jednotky.

en: The symbol on the unit\rindicates the\rpotential to hit\rthis unit type.
cz: Symbol na jednotce\rurcuje sanci zasahnout\rtento typ jednotky.

en: The symbol on the unit\rindicates the\rpotential to hit\rthis unit type.
cz: Symbol na jednotce\rurcuje sanci zasahnout\rtento typ jednotky.

en: The symbol on the unit\rshows hit potential.\rThis weapon can't \x83fire\x80\ron submerged \x82subs\x80.
cz: Symbol na jednotce\rurcuje sanci zasahu.\rTato zbran nemuze \x83palit\x80\rna ponorene \x82ponorky\x80.

en: The secondary weapon\ris the machine gun.
cz: Sekundarni zbran\rje kulomet.

en: These are new weapons\rdeveloped by Black Hole.\rThey are more powerful\rthan Md tanks.
cz: Toto jsou nove zbrane\rvyvinute Black Hole.\rJsou silnejsi nez\rMd tanky.

en: If you want to win, capture the enemy\rHQ or defeat all the enemy units.\f
cz: Chces-li vyhrat, obsad neprijatelske\rHQ nebo znic vsechny nepratelske jednotky.\f

en: To win here, capture the enemy HQ\ror defeat all the enemy troops.\fGood luck and move out!\f
cz: K vitezstvi obsad neprijatelske HQ\rnebo poraz vsechny nepratelske oddily.\fHodne stesti a vpred!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces to win.\fThat's your mission!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes.\fTo je tvoje mise!\f

en: Seize the enemy HQ or defeat all\rthe enemy units to clear this map.\f
cz: Zaber neprijatelske HQ nebo znic\rvsechny jednotky a dokoncis mapu.\f

en: Flak's forces are moving in...\fCapture Lash's HQ within 7 days or\rdefeat all of her troops to win!\f
cz: Flakovy sily se blizi...\fObsad Lashino HQ do 7 dni nebo\rporaz vsechny jeji oddily a vyhrajes!\f

en: The Black Cannon must be destroyed\rto win here! There's no need to panic.\fFocus on the objective, and move out!\f
cz: K vitezstvi musis znicit Black\rCannon! Neni treba panikarit.\fSoustred se na cil a vpred!\f

en: Capture the enemy lab or destroy\rthe enemy units in 7 days to win!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelskou lab nebo znic\rjednotky do 7 dni a vyhrajes!\f

en: We've finally arrived! All we need\rto worry about is that pipe!\f
cz: Konecne jsme tu! Stara se musime\rjen o to potrubi!\f

en: Defeat all the enemy forces or\rcapture the enemy HQ to win here.\f
cz: Poraz vsechny nepratelske sily nebo\robsad neprijatelske HQ a vyhrajes.\f

en: To win here, defeat all the enemy\rtroops. Pay attention to those woods!\f
cz: K vitezstvi poraz vsechny\rnepratelske oddily. Pozor na ten les!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fGood luck!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fHodne stesti!\f

en: Capture the cities around the giant\rmissile silo within 15 days.\fIf you can do that, victory is yours!\f
cz: Obsad mesta kolem obriho\rraketoveho sila do 15 dni.\fKdyz to dokazes, vitezstvi je tve!\f

en: All you need to do here is protect\ryour HQ for 14 days!\f
cz: Stari jen ochranit sve\rHQ po 14 dni!\f

en: Move a unit onto your HQ, or\rdefeat all enemy units.\fThat's all it takes to win!\f
cz: Premisti jednotku na sve HQ nebo\rznic vsechny nepratelske jednotky.\fVic k vitezstvi netreba!\f

en: Capture the enemy lab or defeat all\rthe enemy forces within 15 days!\fThat's what it takes to win here!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelskou lab nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily do 15 dni!\fTo je cesta k vitezstvi!\f

en: At last, the factory battle!\rDestroy that pipe to claim the field!\f
cz: Konecne, bitva o tovarnu!\rZnic to potrubi a obsad pole!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fGood luck!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fHodne stesti!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or destroy\rthe 8 minicannons to win the day!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo znic\r8 minidel a zvitezis!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fGood luck!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fHodne stesti!\f

en: Destroy all enemy units, but protect\rthose 10 cities in the upper right!\f
cz: Znic vsechny nepratelske jednotky,\rale chran tech 10 mest vpravo nahore!\f

en: Defeat all the enemy forces before\rthey get to your HQ!\f
cz: Poraz vsechny nepratelske sily,\rnez se dostanou k tvemu HQ!\f

en: Topple the 3 minicannons above\ryour HQ to win this map!\f
cz: Sval 3 minidela nad tvym\rHQ a vyhrajes tuto mapu!\f

en: Capture the enemy lab or defeat all\rthe enemy units within 18 days!\fAre you ready for this challenge?\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelskou lab nebo znic\rvsechny jednotky do 18 dni!\fJsi na tuto vyzvu pripraven?\f

en: It's been a long, hard road, but\rvictory is within our grasp!\fMove out, and crush that pipe!\f
cz: Byla to dlouha, tezka cesta, ale\rvitezstvi je na dosah!\fVpred a znic to potrubi!\f

en: To win the field here, destroy the\r8 minicannons around the enemy HQ.\f
cz: K obsazeni pole znic\r8 minidel kolem neprijatelskeho HQ.\f

en: The 2 Black Cannons must be\rdestroyed to claim victory!\f
cz: K vitezstvi musis znicit\r2 Black Cannony!\f

en: Lash's repair skills are nothing to\rsneeze at...\fYou have 17 days to sink the\rbattleships surrounded by bridges!\f
cz: Lashiny opravarske schopnosti nejsou\rk zahozeni...\fMas 17 dni potopit bitevni\rlode obklopene mosty!\f

en: To win here, destroy the 4 laser\rcannons or capture the enemy HQ!\fLend a hand, Sami!\f
cz: K vitezstvi znic 4 laserova\rdela nebo obsad neprijatelske HQ!\fPomoz, Sami!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fGood luck!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fHodne stesti!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ, or defeat all\rthe enemy troops. Beware the volcano!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny oddily. Pozor na sopku!\f

en: You have 9 days to capture the lab\ror destroy all enemy troops.\fYou can do it!\f
cz: Mas 9 dni obsadit lab nebo\rznicit vsechny nepratelske oddily.\fZvladnes to!\f

en: Hawke's a formidable foe, but we can\rbeat him if we work together!\fThe key to victory is destroying\rthat pipe to the factory!\f
cz: Hawke je obavany nepritel, ale\rspolecne ho porazime!\fKlicem k vitezstvi je znicit\rto potrubi k tovarne!\f

en: Take out the 3 Black Cannons to\rclaim victory here!\f
cz: Znic 3 Black Cannony a\rzvitezis zde!\f

en: We're here at last! You've all\rfought so hard for this day.\fDestroy the Deathray within 30\rdays to end this once and for all!\f
cz: Konecne jsme tu! Vsichni jste\rtvrde bojovali pro tento den.\fZnic Deathray do 30 dni a\rukonci to jednou provzdy!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fGood luck!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fHodne stesti!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fMake us proud!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fUcin nam radost!\f

en: Topple the Black Cannon to win here!\rThere's no need to panic.\fFocus on the objective and move out!\f
cz: Sval Black Cannon a zvitezis!\rNeni treba panikarit.\fSoustred se na cil a vpred!\f

en: Capture the enemy HQ or defeat\rall the enemy forces for victory!\fGood luck!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelske HQ nebo poraz\rvsechny nepratelske sily a vyhrajes!\fHodne stesti!\f

en: Victory's all yours if you defeat\rall the enemy troops! Let 'em have it!\f
cz: Vitezstvi je tve, kdyz porazis\rvsechny oddily! Dej jim na frak!\f

en: To win here, defeat all the enemy\rtroops. Pay attention to those woods!\f
cz: K vitezstvi poraz vsechny\rnepratelske oddily. Pozor na ten les!\f

en: Capture the enemy lab or defeat all\rthe enemy units within 7 days!\fThose are your options!\f
cz: Obsad neprijatelskou lab nebo znic\rvsechny jednotky do 7 dni!\fTo jsou tve moznosti!\f

en: All you need to worry about here\ris that factory! Destroy it!\f
cz: Stara se musis jen o tu\rtovarnu! Znic ji!\f
